Bi ko ba s'esu t'o n gb'ogun,|A le fi ’bi s'oloore,|Jọwọ pa isẹ esu run,|Dariji, dariji
Wo ti'ya ti Jesu wa jẹ,|'Ranti ogun ẹjẹ Rẹ,|Nin'ọgba Getsemani.|Dariji, dariji.
A dupẹ p'O ti gbọ tiwa,|Ma jẹ k'a tun d'ẹsẹ mọ,|Tun wa yipada Oluwa,|Ka l'ayọ l'ọjọ kẹyin.

english.title: LET US KNEEL FOR GOD OF GLORY, WHO DWELLETH IN GLORIOUS LIGHT
english.description:
(FE 70) 8S 7S
"Who is this King of GIory? The Lord of
host He is the King of Glory - Ps. 24:10
stanzas: Let us kneel for God of Glory|Who dwelleth in glorious Light|Who the eyes of sinners can't see|Forgive us, forgive us.
All ye Cherubim Seraphim|All ye members of our Band|Repent all the Sins committed|Let us plead forgiveness.
If we know that we are sinners|Confess all without reserve|Repent all and flee from our sins|Father will forgive us.
Lack of love, the greatest of sin|Amidst us though now we knee!|Satan against us war waging|Forgive us, Forgive us.
In our manners and our movements|In the idle talks we make|Despising our neighbours and friends|Forgive us, forgive us.
Vividly, to us visible|Thou hath sent to us Thine Light|Us to lead to divine pathway|Forgive us, Forgive us.
Be it not for Thine great mercy|Thine Light before we access|Over Satan we are conq'rors|Forgive us, Forgive us.
However hard satan may rage|Hence may we be not ingrates|The works of satan please destroy|Forgive us, forgive us.
For the suffering of our Jesus|For the bloody sweat he made|In the garden of Gethsemane|Forgive us, forgive us.
We are grateful you have heard us|Give us grace to sin no more|Redeem and revive all of us|To rejoice for ever more.

verse: Let us kneel for God of Glory
Who dwelleth in glorious Light
Who the eyes of sinners can't see
Forgive us forgive us

syllable: 'K'A wo lẹ, f'Ọ ba, O lo go,
Ẹ ni t'On, gbe 'nu, mọ o lẹ,
T'o ju ẹ, lẹ sẹ, kan ko ri,
Da ri ji, da ri ji.
notes: m r d, m r d

hymns.title: BABA JỌ RANTI MI, NI'LE MIMỌ LOKE
hymns.description:
(FE 71) 
“Oluwa ranti mi.” - Luk 23:42
stanzas: Baba jọ ranti mi,|Ni'le mimọ loke,|Jọ gba mi ki n jẹ tirẹ,|S'ile Mimọ loke.
Ẹlẹsẹ jọ' ronu,|K'akoko to kọja,|Akoko kọja f'ole,|To wa lọwọ osi.
Ọkan mi ji giri,|K'akoko to kọja,|Ki ilẹkun anu to se;|Oluwa ranti mi.
Irònúpiwàdà,|Ni Kristi fẹ wa fun,|Ka le ni ayọ kikun|N'ile Baba loke.
Jesu jọ ranti mi,|Gba emi ẹlẹsẹ,|Gba t'O ba de ijọba Rẹ|Ni'le Paradise.
Orin Alleluya,|L'awa yio kọ lọrun,|Gba t'a ba de itẹ Baba,|N'ile Mimọ loke
Ogo ni fun Baba,|Ogo ni fun Ọmọ,|Ogo ni f'Ẹmi Mimọ,|Mẹtalọkan lailai.
chorus: Oluwa ranti mi,|Oluwa ranti mi,|Gba t'O ba de jọba Rẹ,|Oluwa ranti mi.

english.title: FATHER REMEMBER ME, FROM THY HOLY HOME ABOVE
english.description:
(FE 71) 6S7S 
“Lord remember me when thou comest 
into thy Kingdom" - Luke 23:42
stanzas: FATHER remember me,|From Thy Holy home above|Receive and make me Thine own|In heavenly home above.
Oh! sinners, come and repent|Before it is too late;|Unrepentant was the thief|Who was on Christ‘s left Hand.
Spirit within awake|Before the time is late,|Ere the door of mercy is shut|In heavenly Father‘s home.
What Jesus needs of us?|Repentance unreserved,|That we may enjoy in full|In heavenly Father's home.
Jesus remember me,|Receive the poor sinners,|When to Thine Kingdom cometh|In heavenly Paradise
Song of Hallelujah,|We shall all sing above,|When we stand before the throne|In holy home above.
Glory to Father be|Glory to Son we give|Glory to Holy Spirit|Eternal Trinity.
chorus: Lord God remember me (2ce)|In The Holy home above|Lord God remember me.

verse: FATHER remember me
From Thy Holy home above
Receive and make me Thine own
In heavenly home above
chorus: Lord God remember me
Lord God remember me
In The Holy home above
Lord God remember me

syllable: Ba ba jọ ran n ti mi,
Ni 'le mi mọ o lo ke,
Jọ gba mi kin jẹ ti rẹ,
S'i le Mi mọ o lo ke.
O lu wa ran ti mi,
O lu wa ran ti mi,
Gba t'O ba de jọ ba Rẹ,
O lu wa ran ti mi.

hymns.title: ỌLỌRUN ẸLẸDA, JỌWỌ SUNMỌ WA
hymns.description:
t.H.C. 305    11s       (FE 72) 
“Ki O si dide fun iranlọwọ mi.” - Ps. 35:2
stanzas: ỌLỌRUN Ẹlẹda / jọwọ sunmọ wa,|Awa ọmọ Re de / lati juba Rẹ,|Ran Séráfù t'ọrun / ati Kérúbù;|Lati wa ba wa pe / lati jọ yin Ọ.
Baba Olubukun / bukun wa loni,|Jẹ k'ipade oni / le mu eso wa,|Jẹ ki ọmọ 'mọle / to wa l'okunkun,|Wa sinu imọlẹ / lati ri'gbala.
Tikala Rẹ wasu / fun aguntan Rẹ,|Majẹ ki wọn segbe, pe won sọdọ Rẹ,|Majẹ k'ina Rẹ ku / n'ilẹ Yoruba,|Jẹ ki ina Rẹ ma / tan nibẹ titi.
Awọn ti 'Wọ ti pe / ni ilu Eko,|Ati gbogbo ayé / ma fi wọn silẹ,|Ọkọ 'gbala kẹhin / to tun gbe kalẹ,|Majẹ k'ẹranko wọ / l'akoko ti wa.
Ẹyin Ijọ Seraf' / ati Kérúbù,|Ẹ ma jẹ ko rẹ yin, ẹ mase sọlẹ,|Gbe 'da 'sẹgun soke, Jesu ti sẹgun;|Nipa agbara Rẹ / awa yoo sẹgun.
Sugbọn k'a sotitọ / ni ilana Rẹ,|Yoo si gbe wa nija, yoo duro ti wa,|K'a fara da iya, ka tẹ siwaju,|Oun to gbọ t'Abraham / yoo si gbọ tiwa.
Jesu Olugbala / Ọrẹ Ẹlẹsẹ,|Jẹ ka se ifẹ Rẹ / ka tẹ s'ọna Rẹ,|Jẹ ka fi iwa wa / p'ẹlomiran wa,|Ko si fun wa n'ifẹ / larin ara wa.
A mbe Ọ, Ẹlẹda, Ọlọrun tiwa,|Fun awọn ariran / ninu Ẹgbẹ yi,|F'iran didan han wọn, si tun yan kun wọn,|Mase jẹ ki esu / f'iran rẹ han wọn.
Nigba t'o ba si di / ọjọ ikehin,|T'oju gbogbo ayé, yoo pe sọdọ Rẹ,|Majẹ k'oju ti wa, ma jẹ ka sọkun,|Jẹ k'awa Séráfù / ke Halleluya.

english.title: O GOD OUR CREATOR, BE NEAR UNTO US
english.description:
H.C. 305, 11s (FE 72)
“Give me ear O Shepherd of Israel"
- Ps. 80:1
stanzas: O GOD our creator,|be near unto us|We thy children are here|Gathered to praise thee|Send the Heavenly Seraph|And the Cherubim|To congregate with us|Jointly worship thee.
Blessful Father Bless us|We pray Thee this day|Let our meeting this day,|Fruits of blessing bring|Let the children of Light|Who in darkness be|Quickly to the Light come,|To get Salvation.
All ye band of Seraph|And the Cherubim|Never, Never tired,|Never lazy be|Raise the sword of victory|Jesus has conquered,|By his mighty power|We shall conquer too.
Jesus our Redeemer,|Friend of the sinner|Let us thy will obey,|Pressing to thy way|Let us with our manner|Call others to come|And give us love we pray,|In our midst O Lord.
When the end shall come up,|Of the world we live|And the whole world gathered,|By thy Throne above|Let us not be ashamed,|Let us Never weep|Let we Seraph below|Shout Hallelujah.

verse: O GOD our creator
be near unto us
We thy children are here
Gathered to praise thee
Send the Heavenly Seraph
And the Cherubim
To congregate with us
Jointly worship thee

syllable: Ọ LỌ RU UN Ẹ lẹ e da
Jọ wọ sun mọ wa,
A wa ọ o mọ Re e de
La ti ju ba Rẹ,
Ran Sé rá fù t'ọ o run
A ti Ké rú bù;
La ti wa a ba wa a pe
La ti jọ yin Ọ.

hymns.title: OLUWA ỌLỌRUN / OUN AYÉ/ ỌLỌRUN KÉRÚBÙ ATI SÉRÁFÙ
GBA WA LỌJỌ NA T'A O SE 'DAJỌ AYÉ, K'AWA LE J'ẸNI 'TẸWỌGBA
hymns.description:
H.C. 177  t.SS&S 97 P.M.   
(FE 74) 
“Gba awọn eniyan Rẹ la.” - Ps. 28:9 
Ohun orin: “Mọkandinlọgọrun dubulẹ jẹ (236)”
stanzas: GBA wa lọjọ na t'a o se 'dajọ ayé,|K'awa le j'ẹni 'tẹwọgba|Se iranlọwọ fun wa ka j'ẹni 'tẹwọgba,|Sibi omi 'ye t'O pese.
Jọwọ tan imọlẹ Rẹ loni, Oluwa,|S'oju awọn ti ko riran,|Ni apa Jesu aye wa sibẹ|Mase tun wi awawi mọ.
Ẹyin Imale ati Keferi,|Ẹ wa gbọ ihin rere yi,|Akoko naa mbọ t'a o bere lọwọ rẹ,|Pe isẹ kini iwọ n se.
Ẹyin Ijọ Kérúbù ati Séráfù,|Ẹ j'arọwa ẹ ma w'ẹyin,|Lọ wo Isaiah ori ọgọta,|Ẹsẹ kini ati keji.
Ẹyin ero iworan ati ẹni joko,|Bi'dajọ ba ọ nin' ẹsẹ nkọ?|Ẹ wa si imọlẹ ninu Ijọ Séráfù,|Kẹ ba le jẹni 'tẹwọgba
Gbogbo Ọmọ Ijọ t'o s'olotito,|Ade ogo ti wa fun yin,|Bohubiea Aleakutatabb,|Ko ni jẹ ki gbogbo wa segbe.
Ẹyin agan to wa ninu Ijọ,|Ẹ mura si 'gbagbọ,|Ki ẹ le ni ọmọ bi Samuẹli,|Lọdọ Olodumare.
Ẹyin Alamọdi to wa nin' Ẹgbẹ,|Ẹyin yoo si ri 'wosan gba,|Lat'ọdọ onisegun Jerusalẹmu|Ẹ o ri imularada.
Ẹyin ti ẹ ko ti ri'sẹ se,|Jehofa Jireh yoo pese,|Isẹ rere fun itẹlọrun yin,|Ẹ o si ri 'tunu gba.
Ogo ni fun Baba loke,|Ogo ni fun Ọmọ,|Ogo ni fun Ẹmi-Mimọ,|Mẹtalọkan lailai.
chorus: Saanu fun wa, Gbadura wa,|Ji ọkan ti n togbe kuro nin'ẹsẹ (2ce)

english.title: COME SAVE US OH LORD ON THE JUDGEMENT DAY, THAT WE MAY BE ACCEPTABLE
english.description: H.C 177 T.S 43 P.M (FE 74) Tune: 236
stanzas: Come save us oh Lord On the judgement day|That we may be acceptable|Be of help to us May we be accepted|By water of life provided.
Beam Thy divine light on us today Lord|Enlighten the unsighted|By Christ Jesus' side, many rooms avail|Yield no further excuse.
Ye Muslim and all ye pagans on earth|Come hark ye this good tidings|The day of reckoning is cometh nigh|To render account of thine works.
Band of Cherubim and ye Seraphim|Slack not but preach the Gospel|As command in Isaiah Sixty|The first and the second verse.
All ye spectators and onlookers|Be ye not trapped in your sins|Come to divine light, amidst Seraph Band|That ye may be acceptable.
All ye righteous members of this fold|Crown of glory thou shall gain|Bohubiea Aleakutatabb|We shall ne‘er go perishing.
All ye the barren, found in this fold|Hold firmly forth to thine faith|That thou may be blessed with seeds like Samuel|As the divine gift of God.
All ye the stragglings found in this fold|Divine healing thou shall receive|From Great Physician of Jerusalem|Perfect healing thou shall receive.
All seekers of gainful employment|Jehovah Jireh shall provide|Gainful employment with satisfaction|And thou shall be comforted.
Glory be In Holy Father above|Glory be unto the Son|And glory be unto Holy Spirit|Holy Trinity eternal.
chorus: Thine mercies we plead, Hearken unto us|Awaken the fainting heart from sin (2ce)

verse: Come save us oh Lord On the judgement day
That we may be acceptable
Be of help to us May we be accepted
By water of life provided
chorus: Thine mercies we plead, Hearken unto us
Awaken the fainting heart from sin (2ce)

hymns.title: ỌBA TI KI YẸ MAJẸMU, F'ORE ỌFẸ RẸ FUN WA
hymns.description:
(FE 75) 
“Emi o si ba yin da majẹmu”  - Gen. 9:11
stanzas: ỌBA ti ki yẹ majẹmu,|F'ore ọfẹ Rẹ fun wa,|Majẹmu ti a ba Ọ da,|Ki awa ko le mu sẹ.
Ọba Mimọ Ọba Ogo,|'Wọ l'awa n fi iyin fun,|Kérúbù ati Séráfù,|S'ọpẹ ọdun titun yi.
Alaileso jẹ k'o s'eso,|Ninu ọdun t'a wa yi,|Alaigbagbọ jẹ ko gbagbọ,|Ki gbogbo wa di yiye.
Ọba Mimọ Jehofa NLA|Gb'ọpẹ Ajọdun wa yi,|Sẹri ibukun Rẹ sori,|Ọmọde at'agba wa.
Pese f'awọn alairise,|Pese ọmọ fun agan,|Fi ilera fun alaisan,|K'ọmọ Rẹ mase rahun
chorus: Nitori iku Messiah,|Jọwọ ko sanu fun wa,|Nitori iku Messiah,|Jọwọ ko sanu fun wa

english.title: O! GOD COVENANT FULFILLER THINE GRACE, UNTO US BESTOW
stanzas: O! GOD covenant fulfiller|Thine grace, unto us bestow|The covenant we made with Thee|Enable us to redeem.
Holy Father, King of glory|Thou our honour, praise we give|Cherubim and the Seraphim|Thank Thee now and ages past.
Bless the womb of all the barren|This glorious year Lord we plead|Strengthen faith of the unfaithful|Thine salvation we may gain.
Holy Father, great Jehovah|Our offerings Father receive|Rain on us Thine heav‘nly blessings|All the old and all the young.
Provide, Lord unto the needies|Glorious kids for the barren|Divine healing give to the sick|May we never be in want.
Divine strength endue on Seraph|To worship Thee to the end|May our deeds here on earth below|Before Thee, ne'er be in vain.
chorus: For the sake of Messiah's death|Lord Thy Mercies all we plead|For the sake of Messiah's death|Lord Thy Mercies all we plead.

verse: O GOD covenant fulfiller
Thine grace unto us bestow
The covenant we made with Thee
Enable us to redeem
chorus: For the sake of Messiah's death
Lord Thy Mercies all we plead
For the sake of Messiah's death
Lord Thy Mercies all we plead

syllable: Ọ o BA ti ki yẹ ma jẹ e mu,
F'o re ọ fẹ Rẹ fun wa,
Ma a jẹ mu u ti a ba Ọ da,
Ki a wa ko le mu sẹ.
Ni to ri i ku Mes si a ah,
Jọ wọ ko sa nu fun wa,
Ni to ri i ku Mes si a ah,
Jọ wọ ko sa nu fun wa

hymns.title: IRAPADA; ITAN IYANU NI AYỌ FUN 'WỌ AT'EMI
hymns.description:
SS&S 16 (FE 76) 
“Emi si wi pé, Iwọ o pe mi ni Baba 
mi” - Jer. 3:19
stanzas: IRAPADA; itan iyanu|Ni ayọ fun 'wọ at'emi|Pe Jesu ti ra idariji,|O san gbese na lori 'gi
Gbani Ọlọrun nisinsinyi|Sẹgun agbar'ẹsẹ fun wa|'Tori oun yoo gba ẹni to wa|Ki yoo si ta ọ nu lailai
Ẹsẹ ki yoo tun lagbara mọ,|Bi ko tilẹ ye dan wa wo,|Nipa isẹ 'rapada Kristi|Agbara ẹsẹ yoo parun.
O mu wa lat'iku bọ si iye,|O si sọ wa d'ọm'Ọlọrun,|Orisun kan si fun ẹlẹsẹ,|Wẹ nin'ẹjẹ na ko si mọ.
Gba anu t'Ọlọrun fi lọ ọ,|Sa wa sọdọ Jesu loni,|'Tori yo gb'ẹni to ba tọ wa,|Ki yoo si pada lailai
chorus: A! 'wọ ẹlẹsẹ gba eyi gbọ|Gba ihin otitọ naa gbọ|Gbẹkẹ l'ẹni to ku lori 'gi,|To mu igbala wa fun ọ.

english.title: REDEMPTION! OH, WONDERFUL STORY, GLAD MESSAGE FOR YOU AND FOR ME
stanzas: REDEMPTION! oh, wonderful story|Glad message for you and for me|That Jesus has purchased our pardon|And paid all the debt on the tree.
Give us redemption Oh Lord our God|Deliver us from all our sins|For you are God of redemption|Thou shall not forsake us at all.
No longer shall sin have dominion|Though present to temp and annoy|For Christ, in His blessed redemption|The power of sin shall He destroy.
From death unto life He hath brought us|And made us by grace sons of God|A fountain is opened for sinners|Oh, wash and be cleans’d in the blood.
Accept now God’s offer of mercy|To Jesus, oh, hasten today|For He will receive him that cometh|And never will turn him away.
chorus: Believe it, O sinner, believe it,|Receive the glad message-tis true|Trust now in the crucified Saviour|Salvation He offers to you.

verse: REDEMPTION oh wonderful story
Glad message for you and for me
That Jesus has purchased our pardon
And paid all the debt on the tree
chorus: Believe it O sinner believe it
Receive the glad message-tis true
Trust now in the crucified Saviour
Salvation He offers to you

syllable: I RA PA DA; i tan i ya nu
Ni a yọ fun 'wọ a t'e mi
Pe Je su ti ra i da ri ji,
O san gbe se na lo ri 'gi
A! 'wọ ẹ lẹ sẹ gba e yi i gbọ
Gba i hin o ti tọ naa gbọ
Gbẹ kẹ l'ẹ ni to ku lo ri 'gi,
To mu i gba la wa fun ọ.

hymns.title: AWA IJỌ KÉRÚBÙ, ATI SÉRÁFÙ LAYÉ
hymns.description:
C.H.C. 151 6. 7.s.      (FE 77) 
Ohun orin:- “Apata Ayeraye (271)”
stanzas: AWA Ijọ Kérúbù,|Ati Séráfù layé|Awa mbẹbẹ fun 'ranwọ|Agbara Ẹmi Mimọ
Ki fitila Rẹ ma ku|Ninu Ijọ Séráfù|Ki gbogbo isesi wa|Fi wa han bi ọmọ Rẹ.
Mase ta wa nu kuro|Iwọ Olugbala wa|K'awa ma ba sako lọ,|Mu wa rin ọna tire.
Jehovah Jire Baba,|Pese f'awọn alaini,|At'awọn ti ko ri se,|Ma sai ranti wọn loni.
Ẹsẹ wa ti papọ ju,|Bi yanrin eti okun,|Awa n fẹ 'mularada,|Iwẹnumo ẹsẹ wa.
Jehovah Emmanueli|Iwọ ni ireti wa,|Mase jẹ koju tiwa|L'ọjọ nla ọjọ 'dajọ.
Ọdaguntan Ọlọrun,|Baba at'Ẹmi Mimọ,|Wẹ wa mọ patapata,|Ko to kuro layé yi.
chorus: A! Baba sanu fun wa|Ko dari ẹsẹ ji wa.

english.title: ALL WE BAND OF CHERUBIM, AND UNIVERSAL SERAPH
english.description:
6.7s (FE 77)
Tune: “Apata Ayeraiye (271)"
stanzas: ALL WE Band of Cherubim|And universal Seraph|Divine help, all that we plead|And the power of Holy Ghost.
Lest Thine fire extinguish|Amidst Band of Seraphim|Let our characters reveal|We all as Thine divine sons
Father cast us not away|Thou O! our Saviour divine|Lest we all go hence astray|Make us tread Thine Holy Way
Father Jehovah Jireh|For our needs Father provide|And for the paupers we plead|Father care for all they need.
Our sins are so much and great|Much as the sand of the sea|Divine healing we desire|Total cleansing from our sins.
Jehovah Emmanuel|Solely on Thee rest our hope|Let not we be put to shame|On the great day of judgement.
Christ Jesus the Lamb of God|Father Son and Holy Ghost|Cleanse us thoroughly we plead|Before we depart this world.
chorus: Father Thine mercy we plead|All our sins Father forgive.

verse: ALL WE Band of Cherubim
And universal Seraph
Divine help all that we plead
And the power of Holy Ghost
chorus: Father Thine mercy we plead
All our sins Father forgive

hymns.title: BABA WA TI MBẸ L'ỌRUN, ỌWỌ FORUKỌ RẸ
hymns.description:
t.SS&S 680   7Ss.   6s.     
(FE 78) 
Ohun orin:- “Duro, duro fun Jesu” (575)
stanzas: BABA wa ti mbẹ l'ọrun,|Ọwọ forukọ Rẹ,|Ifẹ tirẹ ni ka se|Bi wọn ti n se lọrun,|Fun wa l'Ounjẹ ojọ wa|'Dari ẹsẹ ji wa,|Gba wa lọwọ idanwo,|Gba wa lọwọ ewu.
Iwọ to gbọ t'Elijah|L'ẹba odo Kedron|Iwọ to gbọ ti Daniel,|Ko gbọ ti wa loni,|Fun wa niru agbara|To fi f'awọn Apostle|K'awa le wulo fun Ọ|Ka jere bi ti wọn.
Fun wa lọkan igbagbọ|Ti ki y'o yẹ lailai,|Ka gbẹkẹle Ọ titi,|A o fi r'oju Rẹ,|Jẹ ka le ni ireti,|Ninu Iwọ nikan,|Ka nifẹ s'ẹnikeji,|Ka si n'iwa pẹlẹ.
Baba a si tun mbẹ Ọ,|Ani fun Olori wa,|Ko fi Ẹmi meje Rẹ,|Se 'tura f'ọkan rẹ,|Jẹ ki awa le ma rin|Lọna to n tọ wa si,|Ko le ko wa de Canaan|Niwaju Itẹ Rẹ.
Iwọ to gbọ ti Sedrak,|Mesak, Abednego|Gbọ t'awa Ẹgbẹ Seraf',|Gba t'a ba n ke pe Ọ|Fi agbara Rẹ wọ wa|Bi ti wolii isaju|Ka ni 'gboya bi tiwọn,|Ka sẹgun ayé yi.
Awọn ọmọ Israel,|Ninu rin ajo wọn,|Iwọ lo n s'amọna wọn,|Ati abo fun wọn|Bi wọn ti n dẹsẹ si Ọ,|Bẹẹ lo n dariji wọn,|Jọwọ ko dariji wa,|Awa Ẹgbẹ Séráfù.
Ọlọrun Abrahamu,|Ọlọrun Isaaki,|Ati Ọlọrun Jakọbu,|Awa f'ọpẹ fun Ọ,|Ogo, iyin, ọlanla|S'Ẹni Mẹtalọkan,|Halleluyah s'Ọlọrun,|Ayé ainipẹkun

english.title: FATHER WHICH ART IN HEAVEN, HALLOWETH BE THY NAME
english.description: 7s 6s (FE 78)
stanzas: FATHER which art in heaven|Halloweth be Thy name|Thine will be done here on earth|As be it in heaven|Give us Lord our daily bread|Forgive us all our debts|Lead us not to temptation|Keep us from all evil.

Thou hearkened to Elijah|A bank river Cedron|Thou who hearkened to Daniel|Oh God today hear us|Give us the Holy Spirit|As once Thou gavest the Apostles|Glorious vessels we may be|Reward as they of Old.

The faithful heart we plead Thee|That ever waiver not|For us to ever trust Thee|Till we shall meet with Thee|Re‐assuring hope we plead|In Thee and not in any|Beaming love to our brethren|Humbly and peacefully.

Further we plead our father|For all Thine anointed|Thine Holy Spirit endow|Upon their humble heart|Give us the grace that we may|Walk in the way Thou lead us|To Cannan destination|Before Thine throne Oh God.

Thou who hearkened to Shadrach|Meshach, Abednego|Hearken to Band of Seraph|When unto Thee we call|Endow us with Thine Spirit|Like unto early prophets|That we may be brave as them|To us victory on earth.

In the wilderness journey|Of kindred of Israel|Thou compasseth them all through|And Thou protected them|Though they transgresseth on Thee|Thou forgiveth them always|Thine forgiveness Lord we plead|We band of Seraphim.
O! Lord God of Abraham|O! Lord God of Isaac|And the Lord God of Jacob|We offer thanks to Thee|Glory, Honour and praises|To Holy Trinity|Halleluyah to our God|For ever shall endure.

verse: FATHER which art in heaven
Halloweth be Thy name
Thine will be done here on earth
As be it in heaven
Give us Lord our daily bread
Forgive us all our debts
Lead us not to temptation
Keep us from all evil

hymns.title: OLUWA MI, MO N KE PE Ọ, N Ó KU B'O KO RAN MI LỌWỌ
stanzas: OLUWA mi, mo n ke pe Ọ,|N ó ku b'O ko ran mi lọwọ;|Jọ fi igbala Rẹ fun mi,|Gba mi bi mo ti ri.
Emi kun fun ẹsẹ pupọ,|O ta'jẹ Rẹ lẹ fun mi,|O le se mi bi O ba ti fẹ,|Gba mi bi mo ti ri.
Ko si'lẹ ti mo le pamọ,|N ó ko le duro ti 'pinnu mi,|Sibẹ 'tori Tirẹ gba mi,|Gba mi bi mo ti ri.
Wo mi! mo wolẹ l'ẹsẹ Rẹ,|Se mi bi o ba ti tọ si,|Bẹrẹ 'sẹ Rẹ si pari rẹ,|Gba mi bi mo ti ri.
chorus: Gba mi bi mo ti ri (2ce)|Kristi ku fun mi l'ẹbẹ mi,|Gba mi bi mo ti ri.

english.title: JESUS, MY LORD TO THEE I CRY, UNLESS THOU HELP ME, I MUST DIE
english.description:
(FE 79) PM
"Lord is nigh unto them that call upon Him
He will hear their cry and save them"
- Ps. 145:18-19
stanzas: JESUS, my Lord to Thee I cry|Unless Thou help me, I must die|Oh! bring thy free salvation nigh|And take me as I am!
Helpless I am, and full of guilt:|But yet for me thy blood was spilt,|And Thou cans’t make me what Thou wilt|And take me as I am!
No preparation can I make,|My best resolves I only break|Yet save me for thine own name's sake|And take me as I am!
Behold me Saviour at Thy feet|Deal with me as Thou seest meet|Thy work begun|Thy work complete|But take me as I am!
chorus: And take me as I am (2ce)|My only plea Christ died for me|Oh take me as I am!

verse: JESUS my Lord to Thee I cry
Unless Thou help me I must die
Oh bring thy free salvation nigh
And take me as I am
chorus: And take me as I am (2ce)
My only plea Christ died for me
Oh take me as I am

hymns.title: BABA JỌ GBỌ TEMI, MO WOLẸ LẸSẸ RẸ
hymns.description:
SM (FE 80) 
“Da mi lohun nigba ti mo ba n pe”
stanzas: Baba jọ gbọ temi,|Mo wolẹ lẹsẹ Rẹ,|'Wọ to n wosan to n dariji,|Jọwọ gbadura wa.
Ọlọrun Oluwa,|Jehofa Ọba mi,|'Wọ to tẹdo sinu 'mọle,|A juba O'okọ Rẹ.
Tani Ọba ti ayé?|Jesu Emmanuel,|Gbongbo Jesse Ẹni 'Yanu|Ran 'ranwọ Rẹ si mi
Mimọ Mimọ julọ,|Ọba Olugbala,|Alagbara ninu ọrun,|Ranti majẹmu Rẹ.
Lowurọ gbọ temi,|Lọsan gbọ ẹbẹ mi,|Loju alẹ gbat'orun wọ,|Jọwọ gbọ ẹbẹ mi.
Ogo fun Baba wa,|Ogo fun Ọmọ Rẹ,|Ogo fun Ẹmi Mimọ,|Mẹtalọkan lailai.

english.title: FATHER HARK UNTO ME, MY KNEES BENT DOWN TO THEE
english.description: SM(FE 80)
stanzas: FATHER hark unto me|My knees bent down to Thee|Thou who doth heal and who forgives|Please hearken to our pray’rs.
O God Almighty, Lord|Jehovah and my King|Thou who abides in brightest light|Thy holy name revered.
Who art the earthly King,|Jesus Emmanuel|Wonderful Lord of Jesse's root|Send forth Thy help to me.
Holy, Holy, Most High|The King and Saviour Lord|Great Omnipotent high above|Thy covenant fulfil.
In the morn hark to me|At noon, my pray’rs attend|At dusk ere the sun yet is set|Hark Lord unto my pray‘rs.
Glory to Father, God|Glory be to the Son|Glory be to the Holy Ghost|Eternal Trinity.

verse: FATHER hark unto me
My knees bent down to Thee
Thou who doth heal and who forgives
Please hearken to our pray’rs

syllable: Ba ba jọ o gbọ temi,
Mo wo o lẹ e lẹ sẹ Rẹ,
'Wọ to n wo o san ton da a ri i ji,
Jọ wọ gba du ra wa.

hymns.title: A DE O, BABA MIMỌ, K'O WA GBA WA O, A DE O, ỌMỌ MIMỌ, K'O WA GBA WA O
ẸLẸSẸ WA S'ORISUN NA, WA PẸLU 'BANUJẸ RẸ
hymns.description:
SS&S 352 (FE 83) 
“Wa si orisun na”. - Ps. 36:9
stanzas: ẸLẸSẸ wa s'orisun na,|Wa pẹlu 'banujẹ rẹ,|Ri wọn sinu omi jijin,|'Wọ y'o r'irọrun nibẹ.
Wa t'iwọ t'ẹru ẹsẹ rẹ,|Jesu ti n duro de ọ;|B'ẹsẹ rẹ pọn bi alari,|Wọn yoo funfun bi sino.
Jesu Olugbala wi pé,|Awọn ti o ba gbagbọ;|Ti wọn si ronupiwada,|Y'o r'iye gba lọdọ Rẹ.
Wa wẹ ninu orisun naa,|F'eti si ohun ifẹ;|Jẹ ki awọn Angẹli yọ,|F'ẹlẹsẹ to yi pada
chorus: Yara kalọ, mase duro,|Isẹju kan le sọ ẹmi rẹ nu,|Jesu n duro lati gba ọ,|Anu mbẹ fun ọ loni.

english.title: COME WITH THY SINS TO THE FOUNTAIN, COME WITH THY BURDEN OF GRIEF
english.description:
8S 7S (FE 83)
“For with thee is the fountain of life"
stanzas: COME With thy sins to the fountain|Come with thy burden of grief;|Bury them deep in this waters;|There thou wilt find a relief.
Come as thou art to the fountain|Jesus is waiting for thee;|What tho’ thy sin be like crimson?|White as the snow they shall be!
These are the words of the Saviour,|They who repent and believe|They who are willing to trust Him|Life at His hands shall receive.
Come and be healed at the fountain|List'en to the peace speaking voice|Over a sinner returning,|Now let the Angels rejoice!
chorus: Haste thou away! Why wilt thou stay?|Risk not thy soul on a moments delay|Jesus is waiting to save thee|Mercy is pleading today.

verse: COME With thy sins to the fountain
Come with thy burden of grief
Bury them deep in this waters
There thou wilt find a relief
chorus: Haste thou away Why wilt thou stay
Risk not thy soul on a moments delay
Jesus is waiting to save thee
Mercy is pleading today

syllable: Ẹ LẸ SẸ wa a s'o ri sun na,
Wa pẹ lu 'ba nu jẹ rẹ,
Ri wọn si nu u o mi ji jin,
'Wọ y'o r'i rọ run ni bẹ.
Ya ra ka lọ, ma se du ro,
I sẹ ju kan le sọ ẹ mi rẹ nu,
Je su ndu ro o la ti gba ọ,
A nu mbẹ fun ọ lo ni.

hymns.title: IGBALA NI, IGBALA NI, AWA ẸLẸSẸ N FẸ
hymns.description:
CMS 580 0.t.H.C.   152 C.M 
(FE 84) 
“Kini ki emi ki o se lati la?” - Ise. 16:30
stanzas: IGBALA ni, igbala ni,|Awa ẹlẹsẹ n fẹ;|Nitori ninu buburu|T'a se l'awa n segbe.
Isẹ ọwọ wa ti a n se,|O n wi nigba gbogbo,|Pe, igbala ko si nibẹ|Isẹ ko le gba ni.
Awa n sẹbọ, awa n rubọ,|A n kọrin, a si n jo;|Sugbọn a ko ri igbala,|Ninu gbogbo wọnyi.
Nibo ni igbala gbe wa?|Fi han ni, fi han ni;|B'o wa loke, bi isalẹ,|B'o ba mọ, wi fun wa.
Jesu ni se Olugbala,|Jesu l'Oluwa wa;|Igbala wa ni ọwọ Rẹ;|Fun awa ẹlẹsẹ.
Wa nisinsin yii, wa tọrọ,|Ifẹ wa ninu Rẹ;|Ẹyin ti o buru l'O n pe;|Ẹ wa gba igbala.

english.title: SALVATION THOUGH, SALVATION THOUGH, THE SINNER DOTH DESIRE
english.description: O.t. H.C 152 C.M (FE 84)
stanzas: SALVATION though, Salvation though|The sinner doth desire|From all the evil of our heart|We’re condemned and perish.
The sinful acts we perpetrate|Speaks audibly always|No salvation is found there of|Salvation nay of work.
We sacrifice and still appease|We sing and still we danced|But no salvation there is found|In all but all in vain.
Where else can salvation be found|Reveal Reveal to us|Above the sky beneath the sea|Reveal though if you know.
Christ Jesus is Saviour divine|Christ Jesus is our Lord|Upon His hand salvation lie|For unto us sinners.
Draw nigh to Him with your requests|Whole love is found in Him|Foulest sinners like thou He calls|Salvation come receive.

verse: SALVATION though Salvation though
The sinner doth desire
From all the evil of our heart
We’re condemned and perish

hymns.title: JESU ỌBA OGO DARIJI WA, WO WA SAN NINU ARUN ẸSẸ GBOGBO
hymns.description:
(FE 85) 
“Ọba Oludariji, dariji wa.”
stanzas: JESU Ọba ogo dariji wa,|Wo wa san ninu arun ẹsẹ gbogbo;|'Wọ to wo awọn adẹtẹ 'gbani san,|Jọwọ masai wo aisan wa gbogbo san
2. Ọlọrun Abram ati Isaaki,|Ọlọrun Jakob jọwọ dabo bo wa,|Jọwọ mu ọna wa tọ niwaju Rẹ,|Ko si ranti gbogbo wa si rere.
Iwọ to wa pẹlu Sedrak, Mesak,|Abẹdnigo ninu ina ileru,|Jọwọ yọ wa ninu ina idẹkun esu,|Ka le b'awọn Angẹl kọrin loke.
Ogo fun Baba, Ọmọ at'Ẹmi,|To da ẹmi wa si di ọjọ oni,|Jọwọ ran oluranlọwọ Rẹ si wa,|Ki 'sẹgun jẹ tiwa lat'oni lọ.
chorus: Wọle, wọle, wọle w'ọdọ Jesu,|Wọle wa, wọle, iwọ yoo gb'ade,|A mọ daju p'awa yoo de Kenani|Nibi ti Baba wa ti pese fun wa.

english.title: JESUS THE KING OF GLORY FORGIVE US, WASH THE ILLS OF SINS AWAY
english.description:
(FE 85)
"King of Forgiveness, forgive us The
forgiving King, Forgive us"
stanzas: JESUS the King of glory forgive us|Wash the ills of sins away|You who washed and cleanse the lepers of old|Please don't hesitate to wash us from our ailments.
God of Abraham and the God of Isaac|Oh God of Jacob please protect us|Please make our paths straight and right in thy presence|And remember us all for good.
You who were with Shadrach and with Meschach,|Abednego in the ashless fire|Please deliver us from the traps of satan|So we could sing with the angels on high.
Glory be to the Father, Son and the Spirit|Who spared our lives till today|Please send to us thy own helping hand|Victory for us from today.
chorus: Enter, enter unto Jesus|Enter in, enter you would wear the crown|We know for sure we would get to Canaan|A place that our Father had prepared for us.

verse: JESUS the King of glory forgive us
Wash the ills of sins away
You who washed and cleanse the lepers of old
Please don't hesitate to wash us from our ailments
chorus: Enter enter unto Jesus
Enter in enter you would wear the crown
We know for sure we would get to Canaan
A place that our Father had prepared for us

hymns.title: N O KỌRIN TI OLUDANDE MI, ATI IFẸ IYANU RẸ
hymns.description:
SS&S 896 (FE 86) 
“Oluwa apata mi ati Oludande mi.
stanzas: N O kọrin ti Oludande mi|Ati ifẹ iyanu Rẹ,|O jiya lori'gi oro,|Lati sọ mi dom'nira.
Emi o sọ'tan iyanu Rẹ,|B'o ti gbohun mi to ni,|Nu'fẹ at'anu ailopin|Fi 'dande fun mi lọfẹ
N ó y'Oludande mi ọwọn,|N ó r'agbara sẹgun Rẹ,|B'o ti fun mi ni isẹgun,|Lor'ẹsẹ at'iparun.
N ó kọrin t'Oludande mi;|T'ifẹ at'ọrun wa Rẹ,|O mu mi lat'iku si'ye,|Lati ba ọm'Ọlọrun gbe.
chorus: Kọrin ti - Oludande mi,|Ẹjẹ Rẹ l'o fi ra mi|O f'ọtẹ rẹ - dariji mi,|O sanwo - mo dom'nira.

english.title: I WILL SING OF MY REDEEMER, AND HIS WONDROUS LOVE TO ME
english.description:
S.S 896 (FE 86)
“O Lord my strength and my redeemer"
- Ps. 19:14
stanzas: I WILL sing of my Redeemer|And his wondrous love to me|On the cruel cross he suffered|From the cross to set me free.
I will tell the wonderous story,|How my lost estate to save|In the boundless love and mercy|He the ransom freely gave.
I will praise my dear redeemer|His triumphant power I‘ll tell;|How the victory He hath given|Over sin, and death, and hell.
I will sing of my Redeemer,|And his heavenly love to me;|He from death to life hath brought him|Son of God, with Him to be.
chorus: Sing, Oh sing of my Re-dee-mer|With his blood He purchased me!|On the cross, He sealed my pardon,|Paid the debt, And made me free.

verse: I WILL sing of my Redeemer
And his wondrous love to me
On the cruel cross he suffered
From the cross to set me free
chorus: Sing Oh sing of my Re-dee-mer
With his blood He purchased me
On the cross He sealed my pardon
Paid the debt And made me free

hymns.title: 'RAPADA LỌWỌ 'KU OUN ẸSẸ, IRAPADA N'ILE L'ODE
hymns.description:
SS&S 211 (FE 87) 
“A ra mi pada.” - Ps. 103:4
stanzas: 'RAPADA lọwọ 'ku oun ẹsẹ,|Irapada n'ile l'ode,|'Mọlẹ titun wo ló tó yii!|Ogo wo lo tan s'ọkan wa.
f Ogo f'ẹni t'a o le mọ'fẹ Rẹ,|To tan 'mọlẹ s'ọna eniyan,|B'itansan 'Rawọ titun n yọ,|A gbe 'rin titun 'rapada.
mf Bi'gbi okun ti n ru soke,|Bẹẹ ni gb'orin ayọ yoo dun|Ifẹ Jesu jijin b'okun|Yoo k'ẹni 'rapada wa yẹ.
f Irapada! gbogbo ẹda,|Yo f'ayọ m'ọrẹ f'Ọba wa|Irapada! gbogbo ayé,|Yo d'ohun po kọrin iyin Rẹ
chorus: Irapada! l'orin mi yoo jẹ,|Titi ayé ainipẹkun|Jẹ k'ẹni 'rapada k'o kọ|Orin iyin si Kristi Ọba.

english.title: REDEEM’D FROM DEATH, REDEEM’D FROM SIN, REDEEM'D FROM ILLS WITHOUT, WITHIN
english.description:
S.S. 211 (FE 87)
“Sing aloud unto God our strength" - Ps. 81:1
stanzas: REDEEM’D from death, Redeem’d from sin|Redeem'd from ills without, within|Redeem'd what new light gilds the skies!|What glories on the soul arise.
Glory to Him, whose love unknown|Touch'd man’s a-byss from heaven's high throne|Like some new star its radiance beamed.|A new song rose - Redeemed!
As ocean's billows swell and break,|The mighty tide of praise shall wake;|Thy love Lord, like th’unfathomed sea|Shall wharf a world redeemed to thee.
Redeemed! creation joyful brings|Its tribute to the King of Kings|Redeemed! earth‘s million voices raise|One sounding anthem to His praise.
chorus: Redeem’d Redeem'd my song shall be|Through time and through eterninty|Redeem'd! let all the ransom’d sing|Eternal praise-to Christ our King!

verse: REDEEM’D from death Redeem’d from sin
Redeem'd from ills without within
Redeem'd what new light gilds the skies
What glories on the soul arise
chorus: Redeem’d Redeem'd my song shall be
Through time and through eterninty
Redeem'd let all the ransom’d sing
Eternal praise-to Christ our King

syllable: 'RA PA A DA lọ, wọ 'ku oun ẹ sẹ,
I ra a pa da, n'i le e l'o de,
'Mọ lẹ e ti tun, wo ló o tó yii!
O go o wo lo, tan s'ọ o kan wa.
I ra a pa da! (I ra a pa da, I ra pa da),
l'o rin mi yoo jẹ (l'o rin mi yoo jẹ),
Ti ti i a yé (Ti ti a yé),
ai ni i pẹ kun (ai ni pẹ kun),
Jẹ k'ẹ e ni 'ra (Jẹ k'ẹ ni 'ra),
pa da a k'o kọ (pa da a k'o kọ),
O rin 'yin, si Krist Ọ ba (si Krist Ọ ba).

hymns.title: ẸLẸSẸ WA SỌDỌ JESU, FUN IGBALA RẸ LỌFẸ
hymns.description:
8.7. (FE 88) 
“Kiyesi Emi mbọ nisinsin yii.”
stanzas: ẸLẸSẸ wa sọdọ Jesu,|Fun igbala rẹ lọfẹ;|O n pe ọ ni ohun kẹlẹ,|Pe ọmọ ma sako mọ.
Ẹlẹsẹ wa sọdọ Jesu,|Loni lọjọ igbala,|Yara ma si jẹ ko pẹ ju,|Iye mbẹ fun ọ loni
Séráfù damure giri,|Kérúbù ma jafara,|mp Ọpọ ọkan ti segbe lọ,|Wa, ẹ wa s'agbo jesu.
Jesu Olori Ẹgbẹ wa,|Ifẹ Rẹ ti sọwọn to,|Ti O da Ẹgbẹ yi silẹ;|Pe k'a le ri igbala.
Ajẹ n yọnu, oso ń yọnu,|Wa sabẹ abo Jesu,|Ohun ibi t'o wu k'o jẹ,|Wa si Ẹgbẹ Séráfù.
Ẹlẹsẹ ronupiwada,|Ki akoko to kọja,|Ki Mẹtalọkan to pe ọ,|Pe wa siro isẹ rẹ.
Ka le gbọ nikẹyin ọjọ,|Pe o se ọmọ rere,|Kérúbù pẹlu Séráfù,|Bọ s'ayọ Oluwa rẹ.
Orin halle Halleluya,|L'a o kọ ni'tẹ Baba,|'Wọ n'iyin at'ọpẹ yẹ fun,|Tit'ayé ainipẹkun.
chorus: Ki l'a o ro? Ki l'a o sọ?|'Gba ti Baba ba n pe wa,|Pe ọmọ siwọ ko ma bọ,|Wa jihin isẹ rẹ o.

english.title: SINNERS DRAW YE NIGH TO JESUS, FOR FREE SALVATION TO THEE
stanzas: SINNERS draw ye nigh to Jesus|For free Salvation to Thee|In his lowly voice is calling|Thee home to stray never more.
Sinners draw ye nigh to Jesus|Today thy Salvation day|Haste on never never delay|Salvation is now for thee.
Cherubim fasten your girdles|Seraphim never delay|Many souls are now perishng|Come Oh! come to Jesus fold.
Jesus Christ the Head of our band|Oh! how dear and dear Thy love|For Cherubim, Seraphim Band|That Salvation we may gain.
Witches raging wizards chasing|Come to Jesus for refuge|How serious your troubles may be|Come ye to the Cherubim.
Repent now Oh all ye sinners|Now before the time is past|Hey! the Trinity is calling|Come now give thy stewardship.
That on judgement day we may hear,|Well done oh my faithful son,|Cherubim and ye Seraphim,|Proudly share thy Father‘s joy.
Songs of Halle, Halle, Halleluyah|Shall we sing before Thy Throne|Thine glory, honour and power be|Ever till eternity.
chorus: O what account shall we render|When our Father clarion call sound|That my son its time to come home|Give account of stewardship.

verse: SINNERS draw ye nigh to Jesus
For free Salvation to Thee
In his lowly voice is calling
Thee home to stray never more
chorus: O what account shall we render
When our Father clarion call sound
That my son its time to come home
Give account of stewardship

syllable: Ẹ LẸ SẸ wa sọ dọ Je su,
Fun i gba la rẹ lọ fẹ;
On pe ọ ni o hun kẹ lẹ,
Pe ọ mọ ma sa ko mọ.
Ki l'a o ro? Ki l'a o o sọ?
'Gba ti Ba ba ban pe wa,
Pe ọ mọ si wọ ko ma bọ,
Wa ji hin i sẹ rẹ o.

hymns.title: GBANGBA L'OJU RẸ ỌLỌRUN, SOHUN GBOGBO TA N SE
hymns.description:
CM FE (AF 906) 
“Oluwa saanu fun mi” - Ps. 123:3
stanzas: GBANGBA l'oju Rẹ Ọlọrun,|Sohun gbogbo ta n se;|T'ọsan t'oru bakan naa ni,|Loju Oluwa wa.
Ko s'ẹsẹ kan ti a le da,|Ko s'ọrọ t'a le sọ;|Ti ko si ninu iwe Rẹ,|Fun iranti gbogbo.
Ẹsẹ ole, ẹsẹ irọ,|Ẹsẹ aiforiji;|Ẹsẹ ka sọrọ ẹni lẹhin,|Baba dariji wa.
Ẹsẹ igberaga ọkan,|Ẹsẹ isọkusọ;|Ẹsẹ aini 'gbagbọ daju,|Baba dariji wa.
A! l'ọjọ nla ọjọ 'dajọ,|Ma jẹ k'oju tiwa;|T'oju gbogbo ayé yoo pe,|Baba dariji wa.
Dariji mi Ọlọrun mi,|Ki n to lọ layé yi;|Si pa gbogbo ẹsẹ mi rẹ,|Baba dariji mi.

english.title: PLAINLY BEFORE THY FACE OUR GOD, IS EVERYTHING WE DO
english.description: C.M
stanzas: PLAINLY before thy face our God|is everything we do|The day the night same before Thee|Good Lord deliver us.
No sin is ever hid from Thee|No word thou never heard|All ever written in thy book|For ever knowledge be.
No robbery done, no falsehood told|No pride no backbiting|No idle word not recorded|Good Lord forgive our sins.
From day to day thy word we heard|Thy love, thy cares, we know|Yet stubborn faithless here we be|Good Lord deliver us.
Oh! when we hear the last blast given|And homeward call is made|Straight to the judgement throne above|Good Lord deliver us.
Forgive me Lord forgive my sin|While yet my life is given|And all my sin thy blood remove|Good Lord forgive my sins.

hymns.title: ỌBA AWỌN ẸNI MIMỌ T'O MỌ 'YE AWỌN 'RAWỌ
hymns.description:
CMS 419    HC 416    (FE 89) 
“Oluwa mọ awọn ti se Tirẹ” - II Tim. 1:19
stanzas: ỌBA awọn ẹni mimọ|T'o mọ 'ye awọn 'rawọ;|Ọpọ ẹni t'Ẹda gbagbe,|Wa yika itẹ Rẹ lai.
Ẹni t'o wa ninu 'mọlẹ,|T'oju ẹnikan ko ri;|Mose ri akẹyinsi Rẹ,|Oju Mose ran b'orun.
'Mọlẹ ti 'kuku ayé bo,|N tan 'mọlẹ roro loke;|Wọn jẹ ọmọ alade l'ọrun,|Ẹda gbagbe wọn l'ayé.
Lala at'iya wọn fun Ọ,|Ẹda ko royin rẹ mọ;|Iwa rere wọn farasin,|Oluwa nikan lo mọ.
Wọn farasin fun wa sugbọn,|A kọ wọn s'iwe iye,|Igbagbọ, adura, suuru,|Lala oun 'jakadi wọn.
Wọn mọ isura Rẹ lọhun,|Ka wa mọ wọn Oluwa;|Nigba t'O ba n siro ọsọ,|Ti mbẹ lara ade Rẹ.
Ẹ wolẹ f'Ọba Ologo,|Séráfù ẹ wolẹ fun|Niwaju itẹ Jehovah,|Ọlọrun Mẹtalọkan.
Ẹ wolẹ f'Ọba Ologo,|Kérúbù ẹ wolẹ fun;|Niwaju itẹ Jehovah,|Ọlọrun Mẹtalọkan
chorus: Mimọ Mimọ (3 times)|Lo ye Ọ,|Iwọ l'a ba ma f'iyin fun,|Ọlọrun, Edumare.

english.title: KING OF SAINTS, TO WHOM THE NUMBER, OF THY STARRY HOST IS KNOWN
english.description: 8S 7S (FE 89)
stanzas: KING of Saints, to whom the number|Of Thy Starry host is known|Many a name, by man forgotten|Lives forever round Thy throne.
Thou who art in the brightest light|Human eye can never scan|Thy back only shown to Moses|And his eyes like sun did shine.
Lights, which earth-born mists have darkened|There are shining full and clear|Princes in the court of heaven|Nameless, unremember‘d here
How they toil'd for Thee and suffer'd|None on earth can now record;|All their saintly life is hidden|In the Knowledge of their Lord.
All is veil’d from us, but written|In the Lamb's great book of life,|All the faith and prayer, and patience|All the toiling, and the strife.
There are told Thy hidden treasures|Number us, O Lord, with them|When Thou markest up the jewels|Of Thy living diadem
Kneel before the Glorious Father|Seraphim bend down for him|Before sacred Jehovah's Throne|Father God and Trinity.
Kneel before the Glorious Father|Cherubim bend down for him|Before sacred Jehovah‘s Throne|Father God and Trinity.
chorus: Holy, Holy (3 times)|be Thy name|To Thee all Honour and Glory|O Lord of Eternity.

verse: KING of Saints to whom the number
Of Thy Starry host is known
Many a name by man forgotten
Lives forever round Thy throne
chorus: Holy Holy (3 times)
be Thy name
To Thee all Honour and Glory
O Lord of Eternity

syllable: Ọ BA a wọn ẹ ni mi i mọ
T'o mọ 'ye a wọn 'ra wọ;
Ọ pọ ẹ ni t'Ẹ da gba a gbe,
Wa yi ka a i tẹ Rẹ lai.
Mi mọ Mi mọ, Mi mọ Mi i mọ,
Mi mọ Mi mọ, Lo ye Ọ,
I wọ l'a ba,  ma f'i yin i fun,
Ọ lọ o run E 'du ma re.

hymns.title: MIMỌ, MIMỌ, MIMỌ OLODUMARE, NI KUTUKUTU NI'WỌ O GBỌ ORIN WA
hymns.description:
CMS 280  HC 1  P.M.    
(FE 90) APA KINNI 
“Mimọ Mimọ Mimọ Olodumare” - Ifi. 4:8
stanzas: MIMỌ, Mimọ, Mimọ Olodumare,|Ni kutukutu ni'wọ o gbọ orin wa,|Mimọ, Mimọ, Mimọ! Oniyọnu julọ,|Ologo mẹta lai Olubukun.
Mimọ, Mimọ, Mimọ, awọn t'ọrun n yin,|Wọn n fi ade wura wọn lelẹ y'itẹ ka,|Kerubim Serafim n wolẹ niwaju Rẹ.|Wọ to ti wa to si wa titi lai.
Mimọ, Mimọ, Mimọ, B'okunkun pa ọ mọ,|Bi oju ẹlẹsẹ ko le ri ogo Rẹ,|Iwọ nikan lo mọ, ko tun si ẹlomi,|Pipe 'nu agbara ati n'ifẹ.
Mimọ, Mimọ, Mimọ, Olodumare,|Gbogbo isẹ Rẹ n'ilẹ l'oke lo n yin Ọ,|Mimọ, Mimọ, Mimọ, Oniyọnu julọ,|Ologo mẹta lai Olubukun.

english.title: HOLY, HOLY, HOLY! LORD GOD ALMIGHTY, EARLY IN THE MORNING OUR SONG SHALL RISE TO THEE
english.description:
PM (FE 90) - Part 1
“And they rest day nor night saying holy, holy,
holy Lord God ALMIGHTY" - Rev. 4:8
stanzas: HOLY, holy, holy! Lord God Almighty|Early in the morning our song shall rise to Thee|Holy, holy, holy! Merciful and Mighty|God in Three Persons, blessed Trinity.
Holy, holy, holy! all the saints adore Thee|Casting down their golden crowns around the glassy sea,|Cherubim & Seraphim falling down before Thee|Which wert, and art, and evermore shall be.
Holy, holy, holy! though the hardness hide Thee|Though the eyes of sinful man, Thy glory may not see|Only thou art holy: there is none beside Thee|Perfect in power, in love and purity.
Holy, holy, holy! Lord God Almighty|All Thy works shall praise Thy name, in earth, and sky and sea:|Holy, holy, holy! Merciful and Mighty,|God in Three Persons, Blessed Trinity.

verse: HOLY holy holy Lord God Almighty
Early in the morning our song shall rise to Thee
Holy holy holy Merciful and Mighty
God in Three Persons blessed Trinity

syllable: MI MỌ, Mi mọ, Mi mọ
O lo du ma a re,
Ni ku tu ku tu ni 'wọ o gbọ o rin wa a,
Mi mọ, Mi mọ, Mi mọ!
O ni yọ nu ju lọ,
O lo go mẹ ta lai O lu bu kun.

hymns.title: BABA NIWAJU ITẸ RẸ, L'ANGẸLI N TẸRIBA
hymns.description:
CMS 424   H.C. 418   D.C.M. 
(FE 91) 
“Awọn Angẹli si yi itẹ naa ka”. - Ifi. 7:11
stanzas: BABA niwaju itẹ Rẹ,|L'Angẹli n tẹriba,|Nigba gbogbo niwaju Rẹ,|Ni wọn n kọrin iyin,|Wọn si n fi ade wura wọn,|Lelẹ y'itẹ naa ka,|Wọn n fi ohun pẹlu duru,|Kọrin si Oluwa.
Didan osumare si n tan|Si ara iyẹ wọn,|Bi Seraf' ti n ke si Seraf',|Ti wọn kọrin 'yin Rẹ,|Bi a ti kunlẹ nihin yii,|Ran ore Rẹ si wa,|Ka mọ pe 'Wọ wa nitosi,|Lati da wa l'ohun.
Nihin nibi t'awọn Angẹli,|N wo wa, ba ti n sin Ọ,|Kọ wa k'a wa ile ọrun,|K'a sin Ọ bi ti wọn,|K'a ba wọn kọ orin iyin,|K'a ba wọn mọ 'fẹ Rẹ,|Titi agbara y'o fi di,|Tirẹ Tirẹ nikan.

english.title: FATHER, BEFORE THY THRONE OF LIGHT THE GUARDIAN ANGELS BEND
english.description:
H.C. 418 D.C.M (FE 91)
“All Angels fell before the throne and worship God" - Rev. 7:11
stanzas: FATHER, before thy throne of light|The guardian angels bend|And ever in thy presence bright|Their psalms adoring blend|And casting down each golden crown|Beside the crystal Sea|With voice and lyres in happy choir|Hymn glory, Lord to thee.

And as the rainbow, lustre fails|Athwart their glowing wing|While Seraph unto Seraph calls|And each thy goodness sings|Oh! may we feel, as low we kneel|To pray thee for thy grace|That thou art here for all who fear|The brightness of thy face.

Here where the Angels see us come|To worship day by day|Teach us to seek our heavenly home|And serve thee e'ven as they|With Cherubim and Seraphim|With them thy love to own|Till life’s first flower and fullness Power|Be Thine and Thine alone.

verse: FATHER before thy throne of light
The guardian angels bend
And ever in thy presence bright
Their psalms adoring blend
And casting down each golden crown
Beside the crystal Sea
With voice and lyres in happy choir
Hymn glory Lord to thee

syllable: BA BA ni wa ju i tẹ Rẹ,
L'An gẹ li ntẹ ri ba a,
Ni gba gbo gbo ni wa ju Rẹ,
Ni wọn nkọ o o rin i yin,
Wọn sin fi a a de wu ra wọn,
Le lẹ y'i tẹ naa ka,
Wọn nfi o hun pẹ lu du ru,
Kọ rin si i O lu wa a.

hymns.title: ẸMI ỌRUN GB'ADURA WA, WA GBE'NU ILE YI
hymns.description:
CMS 277   H.C. 255   C.M. (FE 92) 
“Ogo Oluwa si kun ile Ọlọrun”.  - II Kron. 5:14
stanzas: ẸMI Ọrun gb'adura wa,|Wa gbe'nu ile yi,|Sọkalẹ pẹl'agbara Rẹ,|Wa, Ẹmi Mimọ wa.
Wa bi 'mọlẹ si fi han wa,|B'aini wa ti pọ to,|Wa tọ wa si ọna iye,|Ti Olododo ń rin.
Wa bi ina ẹbọ Mimọ,|S'ọkan wa di mimọ,|Jẹ ki ọkan wa jẹ ọrẹ,|F'Orukọ Oluwa.
Wa bi iri si wa bukun,|Akoko mimọ yi,|Ki ọkan alaileso wa,|Le yọ l'agbara Rẹ.
Wa bi adaba n'apa Rẹ,|Apa ifẹ Mimọ,|Wa jẹ ki Ẹgbẹ yi l'ayé,|Dabi Ẹgbẹ t'ọrun.
Ẹmi ọrun gb'adura wa,|S'ayé yi d'ile Rẹ,|Sọkalẹ pẹl'agbara Rẹ,|Wa, Ẹmi Mimọ wa.

english.title: SPIRIT DIVINE ATTEND OUR PRAYERS AND, MAKE THIS HOUSE THY HOME
english.description:
H.C. 255 C.M. (FE 92)
"And they were all filled with Holy Ghost"
- Acts. 2:4
stanzas: SPIRIT Divine attend our prayers|And make this house Thy home|Descend with all Thy gracious power|Oh come, Great Spirit come.
Come as the light to us reveal|Our emptiness and woe|And lead us in those paths of life|Where all the righteous go.
Come as the fire and purge our heart|Like sacrificial flame|Let our whole soul an offering be|To our redeemer's name.
Come as the dew, and sweetly bless|This consecrated hour,|May harmless rejoice to own|Thy fertilizing power.
Come as the dove, and spread thy wings|Thy wings of peaceful love|And let thy Church on earth become|Bless’d as the Church above.
Spirit Divine attend our prayers|Make a lost world thy home|Descend with all Thy gracious powers|Oh come, Great Spirit, Come.

verse: SPIRIT Divine attend our prayers
And make this house Thy home
Descend with all Thy gracious power
Oh come Great Spirit come

syllable: Ẹ MI Ọ run gb'a du ra wa,
Wa gbe' nu i le yi,
Sọ ka lẹ pẹ l'a gba ra Rẹ,
Wa Ẹ mi Mi mọ wa.

hymns.title: WA, PARAKLITI MIMỌ, LAT' IBUGBE RẸ ỌRUN
hymns.description:
CMS 272    H.C. 259   7.7.7. 
(FE 93) 
“Iwọ ran Ẹmi Rẹ jade, a si da wọn.” - Ps. 104:30
stanzas: 1.  WA, Parakliti Mimọ,|Lat' ibugbe Rẹ ọrun,|Ran itansan 'mọlẹ wa,
Baba talaka, wa 'hin,|Olufunni l'ẹbun wa,|Imọlẹ ọkan jọ wa.
Baba Olutunu wa,|Alejo tootọ f'ọkan,|Pẹlu itura-Rẹ wa.
'Wọ n'isinmi n'nu lala,|Iboji ninu oorun,|Itunu ninu 'pọnju.
'Wọ 'mọlẹ t'o mọ gara,|cr Tan sinu aya awọn;|Eniyan Rẹ olootọ.
L'aisi Rẹ ki l'ẹda jẹ?|Ise at'ero Mimọ,|Lat'ọdọ Rẹ wa ni wọn.
Eleeri, sọ di mimọ,|Agbọgbẹ masai wo san,|Alaileso mu s'eso.
Mu ọkan tutu gbona,|M'alagidi tẹriba,|Fa asako wa jẹjẹ.
F'ẹmi 'jinlẹ Rẹ meje,|Kun awọn olootọ Rẹ,|F'agbara Rẹ s'abo wọn.
Ran or'ọfẹ Rẹ sihin,|Ẹkun igbala layé,|At'alafia l'ọrun.

english.title: COME, THOU HOLY PARACLETE AND, FROM THY CELESTIAL SENT
stanzas: COME, Thou Holy Paraclete|And from Thy celestial sent|Send Thy light and brilliancy.
Father of the poor, draw near|Giver of all gifts, be here|Come, the soul’s true radiaancy.
Come, of comforters the best|Of the soul the sweetest Guest|Come in tail refreshingly.
Thou in labour rest most sweet|Thou art shadow from the heat|Comfort in adversity.
O Thou Light, most pure and blest|Shine within the inmost breast|Of Thy faithful company.
Where Thou art not, man hath nought|Every holy deed and thought|Comes from Thy Divinity.
What is soiled, make Thou pure|What is wounded, work its cure|What is parched, fortify.
Cold and hard hearts quicken Thou,|Stubborn necks to Jesus bow|Draw the wanderer tenderly.
Fill Thy faithful, who confide|ln Thy power to guard and guide|With Thy Sevenfold Mystery.
Here Thy grace and virtue send|Grant Salvation to the end|And in heaven felicity.

verse: COME Thou Holy Paraclete
And from Thy celestial sent
Send Thy light and brilliancy

hymns.title: T'OLUWA N'ILẸ AT'ẸKUN RẸ, AYÉ AT'ẸKUN 'NU RẸ
hymns.description:
(FE 94) 
“Ti Oluwa ni ilẹ ati ẹkun rẹ.” - Ps. 24:1
stanzas: T'OLUWA n'ilẹ at'ẹkun rẹ,|Ayé at'ẹkun 'nu rẹ;|O fi di re sọlẹ lor'okun,|Ati lori san omi
Tani yoo g'ori oke yi lọ,|Ori oke Oluwa;|Tani yoo duro niwaju Rẹ,|Niwaju Oluwa wa.
Ẹni t'o ni ọwọ mimọ,|T'o si ni aya funfun;|Ti ko gb'ọkan rẹ s'oke s'asan,|Ti ko si bura ẹtan.
Awa n'iran ti n s'afẹri Rẹ,|Safẹri Rẹ Oluwa;|Awa yoo si ri ibukun gba,|Lọwọ Ọlọrun Jakob.
A! Tani Ọba awọn ọba?|Ti 'se Ọba Ogo yi?|Oluwa awọn ọmọ-ogun,|Oun naa ni Ọba Ogo.
chorus: Gb'ori soke|Ẹyin 'lẹkun,|K'a gbe yin soke,|K'Ọba Ogo wọle wa.

english.title: THE EARTH IS THE LORD’S AND HIS ALONE, THE WORLD WITH ALL ITS CREATURES
english.description:
(FE 94)
“The earth is the Lord’s" - Ps 24:1
stanzas: THE EARTH is the Lord’s and His alone|The world with all its creatures|He found its foundation on the seas|And on the roaring forties.
Who will ascend on the Holy Hill|The Holy Hill of the Lord|Who will ever stand before the King|The Holy King of Glory.
He who lives holy life all his days|And also keeps holy heart|Whose heart never raise to vanity|And no deceit in his tongues.
These only will receive His blessings|Blessings from the Lord of Host|We who daily ask Thy face Oh! God|Daily in Thy Holy Courts.
Only those who daily seek Thy face|Thy merciful face Oh God|We who daily lift up all our hearts|And hands in holy temple.
chorus: Lift up your heads|Oh Holy Gates|Be ye lifted up|King of glory to enter.

verse: THE EARTH is the Lord’s and His alone
The world with all its creatures
He found its foundation on the seas
And on the roaring forties
chorus: Lift up your heads
Oh Holy Gates
Be ye lifted up
King of glory to enter

syllable: T'O LU WA n'i lẹ a t'ẹ kun rẹ,
A yé a t'ẹ kun 'nu rẹ;
O fi di re sọ lẹ lo r'o kun,
A ti lo ri san o mi
Gb'o ri so ke,
Ẹ yin 'lẹ kun,
K'a gbe yin so o ke,
K'Ọ ba O go wọ le wa.

hymns.title: T'ỌLỌRUN OLUWA NILẸ,  ATI GBOGBO ẸKUN RẸ
hymns.description:
8.7. (FE 95) 
“Ọlọrun si pe iyangbẹ ilẹ ni ilẹ.”
stanzas: T'ỌLỌRUN Oluwa nilẹ,|Ati gbogbo ẹkun rẹ;|Ayé at'awọn eniyan,|Ti o tẹdo sinu rẹ.
Tani yoo goke Oluwa,|Ati ibi mimọ Rẹ,|Ẹni t'o ni ọwọ mimọ,|Ti aya rẹ si funfun.
Awọn ti ko gbọkan soke,|S'ohun asan ayé yi,|Ti ko si jẹ bura ẹtan,|Yoo ri 'bukun Oluwa gba.
Eyi l'awọn to n safẹri,|Oju Ọlọrun Jakob,|Awọn to duro d'Oluwa,|Ni yoo ri 'bukun gba.
Gbori soke ẹnu ọna,|Ka si tun gbe yin soke,|Ẹyin l'ẹkun ayérayé,|K'Ọba Ogo le wọle.
Tani Ọba Ologo yi!|Oluwa ọmọ ogun,|Ẹni to l'agbara l'ogun,|Oun ni Ọba Ogo yi.
Gbori soke ẹnu ọna,|K'Ọba Ogo le wọle,|Tani Ọba Ogo yi?|Oluwa ọmọ-ogun.
chorus: Awamaridi ni'sẹ Rẹ,|Oluwa ọmọ-ogun,|Ogo ọla at'agbara|Ni fun Ọ Mẹtalọkan.

english.title: THE EARTH IS THE LORD'S OUR GOD, AND ALL THE FULLNESS THEREOF
english.description:
8S 7S (FE 95)
“The earth is the Lord our God”
- Ps. 24
stanzas: THE EARTH is the Lord's our God,|And all the fullness thereof|The world and all Living creature|Dwelling now and evermore.
Who' will ascend to the Lord's Hill|And on to His Holy place,|He that keeps his bands ever clean|And pure heart in all his days.
He that lifted not his heart on|All the Worldly vanity|And Swearth not deceitfully|Shall lack not the Lord‘s Blessing.
This is the Generation seeking|Face of the God of Jacob|They that standeth by the Lord God|Shall lack not the Lord's Blessing.
Lift up your heads O ye Holy gates|And be ye lifted up high|O ye everlasting Gate|Let the King of Glory in.
And who is the King of Glory|O Lord, God of all the Hosts|Who has full might in the battle|Is the Lord King of Glory.
Lift up your heads O Ye Gate|Let The King of Glory in|And who is the King of Glory?|O Lord God of All the Hosts.
chorus: Marvellous are aII thy works|O Lord god of all the Host|Glory, Honour and The Power|To the Holy Trinity.

verse: THE EARTH is the Lord's our God
And all the fullness thereof
The world and all Living creature
Dwelling now and evermore
chorus: Marvellous are aII thy works
O Lord god of all the Host
Glory Honour and The Power
To the Holy Trinity

hymns.title: BABA MIMỌ JỌWỌ SUNMỌ WA, ỌMỌ MIMỌ JỌWỌ SUNMỌ WA
hymns.description:
t.SS&S 964         (FE 96) 
“Duro de ileri Baba”. - Ise 1:4 
Ohun Orin: Ile kan mbẹ to dara julọ (699)
stanzas: BABA Mimọ jọwọ sunmọ wa,|Ọmọ Mimọ jọwọ sunmọ wa,|Ẹmi Mimọ jọwọ sunmọ wa,|A sunmọ Ọ, fi 'bukun fun wa.
Jehovah Jire wa ba wa pe,|K'O si ma gbe inu ọkan wa,|Masai f'oju anu Rẹ wo wa,|Ko si f'ẹsẹ Ẹgbẹ wa mulẹ.
Oluwa pese Ẹmi Rẹ fun wa,|Ka wa le sin Ọ titi d'opin,|Ko si ma samọna Ẹgbẹ wa,|Ka le fi 'jọba Rẹ s'ere jẹ.
Pese fun gbogbo awọn Ọmọ Ẹgbẹ,|Pese isẹ f'awọn alairise,|Mase jẹ ki gbogbo wa rahun,|Masai fi 'bukun Rẹ kari wa.
Nigba t'a ba si f'ayé yi silẹ,|Ka wa le jẹ ẹni 'tẹwọgba,|K'awa sile ba Jesu gunwa,|Niwaju itẹ Mẹtalọkan.
Nikẹhin k'a le gbọ ohun ni,|Ẹ wa ẹyin Alabukun fun|Bọ sinu ayọ Oluwa Rẹ,|K'a le b'awọn Angẹl kọrin 'yin.
chorus: Baba wa, Baba wa|Edumare jọwọ bukun wa,|Baba wa, Baba wa,|Edumare jọwọ bukun wa.

english.title: HOLY FATHER DRAW NIGH UNTO US, HOLY SON PLEASE DRAW NIGH UNTO US
english.description:
9S (FE 96)
“And being assembled together with them, commanded them that they should not depart from Jerusalem but wait for the promise of the Father which saith He ye have heard of Me" - Acts 1:4
stanzas: HOLY Father draw nigh unto us|Holy Son please draw nigh unto us|Holy Spirit draw nigh unto us|We draw nigh unto Thee to bless us.
Abide with us Jehovah‐Jireh|Dwell in our hearts we beseech Thee Lord|With Thy merciful eyes look on us|Firmly build this Band Lord God of Host.
Give unto us thy spirit Good Lord|That we may all serve Thee to the end|And direct Thee O Lord our band|That we may gain Thy Kingdom O Lord.
Provide for all our members O Lord|To the jobless provide work O Lord|Let us all not lament Lord we pray|Let Thy blessing go round all of us.
When we depart from world to Thy hand|Let us be acceptable to Thee|That we may reign with Jesus our Lord|Before Thy Holy Trinity Throne.
That we may hear that voice at the end|Come to me thou blessed ones of God|Enter on to the joy of thy Lord|With the Angel‘s to sing Hymns of praise.
chorus: Our Father, Our Father|Almighty we beseech Thee bless us|Our Father, Our Father|Almighty we beseech Thee bless us.

verse: HOLY Father draw nigh unto us
Holy Son please draw nigh unto us
Holy Spirit draw nigh unto us
We draw nigh unto Thee to bless us
chorus: Our Father Our Father
Almighty we beseech Thee bless us
Our Father Our Father
Almighty we beseech Thee bless us

syllable: BA BA Mi mọ jọ wọ sun mọ wa,
Ọ mọ Mi mọ jọ wọ sun mọ wa,
Ẹ mi Mi mọ jọ wọ sun mọ wa,
A sun mọ Ọ, fi 'bu kun fun wa.
Ba ba wa, Ba ba wa
E du ma re jọ wọ bu kun wa,
Ba ba wa, Ba ba wa (o run),
E du ma re jọ wọ bu kun wa.

hymns.title: OLUWA, EMI SA TI GBOHUN RẸ, O N SỌ IFẸ RẸ SI MI
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 591  SS&S 607 P.M. (FE 97) 
“Fa mi, emi o sure tọ ọ” - Orin Solo 1:4
stanzas: OLUWA, emi sa ti gbohun Rẹ,|O n sọ ifẹ Rẹ si mi;|Sugbọn mo fẹ nde l'apa igbagbọ,|Ki n le tubọ sunmọ Ọ.
Ya mi si mimọ fun isẹ Tirẹ,|Nipa Ore-ọfẹ Rẹ;|Jẹ ki n fi ọkan igbagbọ w'oke|K'ifẹ mi tẹ si Tirẹ.
A! ayọ mimọ ti wakati kan,|Ti mo lo nib'itẹ Rẹ,|'Gba mo gbadura si Ọ Ọlọrun,|Ti a sọrọ bi ọrẹ.
Ijinlẹ ifẹ mbẹ ti n ko le mọ,|Titi n ó fi kọja odo!|Ayọ giga ti emi ko le sọ,|Titi n ó fi de 'sinmi.
chorus: Fa mi mọra, mọra Oluwa,|Sib'agbelebu t'O ku,|Fa mi mọra, mọra Oluwa,|Sib'ẹjẹ Rẹ t'o n'iye

english.title: I AM THINE O LORD I HAVE HEARD THY VOICE, AND IT TOLD THY LOVE TO ME
english.description:
C.M.S. 591 S. 165 P.M (FE 97)
"We have sealed the servants of our God in their forehead" - Rev. 7:3
stanzas: I AM Thine O Lord I have heard Thy voice,|And it told Thy love to me;|But I long to rise in the arm of faith|And be closer drawn to Thee.
Consecrate me now to Thy service Lord,|By the power of grace Divine|Let my soul look up With a steadfast hope,|And my will be lost in Thine.
Oh! the pure delight of a single hour|That before Thy Throne I spend|When I kneel in prayer and with Thee my God|I commune as friend with friend.
There are depths of love that I can not know|Till I cross the narrow sea;|There are heights of joy that I can not reach|Till I rest in peace with Thee.
chorus: Draw me nearer, nearer, nearer blessed Lord|To the Cross where Thou hast died:|Draw me nearer, nearer, nearer blessed Lord,|To Thy precious bleeding side.

verse: I AM Thine O Lord I have heard Thy voice
And it told Thy love to me
But I long to rise in the arm of faith
And be closer drawn to Thee
chorus: Draw me nearer nearer nearer blessed Lord
To the Cross where Thou hast died:
Draw me nearer nearer nearer blessed Lord
To Thy precious bleeding side

syllable: O LU WA, e mi sa ti gbo hun Rẹ,
On sọ i fẹ e Rẹ si mi;
Su gbọn mo fẹ nde l'a pa i gba gbọ,
Ki nle tu bọ su nmọ Ọ.
Fa mi mọ o ra, mọ ra O lu wa,
Si b'a gbe le bu t'O ku,
Fa mi mọ o ra, mọ ra O lu wa,
Si b'ẹ jẹ Rẹ e t'o n'i ye

hymns.title: Ẹ YỌ NIN'OLUWA, Ẹ YỌ, ẸYIN ỌLỌKAN DIDURO
hymns.description:
SS&S 207  8s (FE 98) 
“Ẹ yọ ninu Oluwa.” - Ps. 68:3
stanzas: Ẹ YỌ nin'Oluwa, ẹ yọ|Ẹyin ọlọkan diduro,|At'ẹyin t'a se l'ayanfẹ,|Mu 'banujẹ kuro l'ọkan yin.
Ẹ yọ n'tori Oun l'Oluwa,|L'ayé ati l'ọrun pẹlu;|O n j'Ọba nipa asẹ Rẹ,|O l'agbara lati gbala.
Nigba ti ogun ba gbona,|T'ọta ba fẹrẹ sẹgun yin;|Ogun Jesu ti a ko ri,|Pọ ju gbogbo ọta yin lọ.
B'ọsan d'oru mọ yin loju,|T'okunkun rẹ n dẹru ba yin;|Ẹ ma jẹ k'ọkan yin bajẹ,|Gbẹkẹle tit'ewu yoo tan.
Ẹ yọ nin' Oluwa ẹ yọ,|Ẹ f'orin didun yin logo;|Fi duru, fere, at'ohun,|Kọrin Halleluyah kikan.
chorus: Ẹ yọ, ẹ yọ,|ẹ yọ nin'Oluwa, ẹ yọ|Ẹ yọ, ẹ yọ,|ẹ yọ nin'Oluwa, ẹ yọ.

english.title: BE GLAD IN THE LORD, AND REJOICE, ALL YE THAT ARE UPRIGHT IN HEART
english.description:
L.M S.S. 207 8s (FE 98)
"Let the Righteousness be glad, yea let
them exceedingly rejoice” - Ps. 68:3
stanzas: BE GLAD in the Lord, and rejoice|All ye that are upright in heart|And ye that have made Him your choice|Bid sadness and sorrows depart.
Be joyful for He is the Lord|On earth and in heaven supreme|He fashions and rules by His word;|The "Mighty" and “Strong to redeem"
What tho’ in the conflict for right|Your enemies almost prevail|God’s armies, just hid from your sight|Are more than the foes which assail.
Though darkness surround you by day|Your sky by the night be o’ercast|Let nothing your spirit dismay|But trust till the danger is past.
Be glad in the Lord and rejoice|His praise proclaiming in song|With harp, and with organ and voice|The hallelujahs prolong!
chorus: Rejoice Rejoice|be glad in the Lord and rejoice|Rejoice Rejoice|be glad in the Lord and rejoice

verse: BE GLAD in the Lord and rejoice
All ye that are upright in heart
And ye that have made Him your choice
Bid sadness and sorrows depart
chorus: Rejoice Rejoice
be glad in the Lord and rejoice
Rejoice Rejoice
be glad in the Lord and rejoice

syllable: Ẹ YỌ ni n'O lu wa, ẹ yọ
Ẹ yin ọ lọ kan an di du ro,
A t'ẹ yin t'a se l'a yan fẹ,
Mu 'ba nu jẹ ku ro l'ọ kan yin.
Ẹ yọ, ẹ e yọ,
ẹ yọ ni n'O lu wa, ẹ yọ
Ẹ yọ, ẹ e yọ,
ẹ e yọ ni n'O lu wa, ẹ yọ.

hymns.title: IJỌ KÉRÚBÙ A DE, LATI YIN BABA, GBOGBO AGBAYÉ Ẹ WA O, KA JỌ YIN BABA.
hymns.description:
(FE 99) 
“Ẹ fi ogo ati agbara fun Oluwa.” - Ps. 29:1
stanzas: IJỌ Kérúbù a de, lati yin Baba;|Gbogbo agbayé ẹ wa o, ka jọ yin Baba.
Ijọ Séráfù a de, lati yin Baba,|Tewe-tagba ẹ wa o, ka jọ yin Baba.
Igun mẹrẹrin ẹ wa, ka lọ yin Baba,|Kérúbù pẹlu Séráfù, se wọn yin Baba.
Tọmọde tagba, ẹ wa fi'yin fun Baba,|Kérúbù pẹlu Séráfù, awa yin Baba.
Jesu Olugbala, a de lati yin Baba,|Jọwọ se 'ranti Kérúbù, pe wa ni Tirẹ.
Jesu Olugbala ko wa, jọwọ ko wa lọ,|Ọdọ Baba wa loke, jọwọ ko wa lọ.
Jesu Olugbala, o se, o ko jẹ k'awa gbe,|Igbekun t'esu di silẹ, ko jẹ k'awa gbe.
Ẹyin obinrin, ẹ rọju, ẹ rọju ẹ ma bohun bọ,|Gbogbo ẹni dabi Hannah Baba o gbọ tirẹ.
Baba ranti arugbo, to wa ninu wa,|K'ebi alẹ ma pa wọn, jọwọ ranti wọn.
Ẹmi Mimọ wa, jọwọ fi han ni,|Ọrọ Mimọ Bibeli, jọwọ fi han ni.

english.title: BAND OF CHERUBIM HAS COME, GIVING PRAISES TO OUR GOD
stanzas: BAND of Cherubim has come|giving praises to our God|Oh come the whole universe giving|Praises to our God.
Band of Seraphim has come|givmg praises to our God|Come Ibo and Hausa, Come|Let's praise our Father.
The four cardinal points come|lets go praise our Father|Cherubim and Seraphim we are|praising the Father.
Both young and old all come,|come let us praise the father|Cherubim and Seraphim|we praise thee oh Father.
Jesus the Saviour we come|we come to praise our father|Leader remember Cherubim|make them to be thy own.
Jesus Saviour take us please|take us right there|Up at our father‘s place,|please take us there.
Jesus, Saviour thanks,|for not letting us carry|Satan burden tied down,|you didn't let us carry it.
Your women should endure and|don‘t let yourself be bogged|All those who are like Hannah|the Father will provide for them.
Father remember the old ones that|are among us|So that they don‘t starve at old age,|Father do remember them.
Holy Spirit do please, please|reveal it unto us|Holy words in the Bible, please|reveal it unto us.

verse: BAND of Cherubim has come
giving praises to our God
Oh come the whole universe giving
Praises to our God

hymns.title: A DUPẸ LỌWỌ ỌLỌRUN, T'O DA WA SI D'ONI
hymns.description:
(FE 100) 
“Oluwa oun ni Ọlọrun wa.” - Ps. 105:7
stanzas: A DUPẸ lọwọ Ọlọrun|T'O da wa si d'oni;|T'o jẹ k'ẹmi tun ẹmi ri,|Ogo f'orukọ Rẹ.
Isẹ pọ n'ilu Osogbo,|T'Ilesa ko ni sọ;|Ẹgbẹ Ondo ti mura tan,|Lati gbe Jesu ga.
Ẹgbẹ Eko damure yin,|Lati besu jagun;|Oko pọn pupọ n'ilu Oke,|Tani yoo lọ ka?
f A ki Baba Aladura,|O ku afojuba;|Olori ti jagun fun Jesu,|O si sẹgun Esu.
f Orin Halle, Halleluya,|L'awa y'o kọ l'ọrun;|Nigba t'a ba r'Olugbala,|Ni ori itẹ Rẹ.
chorus: A dupẹ lọwọ Ọlọrun,|T'o da ẹmi wa si d'oni;|T'o jẹ k'ẹmi tun ẹmi ri,|Ogo f'orukọ Rẹ.

english.title: WE GIVE THANKS TO THAT ALMIGHTY, FOR SPARING OUR LIVES TO DATE
stanzas: WE give thanks to that Almighty|For sparing our lives to date|For making souls to meet again|Glory be to thy name.
There‘s much to do at osogbo|Much more at Ilesa|The Bands at Ondo are prepared|To uphold Jesus.
Tie your girdles Bands of Lagos|To battle with satan|The harvest up‐country ready|Who will go to harvest.
We greet our Spiritual father|For joy of re-union|Captain has fought for Jesus Christ|And has conquered Satan.
Songs of Halle Halleluyah|Shall we sing in heaven|When we shall see the Saviour Lord|On his Throne on high.
chorus: We give thanks to thee O Lord|For sparing our lives to this day|For making souls to meet again|Glory be to thy name.

verse: WE give thanks to that Almighty
For sparing our lives to date
For making souls to meet again
Glory be to thy name
chorus: We give thanks to thee O Lord
For sparing our lives to this day
For making souls to meet again
Glory be to thy name

syllable: A du pẹ lọ wọ Ọ o lọ o run,
T'O da wa si d'o o ni;
T'o jẹ k'ẹ mi tu un ẹ e mi i ri,
O go f'o ru kọ o Rẹ.
A du u pẹ e lọ wọ Ọ lọ o run,
T'o da ẹ mi wa si d'o ni;
T'o jẹ k'ẹ mi tun ẹ mi i ri,
O go O go O go
O go O go O go
O go o ni f'o ru kọ Rẹ.

hymns.title: ẸYIN ANGẸL TO WA L'ỌRUN, Ẹ FI IYIN FUN BABA
hymns.description:
(FE 101) 
“Emi o ma fi ibukun fun Oluwa nigba gbogbo, iyin Rẹ yo ma wa ni ẹnu mi titi.”  - Ps. 34:1
stanzas: ẸYIN Angẹl to wa l'ọrun,|Ẹ fi iyin fun Baba;|Fun’jọ to da silẹ layé,|Fun igbala ẹmi,|O yẹ ki inu wa ko dun,|Ki awa ki o si ma yọ!|Fun iranti iku Jesu,|Lori Agbelebu.
Kérúbù ati Séráfù,|Ẹ fi iyin fun Baba;|Ti o da Ijọ yi silẹ,|Pe k'a le ri igbala,|'Tori na, ẹ jẹ k'a mura,|Lati sare ije yi,|Bi a ba foriti d'opin,|Iye y'o jẹ tiwa.
Gbogbo isẹ wa ti a n se,|Gbogbo iwa ti a n hu,|Gbogbo ọrọ wa ti a n sọ,|Ẹ jẹ k'a ma sọra,|Nitori Oluwa yoo mu,|Gbogbo 'sẹ wa si 'dajọ,|Ati gbogbo ohun 'kọkọ,|Ire tabi ibi.
Awa ni imọlẹ ayé,|Lati le okunkun lọ,|Ilu ta tẹ sori oke,|A ko le fara sin;|Awa si ni iyọ ayé,|Ti a o mu ayé dun,|Sugbọn b'iyọ ba di obu,|Bawo ni yoo se dun?
Ọpẹ lo yẹ Olugbala,|Fun ifẹ to ni si wa;|Ti o pe wa si Ẹgbẹ yi,|Ọkọ 'gbala 'kẹhin;|Ogo, ọla at'agbara,|Ọla nla at'ipa,|Ni fun Baba, Ọmọ, Ẹmi,|Mẹtalọkan lailai.
chorus: A pa lasẹ l'agbala ọrun,|Pe k'Ijọ yi ma bi si;|A pa lasẹ l'agbala ọrun,|Pe ko si ma rẹ si;|Titi gbogbo ifọju ọkan,|Yio o fi tan layé;|T'iku Jesu Oluwa wa,|Ko ni jẹ asan mọ.

english.title: YE ANGELS THAT DWELL IN HEAVEN, GIVE PRAISE TO OUR FATHER
english.description:
"I will bless the Lord at all time his praise shall
continually be in my mouth" - Ps. 34:1
stanzas: YE angels that dwell in Heaven,|Give praise to our Father,|For the band established here below|For the redemption of soul;|Therefore let's rejoice and be glad|And then shout Hallelujah,|In remembrance of Jesus death|Painful death on the cross.

Ye Cherubim and Seraphim|Give praises to our Father,|Who has established this Holy Band|To procure us salvation;|Therefore let us run the swift race|Of service to Almighty|Perseverance to the end shall bring|Everlasting life to us.

All the works we do in this world|All the characters we show|All the words that we utter therein|Let’s be watchful and careful|For the Lord shall bring to Judgement|All that we do in this world|With every secret thing we do|Be it good or evil.

Jesus proclaimeth us Light of world|To cast all darkness away;|The city built on the top of Hill|Can never hide from vision,|God has made us the salt of the earth|To greatly sweeten the earth|But if salt has lost its savour,|How can it be seasoned?

Glory be to Lord our saviour|For the love bestowed on us|Calling us into this Holy Band|The last Ark of Salvation|Glory and honour Might and power,|Highest honour and wisdom|To Father, Son and Holy Ghost,|Forever Trinity.
chorus: There's Command from Heaven's Courts above|That this Band must multiply!|There's Command from heaven's Courts above,|It must grow from strength to strength;|Till Blind in spirit behold Light|In this world and that to come|So that death of Jesus on Cross|Would never pass in vain.

verse: YE angels that dwell in Heaven
Give praise to our Father
For the band established here below
For the redemption of soul
Therefore let's rejoice and be glad
And then shout Hallelujah
In remembrance of Jesus death
Painful death on the cross
chorus: There's Command from Heaven's Courts above
That this Band must multiply
There's Command from heaven's Courts above
It must grow from strength to strength
Till Blind in spirit behold Light
In this world and that to come
So that death of Jesus on Cross
Would never pass in vain

syllable: Ẹ YIN An gẹl, to wa l'ọ o run,
Ẹ fi 'yin fun, n Ba ba;
Fun ’jọ to da, si lẹ la a yé,
Fun i gba la a ẹ mi,
O yẹ ki i nu wa ko o dun,
Ki a wa kio si ma yọ!
Fun i ran ti i ku Je su,
Lo ri Agbe e le bu.
A pa la sẹ l'a gba la ọ run,
Pe k'I jọ yi ma bi si;
A pa la sẹ l'a gba la ọ run,
Pe ko si ma a rẹ si;
Ti ti gbo gbo i fọ ju ọ kan,
Yi o fi tan an la yé;
T'i ku Je su O lu wa wa,
Ko ni jẹ a san mọ.

hymns.title: Ẹ GBE OHUN AYỌ AT'IYIN GA, ALLELUYAH!
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 559   H.C.  585   P.M. (FE 102) 
“Mo gbohun nla kan, t'ọpọlọpọ eniyan l'ọrun n wi pé, Alleluya.” - Ifi. 19:1

hymns.title: OLUWA ỌRUN OUN AYÉ, WỌ N'IYIN AT'ỌPẸ YẸ FUN
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 427  H.C. 429   8s.  4 
(FE 103) 
“Ohun  gbogbo ọdọ Rẹ ni o ti wa ati ninu ọwọ Rẹ ni awa ti fi fun Ọ.” - I Kro. 29:14
stanzas: OLUWA ọrun oun ayé,|Wọ n'iyin at'ọpẹ yẹ fun;|Bawo l'a ba ti fẹ Ọ to?|Onibu-ọrẹ.
Orun ti ń ran at'afẹfẹ,|Gbogbo eweko ń sọ'fẹ Rẹ;|'Wọ l'O ń mu irugbin dara,|Onibu-ọrẹ.
Fun ara lile wa gbogbo,|Fun gbogbo ibukun ayé;|Awa yin Ọ, a si dupẹ,|Onibu-ọrẹ.
O ko du wa ni ọmọ Rẹ,|O fi fun ayé ẹsẹ wa;|O si f'ẹbun gbogbo pẹlu,|Onibu-ọrẹ.
O fun wa l'Ẹmi Mimọ Rẹ,|Ẹmi iye at'agbara;|O rọjo ẹkun 'bukun Rẹ|Le wa lori.
Fun idariji ẹsẹ wa,|Ati fun ireti ọrun;|Ki l'ohun t'a ba fi fun Ọ?|Onibu-ọrẹ.
Owo, ti a ń na, ofo ni,|Sugbọn eyi t'a fi fun Ọ;|O jẹ isura tit'ayé,|Onibu-ọrẹ.
Ohun t'a bun Ọ Oluwa,|'Wọ o san le e pada fun wa;|Layọ l'a o ta Ọ lọrẹ,|Onibu-ọrẹ.
Ni ọdọ Rẹ l'a ti san wa,|Ọlọrun Olodumare;|Jẹ k'a le ba Ọ gbe titi|Onibu-ọrẹ.
chorus: Onibu-ọrẹ, Onibu-ọrẹ|Bawo l'a ba ti fẹ Ọ to?|Onibu-ọrẹ.

english.title: O LORD OF HEAVEN AND OF EARTH, TO THEE ALL PRAISE AND GLORY BE
english.description:
C.M.S 427 H.C. 429. 8s 4 (FE 103)
"For all things come from thee, and of thine own have we given thee" 1 Chro. 29:14
stanzas: O LORD of heaven and of earth|To Thee all praise and Glory be|How shall we Show our love to Thee|Giver of all, giver of all.
The golden sunshine, vernal air|Sweet flower and fruits, Thy love declare|Where harvests ripen, Thou art there|Giver of all.
For peaceful homes and healthful days|For all the Blessings earth displays|We owe Thee thankfulness and praise|Giver of all.
Thou did not spare Thine only Son|But gav’st Him for a world undone|And freely with that blessed One|Thou givest all.
Thou giv’st the Holy Spirit’s dower|Spirit of life and love and power|And dost His even fold graces shower|Upon us all.
For souls redeemed, for sins forgiven|For mean of grace and hopes of heaven|What can to Thee O Lord, be given|Who givest all?
We lose what on ourselves we spend,|We have as treasure without end|Whatever Lord to Thee we lend|Who givest all.
Whatever Lord we lend to Thee|Repaid a thousand fold will be|then gladly will we give to Thee|Giver of all.
To Thee from whom we all derive|Our life, our gifts our power to give|Oh may we ever with Thee live|Giver of all.
chorus: Giver of all, giver of all|How shall we Show our love to Thee|Giver of all

verse: O LORD of heaven and of earth
To Thee all praise and Glory be
How shall we Show our love to Thee
Giver of all giver of all
chorus: Giver of all giver of all
How shall we Show our love to Thee
Giver of all

syllable: O LU WA ọ o run o un a yé,
Wọ n'i yin a a t'ọ pẹ yẹ fun;
Ba wo l'a ba a ti fẹ e Ọ to?
O ni bu- ọ rẹ.
notes: d:d:d m:r d r m r

syllable: O ni bu -ọ rẹ e,
O ni bu -ọ rẹ e,
Ba wo l'a ba a ti fẹ e Ọ to?
O ni bu -ọ rẹ.

hymns.title: ỌPẸ LO YẸ F'OLUGBALA, IYIN FUN MẸTALỌKAN
hymns.description:
(FE 104) 
“E ma yin Oluwa.” - Ps. 112:1 
Ohun orin: Ma tọju mi jehovah nla (556)
stanzas: ỌPẸ lo yẹ f'Olugbala,|Iyin fun Mẹtalọkan;|T'o da wa si d'ọjọ oni,|A f'ogo f'orukọ Rẹ.
Mẹtalọkan Ọba Ogo,|Baba fun wa l'agbara,|F'awọn asaju n'isẹgun,|Fun wọn l'ọgbọn at'oye.
Ọbangiji Ọba Ogo,|Ranti Ẹgbẹ Aladaura;|Fun wọn l'agbara at'ifẹ|Ko wọn l'adura t'ọrun.
Jehovah-Nissi Ọba wa,|Saanu f'Ẹgbẹ Séráfù;|F'isẹgun f'Ẹgbẹ Kérúbù,|Se wa gẹgẹ bi t'ọrun.
Awọn ti ko ri'se yoo ri,|Agan a f'ọwọ s'osun;|Ọlọmọ ko ni padanu|Alaisan yoo dide.
Gbọ tiwa Baba wa ọrun,|Ranti Ẹgbẹ idalẹ;|Fun wọn l'agbara at'ipa,|Fun gbogbo wa n'isẹgun.
Jehovah Shammah Ọba wa,|Gba t'o ba d'ọjọ ikẹyin;|Mu wa d'agbala itura,|JAH mu wa de'tẹ Ogo.
chorus: Kọrin Ogo, Alleluya,|Orin ogo la o kọ,|Kọrin Ogo, Alleluya,|Kọ Hossanah s'Ọba wa.

english.title: PRAISE BE UNTO GOD REDEEMER, PRAISES BE TO TRINITY
english.description:
8S 75 (FE 104)
"His praise shall continually be in my mouth"
- Ps. 34:1
stanzas: PRAISE be unto God redeemer|Praises be to Trinity|Who preserved us up to this day|Glory to his Holy name.
Trinity and King of glory|Father power send to us|Let the elders be victorious|Wisdom from above descend.
Thou the great and glorious Father|Forget not the praying band|Power and love to them be given|Teach them how to pray to Thee.
Jehovah Nissi our Father|Mercy to Seraph descend|Let Cherubim be victorious|Like their counter-parts be blessed.
Provide jobs-for all the jobless|The barren shall be made whole|All Children shall be protected|Death shall have no power on us.
Our prayers we beg Thee hearken|All our branches to sustain|Strength and victory to them given|Uphold, keep them to the end.
Jehovah Shammah our Great King|When the last call shall be made|Into thy Kingdom please call us|Unto glory to thy throne.
chorus: Sing and chorus Halleluyah|Songs of glory shall we sing|Sing and chorus Halleluyah|Shout Hosanna to our King.

verse: PRAISE be unto God redeemer
Praises be to Trinity
Who preserved us up to this day
Glory to his Holy name
chorus: Sing and chorus Halleluyah
Songs of glory shall we sing
Sing and chorus Halleluyah
Shout Hosanna to our King

syllable: Ọ PẸ lo yẹ f'O lu gba a la,
I yin fun Mẹ ta lọ kan;
T'o da wa si d'ọ jọ o o ni,
A f'o go f'o ru kọ Rẹ.
Kọ rin O go, Al le lu u ya,
O rin o go la o kọ,
Kọ rin O go, Al le lu u ya,
Kọ Hos sa nah s'Ọ ba wa.

hymns.title: A YIN ỌBA OGO, OUN NI ỌLỌRUN, Ẹ YIN FUN'SẸ 'YANU TI O SE FUN WA
hymns.description:
SS&S 209     (FE 105) 
“Fi ibukun fun Oluwa, iwọ ọkan mi.”
stanzas: A YIN Ọba Ogo, Oun ni Ọlọrun,|Ẹ yin fun'sẹ 'yanu ti O se fun wa,|Fun sisọ t'o n sọ wa ni ọjọ gbogbo,|Fun ọwọ ina ati awọsanma.
Ẹ yin fun igbala to fun wa l'ọfẹ,|Ẹ yin fun Orisun to le wẹ wa mọ;|Ẹ yin fun ore ati itọju Rẹ,|Ẹ yin pẹlu pe O n gbọ adura wa.
Ẹ yin fun idanwo, ti o n ran si wa,|Lati fi s'okunfa wa s'ọdọ 'ra Rẹ;|Ẹ yin fun igbagbọ lati ma sẹgun,|Ẹ yin fun 'leri ilu ọrun rere.
chorus: Ẹyin Angẹli didan fi harpu wura yin,|Ẹyin Ogo ọrun t'ẹ n ri oju Rẹ,|Yika gbogbo ayé titi?|Lai n'isẹ Rẹ yo ma yin|Fi ibukun f'Oluwa iwọ ọkan mi.

english.title: PRAISE THE KING OF GLORY, HE IS GOD ALONE PRAISE HIM FOR THE WONDERS, HE TO US HATH SHOWN
stanzas: PRAISE the King of Glory, He is God alone|Praise Him for the Wonders, He to us hath shown|For His promised presence All the pilgrim ways|For the flamming pillar And the cloud by day.
Praise Him for redemption Free to every soul|Praise Him for the Fountain That can make us whole|For His gifts of kidness And His loving care|For the blest assurance That He answers prayer

That He answers prayer Praise Him for the trials|Sent as cords of love Binding us more closely|To the things above For the faith that conquers|Hope, that naught For the land where loved ones Gather unto Him.
chorus: Praise Him, shinning Angel|All His hosts adore Him who His face behold|Through His great dominion While the ages roll|All His works shall praise Him|Bless the Lord, my soul!

verse: PRAISE the King of Glory He is God alone
Praise Him for the Wonders He to us hath shown
For His promised presence All the pilgrim ways
For the flamming pillar And the cloud by day
chorus: Praise Him shinning Angel
All His hosts adore Him who His face behold
Through His great dominion While the ages roll
All His works shall praise Him
Bless the Lord my soul

hymns.title: ẸYIN ẸGBẸ IGBALA, JẸ K'A YIN ỌBA OGO
hymns.description:
t.SS&S 134       (FE 106) 
Tune: Near the Cross 
“Ẹ fi yin fun Oluwa.” - Ps. 149:1
stanzas: ẸYIN Ẹgbẹ Igbala,|Jẹ k'a yin Ọba Ogo,|T'o da wa si di oni,|T'iparun ko ba wa.
Onigbagbọ agbayé,|Imale gbogb' ayé;|Ati Keferi agbayé,|Ẹ wa k'a yin Oluwa.
Ẹmi Adaba Ọrun,|Se'le Rẹ ninu wa;|'Fun wa l'okun 'lera,|Lati yin Ọlọrun.
chorus: Yin Oluwa, yin Oluwa|Kérúbù, Séráfù,|Ẹyin agbayé dide,|K'a yin Ọba Ogo

syllable: Ẹ YIN Ẹ gbẹ I gba la,
Jẹ k'a yin'Ọ ba O go,
T'o da wa si di o ni,
T'i pa run ko ba wa.
Yin'O lu wa, yin'O lu wa
Ké rú bù, Sé rá fù,
Ẹ yin a gba yé di de,
K'a yin Ọ ba O go.

hymns.title: AWA DUPẸ, AWA T'ỌPẸ DA, T'O TI PA AGBARA INA ILERU
hymns.description:
(FE 107) 
“E fi opẹ fun Oluwa.” - Ps. 136:1
stanzas: AWA dupẹ, awa t'ọpẹ da,|T'o ti pa agbara ina ileru;
Ajẹ, oso at'alawirin, sanpọnna,|Irun-mọlẹ ti di 'tẹmọlẹ.
Awa ọmọ Ijọ Séráfù,|Ẹ mura ka si le tẹ esu mọlẹ.
Ẹni t'o ro p'oun ti duro|K'o sọra ki o ma ba subu lulẹ.
Orin Halleluyah l'a o kọ,|'Gbati gbogbo idanwo ba kọja lọ.
Ẹ f'ogo fun Baba wa l'oke,|Ka si f'ogo f'Ọmọ Rẹ l'ọrun.
K'a f'ogo fun Ẹmi Mimọ,|Mẹtalọkan si l'ọpẹ yẹ fun.
Ogo ni fun, Ogo ni fun,|Ogo ni f'Orukọ Rẹ.
chorus: Ogo ni fun, Ogo ni fun,|Ogo ni f'Orukọ Rẹ.

english.title: WE THANK THEE LORD WE PRAISE THEE GOD, FOR VICTORY OVER THE NEBUCHADNEZZAR
stanzas: WE thank Thee Lord we praise Thee God|For victory over the Nebuchadnezzar
Witches, wizard busy body|All evil spirit we match on our feet.
The Members of the Cherubim|Be ready to match the devil on your feet.
Let all who stand ever be watchful|That satan will never never push you down.
The song Halle‐Halleluyah|Shall be our song when temptations is over.
Give glory to Heavenly Father|Give glory to His Holy Son.
Let's give glory to Holy Ghost|Praises be to the Holy trinity.
chorus: Glory be to, glory be to|Glory be Thy Holy name.

verse: WE thank Thee Lord we praise Thee God
For victory over the Nebuchadnezzar
chorus: Glory be to glory be to
Glory be Thy Holy name

hymns.title: Ẹ DAMURE ẸYIN SERAF', Ẹ MU HARPU YIN PẸLU
hymns.description:
(FE 108) 
Ohun Orin: Elẹsẹ wa sọdọ Jesu (70) 
“Fi ilu ati ijo yin”. - Ps. 150:4
stanzas: Ẹ DAMURE ẹyin Seraf'|Ẹ mu harpu yin pẹlu;|Ẹ jẹ ki Kimbali yin dun,|Lati pade Ọba wa.
Fi 'lu ati 'jo yin Baba,|Baba y'o f'ayọ fun wa;|Bi awa ba jẹ le gbagbọ,|Ere pupọ ni fun wa.
Baba masai fi 're fun wa,|Awa Seraf' ayé yi;|Se wa yẹ fun isin gbogbo,|Ka gb' ade wa nikẹhin.
Baba to gbọ ti Elijah,|Masai gbọ ti Séráfù;|Jehovah-Jire Ọba wa,|Se wa yẹ lọjọ 'kẹhin.
A o f'ogo fun Baba wa,|Fun Ọmọ to da wa si;|Bi ọdun si ti n yipo lọ,|Mẹtalọkan la o yin.
chorus: Loke odo ọna Eden|Ibugbe mimọ to dara,|Nibi Kérúbù, Séráfù,|Yin Baba Mimọ logo.

english.title: FASTEN YOUR GIRDLE YE SERAF‘, AND TAKE YOUR HARPS ALONG TOO
stanzas: FASTEN your girdle ye Seraf‘|And take your harps along too|And let your timbrels sing loudly|To welcome our glorious King.
With drum and dance glorify Him|He will give unto us joy|As long as we can trust in Him|Bountiful blessing for us.
Deny us not of your blessing|We Seraphim of this world|Make us fit for various service|And lets be crowned in the end.
Father who hearest Elijah|Please hear us we Seraphim|Jehovah Jireh thou our King|Make us fit on judgement day.
We'll give glory to our father|And to the Son who spares us|And as the year progresses on|Glory be to Trinity.
chorus: Up by the river of Eden|Holy and beautiful dwelling|Where Cherubim and Seraphim|Glorify the Holy one.

verse: FASTEN your girdle ye Seraf‘
And take your harps along too
And let your timbrels sing loudly
To welcome our glorious King
chorus: Up by the river of Eden
Holy and beautiful dwelling
Where Cherubim and Seraphim
Glorify the Holy one

syllable: Ẹ DA MU RE ẹ yin Se raf'
Ẹ mu har pu yin pẹ lu;
Ẹ jẹ ki Kim ba li yin dun,
La ti pa de Ọ ba wa.
Lo ke o do ọ na E e den
I bu gbe mi mọ to da ra,
Ni bi Ké rú bù Sé rá fù,
Yin Ba ba Mi mọ lo go.

hymns.title: ỌKAN MI YIN ỌBA ỌRUN, MU ỌRẸ WA SỌDỌ RẸ
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 568 H.C. 580  
8.7.8.7 (FE 109) 
“Fi ibukun fun Oluwa, iwọ ọkan mi” - Ps. 104:1
stanzas: ỌKAN mi yin Ọba ọrun,|Mu ọrẹ wa sọdọ Rẹ;|'Wọ ta wosan, ta dariji,|Tal'a ba ha yin ni Rẹ?|Yin Oluwa, Yin Oluwa,  )|Yin Ọba Ainipẹkun      )2ce
Yin fun ọkọ 'gbala 'kẹhin,|To sọkalẹ f'arayé;|O si yan Bab' Aladura,|Lati jẹ Alakoso;|Yin Oluwa, Yin Oluwa,  )|Yin Ọba Ainipẹkun      )2ce
Yin fun anu to ti fihan,|Lori Ẹgbẹ Séráfù;|To pa wa mọ titi d'oni,|To si fun wa n'isẹgun.|Yin Oluwa, Yin Oluwa, )|Ologo n'nu otitọ      )2ce
Yin fun abo ti o daju,|To n fun wa lojurere;|Ninu wahala oun 'danwo,|Anu Rẹ wa bakan naa,|Yin Oluwa, Yin Oluwa,)|Ologo Olotitọ      )2ce
Yin fun abo ti o daju,|Ta n ri n'Ijọ Séráfù|Ajẹ, Oso, oun Sanpọnna,|Wọn ko ri wa gbese mọ,|Yin Oluwa, Yin Oluwa,  )|Ọba Alainipẹkun      )2ce
A n gba b'itana eweko,|T'afẹfẹ n fẹ, t'o si n rọ;|'Gba ti a n wa, ti a si n ku,|Ọlọrun wa bakan naa.|Yin Oluwa, Yin Oluwa,  )|Yin Ọba Alainipẹkun      )2ce
Bi baba ni o n tọju wa,|O si mọ ailera wa;|Jẹjẹ lo n gbe wa l'apa Rẹ,|O ń f'ounjẹ iye bọ wa.|Yin Oluwa, Yin Oluwa,  )|Anu Rẹ yi ayé ka      )2ce
Ogun ọrun, ẹ ba wa yin,|Baba, Ọmọ, oun Ẹmi;|Orun, osupa, ẹ wolẹ,|Ati gbogbo agbayé.|Ẹ ba wa yin, ẹ ba wa yin)|Ọlọrun Mẹtalọkan         )2ce

english.title: PRAISE MY SOUL, THE KING OF HEAVEN, TO HIS FEET THE TRIBUTE BRING
english.description:
8s7s FE 109, SE 92
"Bless the Lord o my soul"
- Psalm 103
stanzas: PRAISE my soul, the King of heaven;|To His feet the tribute bring|Ransom'd heal‘d restored forgiven|Who like Thee His praise shall sing?
Praise Him for Ark of Salvation|Sent down to us in the world|And He made the praying Father|As the head over the Band.
Praise Him for His grace and favour|To the Cherubim, Seraph|To keep us all up to this day|And gives us victory always.
Praise for love He has shown to us|And favour in all our ways|In trouble and in temptation|His mercies ever remains.
Praise His ever-constant refuge|We Cherub, Seraph enjoys|Witches, Wizards and all evils|Woe betides them before us.
Father-like He tends and spares us|Well our feeble frame He knows;|In His hands He, gently bears us|Feeding us with bread of life.
Army of heaven joins and praise Him|Father, Son and Holy Ghost|Sun and Moon join all and praise Him|And ye all creatures on earth.
chorus: Praise Him, Praise Him, Praise Him, Praise Him|Praise the everlasting King|Praise Him, Praise Him, Praise Him, Praise Him|Praise the everlasting King

verse: PRAISE my soul the King of heaven
To His feet the tribute bring
Ransom'd heal‘d restored forgiven
Who like Thee His praise shall sing
chorus: Praise Him Praise Him Praise Him Praise Him
Praise the everlasting King
Praise Him Praise Him Praise Him Praise Him
Praise the everlasting King

syllable: Ọ KAN mi yin Ọ ba ọ run,
Mu ọ rẹ wa sọ o dọ Rẹ;
'Wọ ta wo, san ta da ri ji,
Ta l'a ba ha yin ni Rẹ?
Yin O luwa, Yin O lu wa,
Yin Ọ ba Ai ni pẹ kun
Yin O luwa, Yin O lu wa,
Yin Ọ ba Ai ni pẹ kun

hymns.title: A F'ỌPẸ F'ỌLỌRUN, L'ỌKAN ATI OHUN WA
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 44  H.C. 55 P.M.   
(FE 110) 
“Ọlọrun yi, Ọlọrun wa ni lai ati lai-lai”  - Ps. 48:14
stanzas: A F'ỌPẸ f'Ọlọrun,|L'ọkan ati ohun wa;|Ẹni n s'ohun 'yanu,|N'nu Ẹni t'arayé n yọ;|Gba t'a wa l'ọm'ọwọ,|Oun na l'o n tọju wa,|O si nf'ẹbun ifẹ,|Se 'tọju wa sibẹ.
Ọba Onib'ọrẹ,|Ma fi wa silẹ lailai;|Ayọ ti ko l'opin,|Oun 'bukun y'o jẹ tiwa;|Pa wa mọ n'nu ore,|To wa gba 'ba damu,|Yọ wa ninu ibi,|Layé ati l'ọrun.
K'a fi iyin oun ọpẹ,|F'Ọlọrun Baba, Ọmọ;|At' Ẹmi Mimọ,|Ti o ga julọ l'ọrun;|Ọlọrun kan lailai,|T'ayé at'ọrun mbọ,|Bẹ lo wa d'isinyi,|Bẹni y'o wa lailai.

english.title: NOW THANK WE ALL OUR GOD, WITH HEART AND HANDS AND VOICES
stanzas: NOW thank we all our God|With heart and hands and voices|Who wondrous things hath done|In whom His world rejoices|Who from our mother's arms|Hath bless‘d us on our way|With countless gifts of love|And still is ours today.

Oh may this bounteous God|Through all our life be near us,|With ever joyful hearts|And blessed peace to cheer us,|And keep us in His grace|And guide us when perplex'd|And free us from all ills|In this world and the next,
All praise and thanks to God|The Father now be given|The Son, and Holy Ghost|Supreme in highest heaven|The One eternal God|Whom earth and heaven adore|For this it was, is now|And shall be evermore.

verse: NOW thank we all our God
With heart and hands and voices
Who wondrous things hath done
In whom His world rejoices
Who from our mother's arms
Hath bless‘d us on our way
With countless gifts of love
And still is ours today
