syllable: A F'Ọ PẸ f'Ọ lọ run,
L'ọ kan a ti o hun wa;
Ẹ nin s'o hun 'ya nu,
N'nu Ẹ ni t'a ra yén yọ;
Gba t'a wa l'ọ m'ọ wọ,
Oun na l'on tọ ju wa,
O sin f'ẹ bun i fẹ,
Se 'tọ ju wa si bẹ.

hymns.title: JESU, MO WA SỌDỌ RẸ, JẸ KI N LE MA TỌ Ọ LẸYIN
hymns.description:
(FE 111) 
“Gba a gbọ”. - Job. 5:27
stanzas: JESU, mo wa sọdọ rẹ,|Jẹ ki n le ma tọ Ọ lẹyin,|Bi 'ni mi gbogbo segbe,|Ti ero mi gbogbo si pin.
Keferi, Imale, ẹ wa,|Onigbagbọ, ma kalọ,|K'a jọ yin Ọlọrun wa,|K'a le d'ade ni 'kẹhin.
A dupẹ lọwọ Ọlọrun,|T'o fi Jesu Kristi fun wa,|Lati ra arayé pada,|Lọwọ ẹsẹ at'esu.
Ẹgbe Séráfù damure,|Ẹgbe Kérúbù kun f'adura,|Olugbala yoo gba wa la,|Oluwosan yoo wo wa san.
Ọjọ mbọ t'ayé yoo pin,|Ẹ sọra ẹyin Mimọ;|K'ẹni ’waju tẹ siwaju,|K'ẹni ẹhin ma jafara.
Awọn to sẹgun saju,|Wọn n wo wa b'a ti n yọ loni,|Wọn nkan sara si wa wi pé,|Tẹ siwaju, ma fa s'ẹyin.
Ma siyemeji lọna yii,|B'o ti wu k'o le fun ọ to;|Séráfù mase foya,|Adun y'o kẹhin ayé rẹ.
Nigba ti 'pe kẹhin ba dun,|Jesu y'o ko wa de Kenaani,|Jẹ ka l'ayọ lọdọ Rẹ,|Fi wa s'agbala itura.
Ẹ f'ogo fun Baba loke,|Ẹ f'ogo fun Ọmọ pẹlu;|Ẹ f'ogo fun Ẹmi Mimọ,|Mẹtalọkan lọpẹ yẹ fun.
chorus: Ẹ yin logo, ẹyin Mimọ,|Ẹ f'ọpẹ fun Baba loke,|Da  wa si n'Ijọ Séráfù,|Ni 'kẹhin gba ọkan wa la.

english.title: CHRIST JESUS COME I UNTO THEE, CLOSELY LET ME FOLLOW BEHIND
english.description: FE 111, SE 94
stanzas: CHRIST Jesus come I unto Thee|Closely let me follow behind|Though my possession increaseth|And my every thought awakened.
Pagans and all moslem come,|And all Chris'tians come along;|Let's adore our only God|May our heads be crowned at the end.
We give praises unto our God,|Who offered Christ Jesus to us|To redeem the earthly ones|From the pangs of sin and Satan.
Seraph band your girdle fasten|Band of Cherub fervently pray|Christ the Saviour shall redeem us|Divine Healer shall heal us all.
The world shall soon cease to be|Lo! beware all Oh ye saints|Those before us keep marching on|Never weary those behind us.
Those who were before victorious|Gaze at us as we now rejoice|Hailing and encouraging us|Forward ever backward never.
Doubtful never be on this way|However tough it seems to be|Seraphim Band be courageous|We shall savour sweet taste at last.
When the last trump shall sound to call|Jesus will take us to Canaan|Let's rejoice Lord in your bossom|Lead us to your fold of comfort.
Glory be to Father above|Glory be to His only Son|Glory be to Holy Spirit|All praises to the Trinity.
chorus: Praise Him loudly, oh all ye Saints|Offer thanks to Father above|Spare our souls in Seraph Band|At the end Lord save our souls.

verse: CHRIST Jesus come I unto Thee
Closely let me follow behind
Though my possession increaseth
And my every thought awakened
chorus: Praise Him loudly oh all ye Saints
Offer thanks to Father above
Spare our souls in Seraph Band
At the end Lord save our souls

syllable: JE E SU mo wa, sọ o dọ rẹ,
Jẹ e kin le ma, tọ Ọ lẹ yin,
Bi i 'ni mi gbo, gbo o se gbe,
Ti i e ro mi, gbo gbo si pin.
Ẹ e yin lo go, ẹ e yin Mi mọ,
Ẹ e f'ọ pẹ fun, Ba ba lo ke,
Da wa si n'I jọ, Sé e rá fù,
Ni i 'kẹ hin gba, ọ kan wa la.

hymns.title: Ẹ JẸ KA JUMỌ F'ỌPẸ F'ỌLỌRUN, ORIN IYIN, AT'ỌPẸ LO YẸ WA
hymns.description:
(FE 112) 
“Ẹ fi ọpẹ fun Oluwa” - Ps. 105:1
stanzas: Ẹ JẸ ka jumọ f'ọpẹ f'Ọlọrun,|Orin iyin, at'ọpẹ lo yẹ wa,|Iyanu n'ifẹ Rẹ si gbogbo wa,|Ẹ kọrin 'yin s'Ọba Olore wa.
Ki l'a fi san j'awọn t'iku ti pa?|Iwọ lo f'ọwọ wọ wa di oni;|'Wọ lo n sọ wa to n gba wa lọw'ewu,|Ẹ kọrin 'yin s'Olutọju wa.
Gbogbo alaye l'O n fun l'Ounjẹ wọn,|Iwọ lo n pese f'onikaluku,|Iwọ lo n sikẹ ẹda Rẹ gbogbo,|Ẹ kọrin 'yin si Onibu-ọrẹ.
Ohun wa ko dun to lati kọrin,|Ẹnu wa ko gboro to fun ọpẹ,|B'awa n'ẹgbẹrun ahọn nikọkan,|Wọn kere ju lati gb'ọla Rẹ ga.
Gbe wa leke 'soro l'ọjọ gbogbo,|Fun wa l'ayọ at'alafia Rẹ,|Jẹ k'ari 'bukun gba lọ'le wa,|K'a ba le wa f'ogo f'orukọ Rẹ.
Ẹyin Angẹli l'ọrun wa ba wa gbe,|Orin iyin at'ọpẹ l'o yẹ wa,|S'Ọba wa aiku Ọlọla-julọ,|Ọba wa Jehofa t'o j'Ọba.
chorus: Halleluyah! Ogo ni fun Baba|A f'ijo, ilu yin Ọlọrun wa,|Alaye ni o yin Ọ bo ti yẹ,|Halleluyah! Ogo ni fun Baba

english.title: LET US TOGETHER GIVE THANKS TO OUR GOD, SONGS OF PRAISE AND THANKS WE SHOULD GIVE
stanzas: LET us together give thanks to our God|Songs of praise and thanks we should give|Wonderful in His love unto us all|Sing praises to our benevolent God.
How are we better than those who are dead|You have shown us kindness up till today|You protect us and save us from dangers|Sing praises to Him who’s caring for us.
All the living you give their daily bread|It is you who provide for every one|It is you who bless all your creatures|Sing praises to Him who‘s caring for us.
Our voices are not sweet enough to sing|Our mouths are not wide enough for thanks|Though we have thousand tongues each everyone|They're too small to appreciate your good deeds.
Let us be above danger every day|Let us have joy and have your peaceful mind|Let us all have mercy on our way home|So we can come give glory to your name.
Oh you angels from Heaven be with us|Song of praise and thanks we should give|To our Father immortal and blessful|Our King Jehovah who is reigning.
chorus: Halleluyah, glory be to our God|We'll with drumming and dancing praise Our Lord|The living should praise thee as it should be|Halleluyah, glory be to our God

verse: LET us together give thanks to our God
Songs of praise and thanks we should give
Wonderful in His love unto us all
Sing praises to our benevolent God
chorus: Halleluyah glory be to our God
We'll with drumming and dancing praise Our Lord
The living should praise thee as it should be
Halleluyah glory be to our God

syllable: Ẹ JẸ ka ju mọ f'ọ pẹ f'Ọ lọ run,
O rin i yin, a t'ọ pẹ lo yẹ wa,
I ya nu n'i fẹ Rẹ si gbo gbo wa,
Ẹ kọ rin 'yin s'Ọ ba O lo re wa.
Hal le lu yah! O go ni fun Ba ba
A f'i jo, i lu yin Ọ lọ run wa,
A la ye ni o yin Ọ bo ti yẹ,
Hal le lu yah! O go ni fun Ba ba

hymns.title: GBOGBO ẸYIN ISẸ OLUWA, Ẹ F'IBUKUN F'OLUWA
ỌLỌRUN ẸLẸDA T'O DA'JỌ SERAF', ATI KÉRÚBÙ S'ORILẸ EDE AYÉ
stanzas: ỌLỌRUN Ẹlẹda t'o da'jọ Seraf'|Ati Kérúbù s'orilẹ ede ayé,|Lat'ọwọ Jesu Olugbala ọwọn;|Awa n yin orukọ Rẹ logo
Nibo l'awọn ayanfẹ Ọlọrun wa?|Ẹ wa gbọ ohun Olusọ-aguntan yi:|Ẹ ronupiwada, ẹ wa w'ọkọ naa;|Igbala na ku si atẹlẹwọ.
Ẹgbẹ Kérúbù dupẹ lọwọ Ọlọrun,|Tẹsiwaju ninu ogun ẹmi jija,|Ẹ fẹrẹ gbo'hun Oluwa Jesu,|Wi pé, o seun, ọmọ rere
Ẹyin ti n kọja lọ ya sọdọ Jesu,|Lati gb'ore-ọfẹ n'nu Ijọ yi,|Mase kẹgan ọkọ igbala 'kẹhin,|T'Ọlọrun Mẹtalọkan fun wa.
Jesu Oluwa mbọ wa j'Ọba layé,|Larin Ẹgbẹ Kérúbù ati Séráfù,|Ẹgbẹrun ọdun ni 'jỌba Rẹ ninu,|Ijọ Mimọ at'oke wa yi.
Jesu Kristi Oluwa Ọba Ogo,|L'ọpa iye ainipẹkun wa lọwọ Rẹ;|Yoo ko gbogbo awọn t'o gbagbọ lọ,|Siwaju itẹ Baba l'oke.
chorus: A! ẹ ku ayọ, ẹ ku ayọ )|Ijọ Séráfù            ) 2ce|A! ẹ ku ayọ, ẹ ku ayọ )|Ijọ Kérúbù            )

english.title: GOD OUR CREATOR WHO ESTABLISHED SERAPH, AND CHERUBIM THROUGHOUT ALL THE UNIVERSE
english.description:
PM (FE 114)
"Serve the Lord with gladness, come before his
presence with singing" - Ps. 100:2
stanzas: GOD our Creator who established Seraph|And Cherubim throughout all the universe|From great Prophet Moses Orimolade|We do praise and magnify Thy Name.
Where are all the elected children of God|Listen to the Shepherd’s voice now calling you;|Repent and come enter the last Ark of Christ|The time of judgement is right at hand.
Cherub and Seraph give thanks to our Father|Continue with courage in the Holy task;|You will soon hear the voice of our Lord Saviour|Saying come and receive the reward.
All who are passing-by come to the Saviour|To receive the new Grace of the Holy Band|Do not miss this Holy Ark of Christ Jesus|That God of Moses descend to us.
Jesus our Lord shall come to reign in the world,|in the Midst of Cherubim and Seraphim;|A thousand year shall He reign here undisturbed|In the midst of the Band here below.
Jesus Christ the Lord of Glory and of Grace|With whom is the path of everlasting life;|He will take to Him all that believe His words,|To our Heavenly Father above.
chorus: A! Rejoice, rejoice,|Band of Seraph|A! Rejoice, rejoice|Band of Cherub

verse: GOD our Creator who established Seraph
And Cherubim throughout all the universe
From great Prophet Moses Orimolade
We do praise and magnify Thy Name
chorus: A Rejoice rejoice
Band of Seraph
A Rejoice rejoice
Band of Cherub

syllable: Ọ LỌ RUN Ẹ lẹ da t'o da'jọ Se raf'
A ti Ké rú bù s'o ri lẹ e de a yé,
La t'ọ wọ Je su O lu gba la ọ wọn;
A wan yin o ru kọ Rẹ lo go
A! ẹ ku a yọ, ẹ ku a yọ,
I jọ Sé ráf
A! ẹ ku a yọ, ẹ ku a yọ,
I jọ Ké rúb.

hymns.title: ẸYIN IJỌ SÉRÁFÙ, WA FI AYỌ YIN HAN
ẸYIN ẸGBẸ SÉRÁFÙ, ATI ẸGBẸ KÉRÚBÙ
hymns.description:
(FE 116) 
“Jẹ ki awọn eniyan ki o yin Ọ, Ọlọrun”  - Ps. 67:3
stanzas: ẸYIN Ẹgbẹ Séráfù,|Ati Ẹgbẹ Kérúbù,|Ẹ fi ọpẹ fun Ọlọrun,|T'o d'ẹmi wa si d'oni.
Lootọ l'esu gbogun,|Sugbọn ko le sẹgun,|Lagbara Mẹtalọkan wa,|Awa yoo bori rẹ.
Ẹlomiran ti ku,|Ẹlomiran w'ẹwọn,|Ẹlomiran ń rin ni ilẹ,|Ti moto ti tẹ pa.
Ọpẹ ni f'Ọlọrun,|F'anu Rẹ l'ori wa,|O gbọ tirẹ, O gbọ temi,|Ogo ni f'Ọlọrun.
Ọlọrun alaanu,|Siju aanu wo wa,|Jọwọ pese fun aini wa|K'ile r'oju fun wa.
F'ilera f'alaisan,|Jesu Olugbala;|Jẹki awọn alaisan,|Ri 'wosan lọdọ Rẹ.
Mu ileri Rẹ sẹ,|Jehovah Tabbikubb,|K'awọn afọju le riran,|K'alailera k'o san.
Ọpọ ti sako lọ,|Wọn ko si mọna mọ,|Ẹlomiran j'asiwaju,|Sugbọn o fa s'ẹhin.
Jehovah-Jire wa,|Pese fun aini wa,|Pese ọmọ f'awọn agan,|Jẹk'a ri 'bukun gba.
Ọlọrun alaanu,|Dariji ẹda Rẹ;|Mase f'ẹsẹ bi arayé|Jẹki ojo k'o rọ.
F'ibukun Rẹ f'Ọba,|At'awọn Igbimọ,|F'alafia fun ilu wa,|K'a ma rogun adaja.
Ẹ f'ogo fun Baba|Ẹ f'ogo fun Ọmọ|Ẹ f'ogo fun Ẹmi Mimọ,|Mẹtalọkan lailai.
chorus: Emi ko le sai sọpẹ (2ce)|Ore t'Ọlọrun se fun mi,|Emi ko le sai sọpẹ.

english.title: ALL YE BAND OF SERAPHIM, AND YE FOLD OF CHERUBIM
stanzas: ALL ye Band of Seraphim|And ye fold of Cherubim|Give all praises unto our God|Who spared us till this day.
Satan truely rages|But can not overcome|By the power of our trinity|We shall be victorious.
Though one else had passed on|Others incarcerated|And some other throd on the ground|Got knocked down and passed on.
Thanks we give unto God|For His mercies on us|For all our request He granted|Glory be unto God.
Merciful Father God|Be merciful to us|Provide for all our daily needs|Let Thy peace dwell with us.
Healing grant to the sick|Jesus Christ Saviour Lord|Let all the Sick receive from Thee|Divine, perfect healing.
Divine promise fulfil|Jehovah Thabbicubb|Restore the sight to all the blind|And give strength to the weak.
Many had gone astray|They can not find The Way|Many leaders supposedly|Weary and retreating.
Jehovah Jireh God|Provide for all our needs|Bless the barren With good children|Thy blessings let's receive.
Merciful father God|Forgive us all our sins|Do not recompense all our sins|Rain Thy blessings on us.
Blessing give unto Kings|And to the council too|Let peace supreme reign in our land|Cast civil strife away.
Glory to Father be|Give glory to the Son|Glory be to Holy Spirit|Eternal Trinity.
chorus: I cannot but offer thanks|I cannot but offer thanks|For all good receiveth of God|I cannot but offer thanks

verse: ALL ye Band of Seraphim
And ye fold of Cherubim
Give all praises unto our God
Who spared us till this day
chorus: I cannot but offer thanks
I cannot but offer thanks
For all good receiveth of God
I cannot but offer thanks

syllable: Ẹ YIN Ẹ gbẹ Sé rá fù,
A ti Ẹ gbẹ Ké rú bù,
Ẹ fi ọ pẹ fun Ọ lọ run,
T'o d'ẹ mi 'si d'o ni.
E mi ko le sai sọ pẹ
E mi ko le sai sọ pẹ
O re t'Ọ lọ run se fun mi,
E mi ko le sai sọ pẹ.

hymns.title: NI TOOTỌ, ARA NI TOOTỌ O, BABA WA SEUN FUN WA KA F'IYIN FUN
OLUWA OKE A YIN Ọ O, A TUN SỌPẸ
ỌLỌRUN SÉRÁFÙ AWA N S'ỌPẸ, ỌLỌRUN KÉRÚBÙ OGO IYIN FUN Ọ
OLUWA L'OLUS'AGUNTAN MI, EMI K'O SALAINI
hymns.description:
(FE 120) 
Ohun Orin: Lọ Kede Ayọ Naa (317)
stanzas: Oluwa l'Olus'aguntan mi,|Emi k'o salaini,|O mu mi dubulẹ 'nu papa oko,|Tutu minimini.
O mu mi lọ si iha omi,|Idakẹ rọrọ si de,|O si tu ọkan mi lara,|Ni ipa orukọ Rẹ.
Ni tootọ bi mo tilẹ ń rin,|Larin afonifoji,|Emi ki yoo bẹru ibi kan,|Nitori o wa pẹlu mi.
Ogo Rẹ ati ọpa Rẹ,|Wọn si n tu mi ninu,|Iwọ tẹ tabili ounjẹ silẹ,|Ni iwaju mi.
Ni tootọ ire ati anu,|Ni yoo ma tọ mi lehin,|Emi o gbẹkẹle Oluwa,|Ni gbogbo ọjọ ayé mi.
K'a f'ogo fun Baba wa loke,|K'a f'ogo fun Ọmọ Rẹ,|K'a fogo fun Ẹmi Mimọ,|Mẹtalọkan l'ọpẹ yẹ
chorus: Awa dupẹ, at'ọpẹ da,|Fun idasi Rẹ fun wa,|Larin Ijọ Séráfù.

english.title: LORD JESUS CHRIST IS MY BLESSED SAVIOUR, I SHALL NEVER BE IN WANT
english.description: Tune: Lo kede ayo na fun gbogbo aye (317)
stanzas: LORD Jesus Christ is my blessed Saviour|I shall never be in want|He maketh me to lie down peacefully|In green pastures of the Lord.
He leadeth me beside the 'still waters|And lo! still effect prevailed|And He restoreth my gentle soul|By the grace of His name.
Though I walk in valley of shadow of death|The valley where evil abound|No fear shall my gentle soul entertain|Because Thou art with my Soul.
Thy rod and Thy staff they shall comfort me|And my soul shall find relief|Thou preparest a table before me|In the presence of my foes.
Thy goodness and mercy shall follow me|From now and till eternity|And all my trust shall ever be in the Lord|From now and for ever more.
Glory be to our Holy Father above|Glory be to His Holy Son|And glory be to the Holy Spirit|Praises be to Trinity.
chorus: We offer Thee Thanks|Re-assuringly|For Thy saving grace upon our souls|In the Band of Seraphim

verse: LORD Jesus Christ is my blessed Saviour
I shall never be in want
He maketh me to lie down peacefully
In green pastures of the Lord
chorus: We offer Thee Thanks
Re-assuringly
For Thy saving grace upon our souls
In the Band of Seraphim

hymns.title: OGO FUN ẸLẸDA MIMỌ L'OKE, ẸNI T'O GBA WA LỌWỌ IPARUN
Ẹ JẸ KA F'INU DIDUN, YIN OLUWA OLORE
stanzas: Ẹ JẸ ka f'inu didun,|Yin Oluwa Olore;|Anu Rẹ o wa titi,|L'ododo dajudaju
Oun, nipa agbara Rẹ,|F'imọlẹ s'ayé titun;|Anu Rẹ o wa titi,|L'ododo dajudaju
O mbọ awọn alaini,|Ati gbogbo alaye,|Anu Rẹ o wa titi,|L'ododo dajudaju
O mbukun ayanfẹ Rẹ,|Ni aginju ayé yi,|Anu Rẹ o wa titi,|L'ododo dajudaju
Ẹ jẹ ja f'inu didun,|Yin Oluwa Olore,|Anu Rẹ o wa titi,|L'ododo dajudaju

english.title: LET US WITH A GLADSOME MIND, PRAISE THE LORD FOR HE IS KIND
english.description:
H.C. 574, 75 (FE 122)
"Let us with a gladsome mind praise the Lord”
- Ps. 136:1
stanzas: LET us with a gladsome mind|Praise the Lord for He is kind.|For His mercy aye endure|Ever faithful, ever sure.
He with all commanding might|Fill'd the new-made world with light.|For His mercy aye endure|Ever faithful, ever sure.
All things living He doth feed|His full hand supplies their need.|For His mercy aye endure|Ever faithful, ever sure.
Let us, therefore, warble forth|His great majesty and worth.|For His mercy aye endure|Ever faithful, ever sure.
Let us with of mortal mind|Praise the Lord for He is kind.|For His mercy aye endure|Ever faithful, ever sure.

verse: LET us with a gladsome mind
Praise the Lord for He is kind
For His mercy aye endure
Ever faithful ever sure

syllable: Ẹ JẸ ka f'i nu di dun,
Yin O lu wa O lo re;
A nu Rẹ o wa ti ti,
L'o do do da ju da ju

hymns.title: OLUWA, YE WA GBA WA O BABA IRE
FI IYIN FUN OLUS' AGUNTAN ISRAELI, ẸNI TI O DA IJỌ YI SILẸ
KÉRÚBÙ ATI SÉRÁFÙ, Ẹ FUN IRUGBIN RERE S'AYÉ
hymns.description:
(FE 125) 
Tune: Children of Jerusalem. 
“Ẹ jẹ ki imọlẹ yin mọlẹ.” - Matt. 5:16
stanzas: KÉRÚBÙ ati Séráfù,|Ẹ fun irugbin rere s'ayé,|Ẹyin l'a pe lati s'awọn|Ti yoo pade Oluwa l'oke.
Onigbagbọ, ẹ ji giri,|K'a fi iwa ẹsẹ s'ilẹ,|K'a se ifẹ Oluwa wa,|K'a le r'oju rere Ọlọrun.
Onigbagbọ, ẹ gb' adura,|Ẹ fi ọkan funfun sisẹ,|Ẹ gb'awẹ pẹlu iwa mimọ,|Eyi ni Jesu wa se l'aye.
Ẹyin araye, ẹ tun aye se,|Fun bibọ jesu Oluwa -|K'ẹsẹ dinku, k'ajakalẹ arun,|Ma ti wa lọ s'ọrun apadi.
Onigbagbọ bẹru Ọlọrun,|Fẹran ọmọnikeji rẹ,|Mase pẹgan mase binu,|Ọlọrun adura rẹ.
Ọpọ idanwo l'o wa l'aye,|Sugbọn eyi t'o buruju,|K'a ma r'owo k'aisan de ni|JAH jọwọ ma fi eyi se wa.
chorus: Gbọ, gbọ, gbọ b'awọn|Séráfù ti n ke,|Gbọ, gbọ, gbọ b'awọn|Kérúbù ti n ke|Halleluyah, Halleluyah,|Halleluyah, f'Ọba wa.

english.title: CHERUBIM AND SERAPHIM, SOW PLEASANT SEEDLINGS ON EARTH
english.description: Tune: Children of Jerusalem
stanzas: CHERUBIM and Seraphim|Sow pleasant seedlings on earth|To thee is the most clarion call|To all who shall rapture with the Lord.
O! ye Christians be awake|Forsake now all we our sins|Let the will of God be done|That we may find favour with our God.
Be prayerful ye Christians|With crystal clear conscience work|With all holiness be in fast|These the mission of Christ Jesus here.
Ye of earth make it fit to live|Ready for coming of our Lord|Lest sin and epidemic cease|Lest we be put into the abyss.
Fear the Lord all ye Christian|Agape love to brethren|Do not despise and anger not|God will grant all your supplications
Multiple temptations here abound|But the vilest of it all|Penury and all afflictions|JAH may these not be our portion.
chorus: Hark, Hark, hark call of|Seraphim above|Hark, Hark, hark call of|Cherubim above|Halleluyah, Halleluyah,|Halleluyah to our King

verse: CHERUBIM and Seraphim
Sow pleasant seedlings on earth
To thee is the most clarion call
To all who shall rapture with the Lord
chorus: Hark Hark hark call of
Seraphim above
Hark Hark hark call of
Cherubim above
Halleluyah Halleluyah
Halleluyah to our King

hymns.title: K'A FI ỌPẸ FUN OLUWA, FUN GBOGBO ỌPỌ ANU RẸ
hymns.description:
(FE 126) 
“Ki a fi ọpẹ fun Oluwa” 
Ohun Orin: Ẹ fi ọpẹ fun Ọlọrun wa
stanzas: K'A fi ọpẹ fun Oluwa,|Fun gbogbo ọpọ anu Rẹ,|K'a wa di ihamọra wa,|Lati b'esu jagun.|Egbe: Esu n'ipa sugbọn a o sẹgun,|Ni agbara Mẹtalọkan,|Ileri ti Oluwa sẹ,|Y'o wa sibẹ titi.
Gbogbo ayé ẹ ho f'ayọ,|Ki gbogbo wa si kun fun 'sẹ,|Ki a ja titi de opin,|K'a si fi 'da le'lẹ.|Egbe: Lẹsẹ Kristi Ọmọ Baba,|Ni ibi awọn Angeli n yọ,|K'a ba wọn yin Baba loke,|Ọmọ, Ẹni lailai.
Awa ọmọ Ijọ Séráfù,|A fi ogo fun Oluwa,|T'o jẹ k'ẹmi tun ri ẹmi,|Ogo f'orukọ Rẹ.|Egbe: Gb'oju s'oke wo asia,|Fun gbogbo awọn t'o segun,|Ẹyin ara ẹ ku abọ,|Ki Baba pẹlu yin.
Awọn t'o ti sẹgun saaju,|Wọn n wo wa bi awa ti n ja,|Wọn si n fi ohun kan wi pé,|Ara ma jafara.|Egbe: Nitor' akoko diẹ lo ku,|Ti ayé yi yoo kọja lọ,|Bi asẹgun a daju pe,|A o gb'ade iye.
Awa si tun ki asaju wa,|Ati awọn 'mọ ogun rẹ,|Ara ẹ ku isẹ ẹmi,|K'a gb'ọwọ lọwọ ara wa.|Egbe: Ẹ ku abọ ẹyin ku ile|K'Ọlọrun pẹlu gbogbo wa,|K'o si fi ade Ogo Rẹ,|De gbogbo wa lori.
Ọpẹ ni fun Mẹtalọkan,|T'o ba wa fọ 'tẹgun esu.|Halleluyah s'Ọlọrun wa,|Oju ti Lusifa.|Egbe: Ara ẹ jo pẹlu ayọ,|Ara ẹ gbe ohun s'oke,|Ki Baba fun wa ni 'fẹ Rẹ.|Eyi ti ko l'ẹgbẹ.

english.title: LET US OFFER THANKS UNTO THE LORD, FOR HIS MERCIES ABUNDANT
stanzas: LET us offer thanks unto the Lord|For His mercies abundant|Let us in armour be ready|To fight and conquer Satan.|Chorus: Satan has strength but can't|O 'ercome|By the power of Almighty God|The promises made by our Lord|Shall endure for ever more.

All of the earth rejoice and be glad|Cheerfulness now let us work|Let’s fight on now and to the end|Till we lay down all our sword.|Chorus: At the feet of Christ Son of God|Amidst the rejoicing Angels|That we may praise Father above|Son and Spirit for ever.

We members of the Seraphim Band|Glory we give to our Lord|Who spread us and again we meet|All glory be to Thy name.|Chorus: Look up and watch the banners fly|Unto all that are victorious|Welcome we say unto our brethren|Father God abide with you.

Those who are before victorious|Are watching as we fight on|In oneness they chorus to us|Brethren the time is now at hand.|Chorus: Be courageous, weary not|The earth will soon cease to exist|Victorious shall we all be crowned|Crown of glory it will be.

We hail thee our spiritual head|And also the lieutenants|For the work of Holy Spirit|Pleasantries we all exchange.|Chorus: We bid thee welcome all brethren|Abide with us Almighty God|And adorn us all on our head|The crown of glory we plead.

Thanks we give to the Trinity|For dislodging satan‘s den|Halleluyah to God above|As Satan is put to shame.|Chorus: Joyfully dance, befilled with joy|Brethren chorus in joyful song|May love of God abide with us|That will flow for ever more.

verse: LET us offer thanks unto the Lord
For His mercies abundant
Let us in armour be ready
To fight and conquer Satan
Chorus: Satan has strength but can't
O 'ercome
By the power of Almighty God
The promises made by our Lord
Shall endure for ever more

hymns.title: GBOGB' ỌMỌ IJỌ SÉRÁFÙ, ATI KÉRÚBÙ L'AYÉ
hymns.description:
(FE 127) 
“Fi iyin fun Oluwa Iwọ ọkan mi”  - Ps. 146:1 
Ohun Orin: Ẹ ti gbọ orin ilẹ na.
stanzas: GBOGB' ọmọ Ijọ Séráfù,|Ati Kérúbù l'ayé,|K'ẹ da'lu ati 'jo yin pọ,|K'ẹ si yin Ọba-Ogo.
Larin wahala ati 'ja,|Larin idẹkun esu,|Larin isimu at'ẹgan,|Ni Séráfù n y'Oluwa.
Ọbangiji Ọba Mimọ,|Ni 'yin at'ọpẹ yẹ fun,|K'a mu kèéta gbogbo kuro,|K'a le gb'ade irawọ.
Baba Ogo dariji wa,|Ọmọ Mimọ da wa si,|Ẹmi Mimọ radọ bo wa,|K'a si jogun 'tẹ ogo.
chorus: Yin Oluwa, yin l'ẹgbẹgbẹ,|Yin Oluwa lọkọọkan,|Ọba mimọ l'Ọlọrun|Yin Oluwa 'wọ ọkan mi.

english.title: ALL MEMBERS OF BAND OF SERAPHIM, AND THE CHERUBIM ON EARTH
stanzas: ALL members of Band of Seraphim|And the Cherubim on earth|Rejoice with beats and dancing steps|Praises be to glorious King.
Amidst much trouble and more strife|And the snare of the devil|Amidst critics and slothful men|Doth Seraphim praise the Lord.
Omnipresent, Most Holy King|To Him all praise and thanks be|Let’s be not antagonistic|Stary crown we may adorn.
Glorious Father our sins forgive|This all we plead Holy Son|Shield and guard us Holy Spirit|That we all Thine heir will be.
chorus: Give praises to God Band by Band|Individually praise the Lord|Almighty God is a Holy Lord|Oh my soul praise ye the Lord.

verse: ALL members of Band of Seraphim
And the Cherubim on earth
Rejoice with beats and dancing steps
Praises be to glorious King
chorus: Give praises to God Band by Band
Individually praise the Lord
Almighty God is a Holy Lord
Oh my soul praise ye the Lord

hymns.title: Ẹ JẸ K'A YIN ỌLỌRUN WA, ẸNI T'O WA L'OKE ỌRUN
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 550  t.H.C. 54  L.M (FE 128) 
“Ẹ fi iyin fun Oluwa” - Ps. 146:1
stanzas: Ẹ JẸ k'a yin Ọlọrun wa,|Ẹni t'O wa l'oke ọrun,|T'O fi Ounjẹ fun eniyan|Ti O si fi fun ẹranko.
O si tẹ oju ọrun lọ,|O da orun oun osupa,|Isẹ ọwọ Rẹ n'irawọ,|Iye wọn awa ko le ka.
O si da ara eniyan,|O si fun wọn l'ẹmi pẹlu;|O si da ni daradara,|Bi o ti yẹ, bi 'ba ti wa.
Sugbọn eniyan dibajẹ,|Wọn si bọ sinu buburu;|Ere ẹsẹ ni wọn si n jẹ,|Ni wahala ati n'iku.
Sugbọn jẹ ka yin Ọlọrun,|Oun fun wa ni Kristi Jesu;|Lati wa awọn t'o ti nu,|Ninu ẹsẹ ti wọn ti n rin.

english.title: LET US GIVE PRAISES TO OUR GOD, WHO DWELLEST IN THE FIRMAMENT
english.description:
C.M.S 550 t.H.C.54 L.M (FE 128)
Tune L.M
stanzas: LET us give praises to our God|Who dwellest in the firmament|Who unto all men He doth feed|For all creatures He doth care.
The firmament He broadly decked|He made the brighter sun and moon|His handiwork the shinning stars|Numerical value unknown.
The mortal form of man He made|And the breath of life He doth give|A perfect living soul He made|As befitting as all we be.
But man vilest and rotten be|From evil to evil they go|The recompense for sin they reap|ln trouble and also in death.
But let us praise and honour God|For He sent Christ Jesus to us|To seek for all the straying souls|Redemption from sinful pathways.

verse: LET us give praises to our God
Who dwellest in the firmament
Who unto all men He doth feed
For all creatures He doth care

hymns.title: ỌLỌRUN ẸLẸDA WA, AWA N YIN Ọ, FUN ORE NLA YI
ỌKAN MI YIN OLUWA L'OGO, ỌBA IYANU TO WA MI RI
hymns.description:
(FE 130) 
“Ọkan mi yin Oluwa l'ogo” - Luku 1:46
stanzas: ỌKAN mi yin Oluwa l'ogo,|Ọba iyanu to wa mi ri,|N ó gb'agogo iyin y'ayé ka,|N ó fi iyin Atobiju han.
Iru 'fẹ ti Jesu fi pe mi,|Ohun iyanu l'o jẹ fun mi,|Ọna ti Jesu gba fi pe mi,|Ọna ara l'o tun jẹ fun mi.
Ọpẹ wo l'awa le fi fun Ọ?|Iwọ Ọba Ijọ Kérúbù,|Fun 'sẹgun abo rẹ larin wa,|Fun anu at'ore Rẹ gbogbo.
Iwọ ti o gba ọpẹ Noah,|Gb'ọpẹ iyin t'a mu wa fun Ọ,|Iwọ ti o gba ọrẹ Abel,|Ma jẹ k' ọpẹ wa k'o di 'bajẹ.
Ijọ Kérúbù ati Séráfù,|Ẹ ho, ẹ yọ si Ọba Ọrun,|Fun'sẹ Iyanu Rẹ larin wa,|Fun ore Rẹ alailosuwọn.
Ayọ ni fun wa l'ọjọ oni,|A f'ogo fun Baba at'Ọmọ,|A f'ogo fun Ọ Ẹmi Mimọ ,|Ọlọjọ oni gba ọpẹ wa.
chorus: Oluwa ọpẹ ni fun Ọ,|Fun ore-ọfẹ to fi pe mi,|Jesu di mi mu titi d'opin,|Ki n le jọba pẹlu Rẹ l'oke.

english.title: MY SOUL GIVE PRAISES UNTO THE LORD, WONDERFUL KING WHO SOUGHT AND FOUND ME
english.description:
(FE 130)
Tune: Okan mi yin Oluwa logo
stanzas: MY soul give praises unto the Lord|Wonderful King who sought and found me|Bell of praise I'll jingle round the world|Proclaiming the praise of Almighty.
Sort of love by which I Jesus called|Wonderful phenomenon it is|By what manner which I Jesus called|Wonderful manner it is to me.
What thanks can we ever bestow forth|Thou the King of the Seraphim Band|For Victory and protection on us|For Thy abundant mercies and grace
Thou who offering of Noah accept|All the offering we brought forth accept|Thou who offering of Abram accept|May not our offering be rejected.
Band of Cherubim and Seraphim|Chorus joyful song to King above|For His wonderful works amidst us|For divine immeasurable grace.
Joy to us today, and forever|Glory to Father and to the Son|Glory we give to Holy Spirit|Transcendental God our thanks accept.
chorus: O! Lord praises be unto Thee|For Thy grace by which I am so called|Lord Jesus uphold me to the end|That I may with you reign there above

verse: MY soul give praises unto the Lord
Wonderful King who sought and found me
Bell of praise I'll jingle round the world
Proclaiming the praise of Almighty
chorus: O Lord praises be unto Thee
For Thy grace by which I am so called
Lord Jesus uphold me to the end
That I may with you reign there above

syllable: Ọ KAN mi yin O lu wa l'o go,
Ọ ba i ya nu to wa mi ri,
N ó gb'a go go 'yin y'a yé ka,
N ó fi yin A to bi ju han.
O lu wa ọ pẹ ni fun Ọ,
Fun o re ọ fẹ to fi pe mi,
Je su di mi mu ti ti d'o pin,
Kin le jọ ba pẹ lu Rẹ l'o ke.

hymns.title: N'NU GBOGBO AYIDA AYÉ, AYỌ OUN WAHALA
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 555  H.C. 567 t.H.C. 520  C.M. (FE 131) 
“Emi o ma fi ibukun fun Oluwa 
Nigba gbogbo” - Ps. 34:1
stanzas: N'nu gbogbo ayida ayé,|Ayọ oun wahala;|Iyin Ọlọrun ni y'o ma,|Wa l'nu mi titi.
Gbe Oluwa ga pẹlu mi,|Ba mi gb'ookọ Rẹ ga;|N'nu wahala, 'gba mo ke pe,|O si yọ mi kuro.
Ogun Ọlọrun wa yika,|Ibugbe olootọ;|Ẹni ti o ba gbẹkẹle,|Yoo si ri 'gbala.
Sa dan ifẹ Rẹ wo lẹkan,|Gbana 'wọ o mọ pe,|Awọn t'o di ootọ rẹ mu,|Nikan l'ẹni 'bukun.
Ẹ bẹru Rẹ, ẹyin mimọ,|Ẹru miran ko si;|Sa jẹ ki'sin Rẹ j'ayọ yin,|Oun y'o ma tọju yin.

english.title: THROUGH ALL THE CHANGING SCENES OF LIFE, IN TROUBLE AND IN JOY
english.description:
H.C. 567. t.H.C. 520 C.M (FE)
"I will bless the Lord all all times"
- Ps.34:1
stanzas: THROUGH all the changing scenes of life|In trouble and in joy|The praises of my God shall still|My heart and tongue employ.
Of His deliverance I will boast,|Till all that are distressed|From my example comfort take,|And charm their griefs to rest.
O magnify the Lord with me,|With me exalt His name;|When in distress to Him I called,|He to my rescue came.
The host of God encamp around|The dwellings of the just|Deliverance He afford to all|Who on His succour trust.
O make but trial of His love;|Experience will decide|How blest they are, and only they,|Who in His truth confide.
Fear Him, ye saints, and you will then|Have nothing else to fear;|Make you His service your delight,|He'll make your wants His care.

verse: THROUGH all the changing scenes of life
In trouble and in joy
The praises of my God shall still
My heart and tongue employ

hymns.title: FUN ANU TO PỌ B'IYANRIN, TI MO N GBA L'OJUMỌ
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 556  H.C. 564  C.M. (FE 132) 
“Kini emi o fi fun Oluwa, nitori gbogbo 
ore Rẹ si mi?” - Ps. 116:12
stanzas: FUN anu to pọ b'iyanrin,|Ti mo n gba l'ojumọ;|Lat'ọdọ Jesu Oluwa,|Ki l'emi o fi fun?
Kini n ó fi fun Oluwa,|Lat' inu ọkan mi?|Ẹsẹ ti ba gbogbo rẹ jẹ,|Ko tilẹ ja mọ nkan.
Eyi l'ohun t'emi o se,|F'ohun to se fun mi,|Em'o mu ago igbala,|N ó ke pe Ọlọrun.
Eyi l'ọpẹ ti mo le da,|Emi osi, are:|Em'o ma sọrọ ẹbun Rẹ,|N ó si ma bere si.
Emi ko le sin b'o ti to,|N ko n'isẹ kan to pe;|Sugbọn em'o sogo yi pe,|'Gbese ọpẹ mi pọ.

english.title: FOR MERCIES COUNTLESS AS THE SANDS, WHICH DAILY I RECEIVE
stanzas: FOR mercies countless as the sands|which daily I receive|From Jesus, my redeemer's hands|My soul, what can'st thou give.
Alas, from such a heart as mine|What can I bring Him forth|My best is slain‘d and dyed with sin|My all is nothing worth.
Yet this acknowledgement I'll make|For all He has bestow'd|Salvation's sacred cup I’ll take|And call upon my God.
The host return for one like me|So wretched and so poor|Is from His gifts to draw a plea|And ask Him still for more.
I cannot serve Him as I ought|No works have I to boast|Yet would I glory in the thought|That I shall owe Him most.

verse: FOR mercies countless as the sands
which daily I receive
From Jesus my redeemer's hands
My soul what can'st thou give

syllable: FUN a nu to pọ b'i yan rin,
Ti mon gba l'o ju mọ;
La t'ọ dọ Je su O lu wa,
Ki l'e mi o fi fun?

hymns.title: EMI BA N'ẸGBẸRUN AHỌN, FUN 'YIN OLUGBALA
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 557  H.C. 565  C.M. (FE 133) 
“Emi mi si yọ si Ọlọrun Olugbala mi” - Luku 1:47
stanzas: EMI ba n'ẹgbẹrun ahọn,|Fun 'yin Olugbala;|Ogo Ọlọrun, Ọba mi,|Isẹgun ore Rẹ.
Jesu t'O s'ẹru wa d'ayọ,|T'O mu banujẹ tan;|Orin ni l'eti ẹlẹsẹ,|Iye at'ilera.
O sẹgun agbara ẹsẹ,|O da onde silẹ;|di Ẹjẹ Rẹ le w'eleri mọ,|p Ẹjẹ Rẹ seun fun mi.
O sọrọ oku gb'ohun Rẹ,|O gba ẹmi titun;|Onirobinujẹ y'ayọ,|Otosi si gbagbọ.
Odi, ẹ kọrin iyin Rẹ;|Aditi, gb'ohun Rẹ;|Afoju, Olugbala de,|Ayarọ, fo f'ayọ.
Baba mi at'Ọlọrun mi,|Fun mi n'iranwọ Rẹ;|Ki n le ro ka gbogbo ayé,|Ọla Orukọ Rẹ.

english.title: OH! FOR A THOUSAND TONGUE TO SING, MY DEAR REDEEMER'S PRAISE
english.description:
H.C. 565, C.M (FE 133)
"Oh Lord our Lord, how excellent is thy name on earth" - Ps.8:1
stanzas: OH! for a thousand tongue to sing|My dear redeemer's Praise|The glories of my God and King|The triumphs of His grace.
Jesus the name that charms our fears|That bids our sorrows cease|‘Tis music in the sinners ears|‘T'is life and health, and peace.
He breaks the power of cancelled sin|And sets the prisoner free|His blood can make the foulest clean|His blood availeth me.
He speaks and listening to His voice|New life the dead receive|The mournful broken hearts rejoice|The humble poor believe.
Hear Him ye dead, His praise ye dumb|Your loosened tongues employ|Ye blind behold your Saviour come|And leap ye lame for joy.
My gracious Master and my God|Assist me to proclaim|And spread through all the earth abroad|The honours of His Name.

verse: OH for a thousand tongue to sing
My dear redeemer's Praise
The glories of my God and King
The triumphs of His grace

syllable: E MI ba n'ẹ gbẹ run a họn,
Fun 'yin O lu gba la;
O go Ọ lọ run, Ọ ba mi,
I sẹ gun o re Rẹ.

hymns.title: Ẹ WOLẸ F'ỌBA OLOGO JULỌ, Ẹ KỌRIN IPA ATI IFẸ RẸ
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 560   H.C. 579, t.H.C. 123, 10s  11s (FE 134) 
“Oluwa Ọlọrun mi, iwọ tobi jọjọ” - Ps. 104:1
stanzas: Ẹ WOLẸ f'Ọba Ologo julọ,|Ẹ kọrin ipa ati ifẹ Rẹ;|Alabo wa ni at'Ẹni Igbani,|O n gbe 'nu ogo, Elẹru ni iyin.
Ẹ sọ t'ipa Rẹ, ẹ sọ t'ore Rẹ,|'Molẹ l'asọ Rẹ, kọbi Rẹ ọrun,|Ara ti n san ni kẹkẹ 'binu Rẹ jẹ,|Ipa ọna Rẹ ni a ko si le mọ.
Ayé yi pẹlu ẹkun 'yanu rẹ,|Ọlọrun agbara Rẹ l'o da wọn;|O fi idi rẹ mulẹ ko si le yi,|O si f'okun se asọ igunwa.
Ẹnu ha le sọ ti itọju Rẹ?|Ninu afẹfẹ, ninu imọlẹ;|di Itọju Rẹ wa nin' odo t'o n san,|O si wa ninu iri ati ojo.
Awa erupẹ, aw'alailera,|'Wọ l'a gbẹkẹle, O ki o da ni;|Anu rẹ rọnu, o si le de opin,|Ẹlẹda, Alabo, Olugbala wa.
'Wọ Alagbara, Onifẹ julọ,|B'awọn angẹli to n yin Ọ loke,|Bẹ l'awa ẹda Rẹ, niwọn t'a le se,|A o ma juba Rẹ, a o ma yin Ọ.

english.title: O WORSHIP THE KING, ALL GLORIOUS ABOVE, O GRATEFULLY SING HIS POWER AND HIS LOVE
english.description:
H.C. 579, t.H.C. 123, 10s 11s
"O come, let us worship and bow down let us
kneel before the Lord our maker" - Ps. 95:6
stanzas: O worship the King, All glorious above;|O gratefully sing His power and His love,|Our shield and defender the ancient of days,|Pavilioned in splendour and girded with praise.
O tell of His might, O sing of His grace,|Whose robe is the light, whose canopy space;|His chariots of wrath the deep thunder-clouds form,|And dark is His path on the wings of the storm.
The earth Will its store of wonders untold,|Almighty! Thy power hath founded of old,|Hath established it fast by a changeless decree,|And round it hath cast, like a mantle, the sea.
The bountiful care what tongue can recite?|lt breathes in the air, it shines in the light,|It streams from the hills, it descends to the plain,|And sweetly distils in the dew and the rain.
Frail children of dust, and feeble as frail,|In Thee do we trust, nor find Thee to fail;|Thy mercies how tender how firm to the end,|Our Maker, Defender, Redeemer, and Friend.
O measureless Might! lneffable Love!|While angels delight to hymn Thee above,|The humbler creation, though feeble their lays,|With true adoration, shall lisp to Thy Praise.

verse: O worship the King All glorious above
O gratefully sing His power and His love
Our shield and defender the ancient of days
Pavilioned in splendour and girded with praise

syllable: Ẹ WO LẸ f'Ọ ba O lo go ju lọ,
Ẹ kọ rin i pa a ti i fẹ Rẹ;
Ẹ WO LẸ f'Ọ ba O lo go ju lọ,
Ẹ kọ rin i pa a ti i fẹ Rẹ;
A la bo, wa ni i (2ce)
a t'Ẹ ni I gba ni,
On gbe 'nu o go, E lẹ ru ni 'yin.

hymns.title: EWE TI ỌBA ỌRUN, KỌRIN DIDUN BE TI N LỌ
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 563  H.C. 372  S.O. ED 7s  (FE 135) 
“Iwọ ki ise ẹru mọ, iwọ di arole Ọlọrun nipasẹ Kristi” - Gal. 5:7
stanzas: EWE ti Ọba ọrun,|Kọrin didun be ti n lọ;|Kọrin 'yin Olugbala,|Ologo 'nu isẹ Rẹ.
A n lọ sọdọ Ọlọrun,|Lọna t'awọn Baba rin;|Wọn si n yọ; nisinsin yii,|Ayọ wọn l'awa o ri.
Kọrin agbo kekere,|Ẹ o sinmi n'itẹ Rẹ;|'Bit'a pese 'joko yin,|Ibẹ si n' ijọba yin.
W'Oke, ọmọ imọlẹ,|Ilu Sion wa lọọkan;|Ibẹ n'ile wa titi,|Ibẹ l'a o r'Oluwa.
Kérúbù, tẹsiwaju,|Séráfù, ma jafara,|Kristi Ọmọ Baba n wi,|Pe laifoya ka ma lọ.
Jesu, a n lọ l'asẹ Rẹ,|A kọ'hun gbogbo sile;|Iwọ ma j'amọna wa,|A o si ma ba ọ lọ.
A f'ogo fun Baba wa,|A f'ogo fun Ọmọ Rẹ;|Ogo ni f'Ẹmi Mimọ ,|Mu wa de'le ayọ naa.
chorus: A n lọ'le sọdọ Ọlọrun|Lọna t'awọn Baba rin;|Wọn si n yọ; nisinsin yii,|Ayọ wọn l'awa o ri.

english.title: CHILDREN OF THE HEAVENLY KING, AS YE JOURNEY SWEETLY SING
english.description:
C.M.S. 563, S.O. ED D7s (FE 135)
“Wherefore thou art no more servant, and it is a son, then an heir of God through Christ" - Gal. 4:7
stanzas: CHILDREN of the heavenly King|As ye journey sweetly sing|Sing your saviours worthy praise|Glorious in His works and ways.
We are travelling home to God|In the way the Father tread|They are happy now, and we|Soon their happiness Shall see.
Sing ye little flock a blest|You on Jesus throne shall rest|There your seat is now prepared|There your Kingdom and reward.
Lift your eyes ye sons of light|Zions’ city is in sight|There our endless home shall be|There our Lord we soon shall see.
Let every kindren, and tribe,|On this terrestial ball|Him all majesty ascribe,|And to crown Him Lord of all
Oh with younger sacred throne|We all at His feet may fall|There join everlasting song|And there crown Him, Lord of All
Glory to Father we give|Glory to His Son we give|Glory to the Holy Ghost|Lead us to the blessed home.
chorus: We are travelling home to God|In the way the Father tread|They are happy now, and we|Soon their happiness Shall see

verse: CHILDREN of the heavenly King
As ye journey sweetly sing
Sing your saviours worthy praise
Glorious in His works and ways
chorus: We are travelling home to God
In the way the Father tread
They are happy now and we
Soon their happiness Shall see

syllable: E WE ti Ọ ba ọ run,
Kọ rin di dun be ti n lọ;
Kọ rin 'yin O lu gba la,
O lo go 'nu i sẹ Rẹ.
A n lọ'le, sọ dọ Ọ lọ run
Lọ o na t'a, wọn Ba a ba rin;
Wọ on si nyọ; ni si in sin yii,
A yọ wọn l'a wa o ri.

hymns.title: GBOGBO AYÉ, GBE JESU GA, ANGẸL, Ẹ WOLẸ FUN
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 561  H.C. 562. C.M. (FE 136) 
“Oun l'Oluwa awọn oluwa, at'Ọba awọn Ọba” - Ifihan 17:14
stanzas: GBOGBO ayé, gbe Jesu ga,|Angẹl, ẹ wolẹ fun;|Ẹ mu ade Ọba Rẹ wa,|Se l'Ọba awọn Ọba.
Ẹ se l'Ọba, ẹyin Martyr,|Ti n pe ni pẹpẹ Rẹ;|Gbe gbongbon-igi Jesse ga,|Se l'Ọba awọn Ọba.
Ẹyin iru-ọmọ Israel,|Ti a ti rapada;|Ẹ ki ẹni t'o gba yin la,|Se l'Ọba awọn Ọba.
Gbogbo eniyan ẹlẹsẹ,|Ranti 'banujẹ yin;|Ẹ tẹ 'kogun yin s'ẹsẹ Rẹ,|Se l'Ọba awọn Ọba.
Ki gbogbo orilẹ-ede,|Ni gbogbo agbayé;|Ki wọn ki, “Kabiyesilẹ”,|Se l'Ọba awọn Ọba.
A bale pẹl'awọn t'ọrun,|Lati ma juba Rẹ;|K'a ba le jọ jumọ kọrin,|Se l'Ọba awọn Ọba.

english.title: ALL HAIL THE POWER OF JESUS NAME! LET ANGELS PROSTRATE FALL
english.description:
H.C. 562, C.M. (FE 136)
“He is the Lord of Lords and the King of kings" - Rev.17:14
stanzas: ALL hail the power of Jesus Name!|Let angels prostrate fall:|Bring forth the royal diadem|And crown Him, Lord of All.
Crown Him, ye martyrs of our God,|Who from His altar call;|Exalt the stem of Jesse‘s rod,|And crown Him, Lord of all.
Ye seed of Israel’s chosen race,|Ye ransom’d of the fall,|Hail Him who saves you by His Grace|And crown Him, Lord of all.
Sinners, whose love can ne'er forget|The wormwood and the gall;|Go, spread your trophies at His feet|And crown Him, Lord of all.
Let every kindred, every tribe|On this terrestrial ball,|To Him all majesty ascribe|And crown Him, Lord of all.
Oh that with yonder sacred throng|We at His feet may fall|There join the everlasting song|And crown Him Lord of all.

verse: ALL hail the power of Jesus Name
Let angels prostrate fall:
Bring forth the royal diadem
And crown Him Lord of All

syllable: GBO GBO a yé, gbe e Je e su ga,
An gẹl, ẹ e wo lẹ fun;
Ẹ mu a de Ọ ba Rẹ e wa,
Se l'Ọ ba, l'Ọ ba, l'Ọ ba,
l'Ọ ba, a wọn 'ba.

hymns.title: JI, ỌKAN MI, DIDE LAYỌ, KỌRIN IYIN OLUGBALA
hymns.description:
CM 239  t.H.C. 222 L.M. C.M.S. 566 (FE 137) 
“Emi o sọ ti iseun ifẹ Oluwa”  - Isa. 63:7
stanzas: JI, ọkan mi, dide layọ,|Kọrin iyin Olugbala;|Ọla Rẹ bere orin mi,|'Seun ifẹ Rẹ ti pọ to!
O ri mo segbe n'isubu,|Sibẹ, O fẹ mi l'afẹtan;|O yọ mi ninu osi mi,|'Seun ifẹ Rẹ ti tobi to!
Ogun ọta dide si mi,|Ayé at'Esu n de'na mi,|Oun n mu mi la gbogbo rẹ ja,|'Seun ifẹ Rẹ ti n'ipa to!
'Gba 'yọnu de, b'awọsanma,|T'o su dudu t'o n san ara;|O duro ti mi larin rẹ,|'Seun ifẹ Rẹ ti dara to!
'Gba gbogbo l'ọkan ẹsẹ mi,|N fẹ ya lẹhin Oluwa mi;|Sugbọn bi mo ti n gbagbe Rẹ,|Iseun ifẹ Rẹ ki yẹ.
Mo fẹrẹ f'ayé silẹ na,|Mo fẹ bọ lọw'ara iku;|A! k'emi ‘kẹhin mi kọrin|Iseun ifẹ Rẹ n'iku.
Njẹ ki n fo lọ, ki n si goke,|S'ayé imọlẹ titi lai;|Ki n f'ayọ iyanu kọrin,|Iseun ifẹ Rẹ lọrun.

english.title: AWAKE, MY SOUL, TO JOYFUL DAYS, AND SING THY GREAT REDEEMER'S PRAISE
stanzas: AWAKE, my soul, to joyful days|And sing thy great Redeemer's praise|He justly claims a song from me|His loving kindness, oh, how free.
He saw me done, ruined by the fall|Yet loved me not withstanding all|He saved me from my lost estate|His loving kindness, oh, how great!
Tho’ num'rous hosts of mighty foes|Tho' earth and hell my way oppose|He safely leads my soul along|His loving kindness, oh, how strong!
When trouble, like a gloomy cloud|Has gathered thick and thundered loud|He near my soul has always stood,|His loving kindness, o how good!
Often I feel my sinful heart|Prone from my Jesus to depart|And though I oft have Him forgot|His loving kindness changes not.
So when I pass death‘s gloomy vale|And life and mortal pow’rs shall fail|O may my last expiring breath|His loving kindness sing in death.
Now let me rise to heights above|Unto perpetual land of light|In wondrous joy to sing His praise|His loving kindness, o‘er in Heaven.

verse: AWAKE my soul to joyful days
And sing thy great Redeemer's praise
He justly claims a song from me
His loving kindness oh how free

syllable: JI, ọ kan mi, di de la yọ,
Kọ rin i yin O lu gba la;
Ọ la Rẹ be re o rin mi,
'Se un i fẹ Rẹ ti pọ to!

hymns.title: AWA DUPẸ O LỌWỌ BABA WA
AWA ỌMỌ IJỌ KÉRÚBÙ, ATI ỌMỌ IJỌ SÉRÁFÙ
GBOGBO ẸYIN TI N GBE AYÉ, Ẹ F'AYỌ KỌRIN S'OLUWA
stanzas: GBOGBO ẹyin ti n gbe ayé,|Ẹ f'ayọ kọrin s'Oluwa;|F'ibẹru sin, ẹ yin logo,|Ẹ f'ayọ wa siwaju Rẹ.
Oluwa, Oun ni Ọlọrun,|O da wa laisi 'ranwọ wa;|Tirẹ l'awa se, O mbọ wa,|Oun n tọju wa b'aguntan Rẹ.
Ẹ f'iyin wọ ile Rẹ wa,|Ẹ f'ayọ sunm'agbala Rẹ;|Ẹ yin, ẹ bukun okọ Rẹ,|N'tori bẹ l'o yẹ k'a ma se.
N'tori rere l'Ọlọrun wa,|Anu rẹ wa bakan naa lai;|Ootọ Rẹ ko fi'gba kan yẹ,|O duro lat'iran de 'ran.

english.title: ALL PEOPLE THAT ON EARTH DO DWELL, SING TO THE LORD WITH CHEERFUL VOICE
stanzas: ALL people that on earth do dwell|Sing to the Lord with cheerful voice|Him serve with mirth, His praise forth tell,|Come ye before Him and rejoice.
The Lord, ye know, is God indeed,|Without our aid He did us make;|We are His Flock, He doth us feed;|And for His sheep He doth us take.
O enter then His gates with praise|Approach with joy His courts unto|Praise, laud and bless His name always|For it is seemly so to do.
For why? The Lord our God is good|His mercy is for ever sure|His truth at all times firmly stood|And shall from age to age endure.

verse: ALL people that on earth do dwell
Sing to the Lord with cheerful voice
Him serve with mirth His praise forth tell
Come ye before Him and rejoice

hymns.title: NIWAJU ITẸ JEHOVAH, Ẹ F'AYỌ SIN, ORIL'EDE
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 554  H.C. 54  L.M. 554 (FE 141) 
“Ẹ ho iho ayọ si Oluwa, ẹyin ile gbogbo” - Ps. 100:1
stanzas: NIWAJU itẹ Jehovah,|Ẹ f'ayọ sin, oril'ede;|Mọ p'Oluwa, oun kanso ni,|O le da, O si le parun.
Ipa Rẹ, laisi 'ranwọ wa,|L'o f'amọ da wa l'eniyan;|Nigba t'a sako b'aguntan,|O tun mu wa si agbo Rẹ.
A o f'orin sunmọ 'le Rẹ,|Lohun giga l'a o kọrin;|Ayé l'oniruru ede,|Y'o f'iyin kun agbala Rẹ.
Asẹ Rẹ gbooro b'agbayé,|Ifẹ Rẹ pe b'ayerayé;|Ootọ Rẹ yoo duro lailai,|Gba t'ọdun ki yoo yipo mọ.

english.title: BEFORE JEHOVAH'S THRONE, YE NATIONS, BOW WITH SACRED JOY
stanzas: BEFORE Jehovah's throne|Ye nations, bow with sacred joy|Know that the Lord is God alone|He can create, and can destroy.
His sovereign power, without our aid|Made us of clay, and formed us men|And when like wandering sheep we strayed|He brought us to His fold again.
We’ll crowd Thy gates with thankful songs|High as the heavens our voices raise|And earth, with her ten thousand tongues|Shall fill Thy courts with sounding praise.
Me as the world is Thy command|Vast as eternity Thy love|Firm as a rock Thy truth shall stand|When rolling years shall cease to move.

verse: BEFORE Jehovah's throne
Ye nations bow with sacred joy
Know that the Lord is God alone
He can create and can destroy

hymns.title: GBOGBO ẸDA ABẸ ỌRUN, Ẹ F'IYIN FUN ẸLẸDA WA
hymns.description:
(FE 142) 
Ohun Orin: MA sisẹ lọ mase sọlẹ (596)
stanzas: GBOGBO ẹda abẹ ọrun,|Ẹ f'iyin fun Ẹlẹda wa;|Ki gbogbo orilẹ-ede,|Kọrin iyin Olugbala.
Oluwa, anu Rẹ ki ti,|Ootọ Rẹ si duro lailai;|Iyin Rẹ y'o tan kakiri,|Tit' orun y'o la laiwọ mọ.

english.title: YE PEOPLE OF THE EARTH BELOW, PRAISES GIVE TO OUR CREATOR
english.description: Ohun Orin: MA sisẹ lọ mase sọlẹ (596)
stanzas: YE people of the earth below|Praises give to our Creator|Let people of all the nations|Sing praises unto the Saviour.
Lord Thy mercies abound for us|Thine truth endureth forever|Thine praise shall spread widely abroad|Till the sun rise and never set.

verse: YE people of the earth below
Praises give to our Creator
Let people of all the nations
Sing praises unto the Saviour

hymns.title: ỌLỌRUN AILOPIN, IWỌ, L'A F'IYIN ATỌKAN WA FUN
hymns.description:
6.8S (FE 143) 
Ohun Orin: Mo fiyin Ailopin (394)
stanzas: ỌLỌRUN ailopin, Iwọ,|L'a f'iyin atọkan wa fun,|Gbogbo 'sẹ Rẹ l'ayé yin Ọ,|A juba Rẹ, Oluwa wa;|Baba ayérayé, jẹ ki,|Ọkan wa wolẹ n'itẹ Rẹ.
Awọn angẹl' n kọrin yin Ọ,|Balogun, Ọba 'wọn Ọba,|Kikan l'awọn Kérúbù n yin,|Seraf' si yin Mẹtalọkan;|Wọn n kọ, Mimọ, mimọ, mimọ,|Ọrun, ayé, kun f'ogo Rẹ!
Ọlọrun awọn baba wa,|Awọn Woli ti royin Rẹ,|Ẹgbẹ Aposteli rere,|Wọn mbẹ l'ayọ ati ogo;|Woli ati awọn mimọ|Dapọ lati gb'ọla Rẹ ga.
Olor' awọn ajẹriku,|Wọn n f'otọ sogo ninu Rẹ,|Ijọ gbe ohun rẹ soke,|Yin Ẹlẹda gbogbo ayé;|Wọn si mba 'wọn t'o y'itẹ ka,|Kọrin in 'jinlẹ Mẹtalọkan.
Baba, Ọlọla ailopin,|Tirẹ l'agbara at' ifẹ,|A juba ọmọ Rẹ ọwọn,|T'O mbẹ n'nu ogo pẹlu;|At'Ọlọrun Ẹmi Mimọ ,|Olutunu ayérayé.

english.title: OH THOU OUR TRANSCENDENTAL GOD, WE GIVE OUR PRAISE AND HEART TO THEE
stanzas: OH Thou our transcendental God|We give our praise and heart to Thee|All Thy works on earth we praise Thee|We worship Thee our Saviour Lord.|Chorus: (Everlasting Father we plead|May our hearts bow before Thy throne) 2ce

Angelic hosts sing praise to Thee|The captain and the King of Kings|Loudly the Cherubim praise Thee|And Seraphs praises Trinity.|Chorus: (They sing Holy, Holy, Holy|Heaven and earth Thine glory filled.) 2ce

Oh God of our great grand Fathers|Host of prophets good tidings brought|Host of the Saints and Apostles|Dwells with joy and glory with Thee.|Chorus: (Prophets and host of holy Saints|ln fellowship doth exalt Thee.) 2ce
Head of witnesses of Thy death|Honestly rejoices in Thee|The congregation all chorus|ln praises and adoration.|Chorus: (In fellowship with heavenly hosts|Singing praises to Trinity.) 2ce
Father of everlasting grace|Thine Is the power and love divine|We worship Thine only dear Son|Dwelling above in grace with Thee.|Chorus: (With the Holy Spirit unite|The Everlasting Comforter.) 2ce

verse: OH Thou our transcendental God
We give our praise and heart to Thee
All Thy works on earth we praise Thee
We worship Thee our Saviour Lord
Chorus: (Everlasting Father we plead
May our hearts bow before Thy throne) 2ce

syllable: Ọ LỌ RUN ai lo pin, I wọ,
L'a f'i yin a tọ kan wa fun,
Gbo gbo 'sẹ Rẹ l'a yé yin in Ọ,
A ju ba Rẹ, O lu wa wa;
Ba ba a yé ra yé, jẹ ki,
Ọ kan wa wo lẹ n'i tẹ Rẹ.

hymns.title: A F'ỌPẸ F'ỌLỌRUN T'O DA WA, TI O N BỌ T'O SI N SIKẸ WA
hymns.description:
(FE 144) 
Ohun Orin: Wa ba mi Gbe (19)
stanzas: A F'ỌPẸ f'Ọlọrun t'O da wa,|Ti O n bọ t'O si n sikẹ wa,|Oun ni Oluwa ti o le bukun wa,|Ẹ jẹ k'a jọ kọrin s'Ẹlẹda wa.
A dupẹ f'ọna t'o pe wa si,|Sinu ọkọ 'gbala kẹhin,|Ran wa lọwọ k'a le fi iwa wa jọ,|Awọn Ijọ mimọ Seraf' t'oke.
A dupẹ fun okun ilera,|Ti o n fi fun awa ọmọ Rẹ.|Ẹyin l'Ọlọrun ti ko jẹ ko rẹ wa,|A dupẹ a yin O Olore wa.
A dupẹ pe o n gbadura wa,|Ni ọna gbogbo t'a n pe Ọ si,|Papa nigba ti esu n fẹ tafa rẹ,|Ẹ ke Halleluyah s'Olusẹgun.
A dupẹ f'alafia ara,|T'o n fun wa, t'o si n jẹ k'a mọ Ọ,|Pe 'wọ l'Ọlọrun t'o le s'ohun gbogbo,|A dupẹ a yin Ọba Olore.
A dupẹ f'Ẹmi t'o n dari wa,|'Gbat' awa ọmọ Rẹ n fẹ sako,|Oun n f'ohun kẹlẹ pe wa pada s'agbo,|Mẹtalọkan Mimọ a juba Rẹ.
A dupẹ p'a mọ ojubọ Rẹ,|Larin hilahilo ayé yi,|O n jẹ k'a mọ pe Iwọ ni Baba wa,|Ayọ, ayọ, ayọ, ani Baba.
Ọpẹ l'o yẹ Olodumare,|Fun didasi ti O ń da wa si,|T'O ń bọ t'O si ń sikẹ wa lojojumọ,|Ọpẹ, ọpẹ, iyin f'Olore wa.
A dupẹ fun Ọ, Ẹlẹda wa,|Fun isẹ Rẹ t'O ń se larin wa,|Ti O ko fi wa silẹ ni'sẹju kan,|Ogo, Ọla, Iyin s'Ẹlẹda wa.
Ọlọrun Ẹlẹda Séráfù,|Ti aginju ayé wa yi,|Gb'ohun wa k'o si ma lo nigba gbogbo,|K'a le b'awọn Seraf' t'ọrun kọrin.
Baba wa jọwọ k'o gb'ọpẹ wa,|Larin Ijọ mimọ Séráfù,|Ohun ọpẹ ni k'O ma fi s'arin wa,|Titi a o fi de 'le Paradise.

english.title: THANKS WE OFFER TO GOD CREATOR, WHO FEED AND ALSO NURTURE US
stanzas: THANKS we offer to God creator|Who feed and also nurture us|He‘s the Lord who really can bless us all|Let's jointly sing chorus to our creator.
Praise we give for calling us this way|Aboard the ship of salvation|Be of help that we may be in resemblance|Of the Holy Seraphim high above.
Thanks we give for perfect strength and health|Thou endowed we all Thine children|Thou the God who strengthens us lest we're weary|We offer thanks, we praise our Graceful God.
Thanks we offer for answered prayers|Through all the manners we call Thee|Even when on us the devil shot his darts|Shout halleluyah to Victorious God.
Thanks we give for peaceful mortal frame|Revealing Thineself unto us|That Thou art the only Omniscient God|We give thanks and praises to Graceful God.
Thanks we give for the Holy Spirit|When we Thy children astray led|With gentle voice Thou art called us back to fold.|All we worship Thee Holy Trinity.
Thanks we give for we know Thine altar|‘Midst tribulations of this world|Thou makest us know Thee as our Father|Joy, joy, oh joy we have still our Father.
Thanks be unto Thee God Almighty|For Thy grace with which thou spares us|Thou doth feed and so nurture us everyday|Thanks, thanks and praise be to our|Graceful God.
Thanks we give unto our Creator|For His wonderful works ‘midst us|Not forsaking us for just a minute|Glory, honour, praise to our Creator.
God who establish the Seraphim|Of this earthen world below|Take our voice and put it to use everyday|May we sing chorus with Seraphs above.

verse: THANKS we offer to God creator
Who feed and also nurture us
He‘s the Lord who really can bless us all
Let's jointly sing chorus to our creator

hymns.title: ỌMỌ IJỌ SERAF' DIDE, DIDE LATI B'ESU JAGUN
hymns.description:
t.SS & S 710  P.M. (FE 145) 
“Ẹ ma lepa eyi ti n se rere”  - I Tess. 5:15 
Ohun Orin: Ọkan Aarẹ Ile kan mbẹ (598)
stanzas: ỌMỌ Ijọ Seraf' dide,|Dide lati b'esu jagun,|Jesu Olugbala sẹgun,|L'orukọ Rẹ a o 'sẹgun;
ỌMỌ Ijọ Kerub' dide,|Ọpọ ọkan lo ti daku,|Ọpọ lo si ti sako lọ,|Jesu ń pe yin, ẹ bọ wa 'le;
Aladura ti mura tan,|Lati gbe ogo Jesu ga,|B'ajẹ kan ta felefele,|Maikẹl Balogun wa ti de;
Joshua sisẹ, o si ye,|Séráfù y'o sise rẹ ye,|Elijah sisẹ, o si ye,|Kérúbù y'o sisẹ rẹ ye;
Shedraki sisẹ, o si ye|Mesaki sisẹ, o si ye,|Abednigo se o si ye,|Séráfù yoo se l'aseye;
Abraham sisẹ, o si ye,|Isaaki sisẹ, o si ye,|Jakọbu sisẹ l'aseye,|T'ijọ Aladura yoo ye.
Ọpẹ ni fun Olugbala,|To wa s'ayé aginju yi,|To bọ ogo Rẹ s'apa kan,|O jiya ka le ri 'gbala;
Kérúbù pẹlu Séráfù,|Ẹ f'ogo fun Baba loke,|Ẹ f'ogo fun Ọmọ Rẹ,|Ẹ f'ogo fun Ẹmi Mimọ .
chorus: Sisẹ n'nu ọgba Oluwa rẹ,|Sisẹ n'nu ọgba Oluwa rẹ,|Sisẹ... Sisẹ....|Wa sisẹ ki 'kore to de.

english.title: O! BAND OF SERAPHIM ARISE, ARISE TO WAR WITH THE DEVIL
english.description: Tune: Ọkan Aarẹ Ile kan mbẹ (598)
stanzas: O! Band of Seraphim arise|Arise to war with the devil|Christ Jesus Saviour has triumphed|Work in the vineyard of the Lord.
O! Band of Cherubim arise|Many a soul are unconscious|Many souls had wandered away|Christ Jesus bids you come back home.
Band of prayerists be ready|To exalt the glory of Christ|Though witches and wizards may rage|Michael our captain is now here.
Patriarch Joshua worked and lives|Seraphim shall work and so live|Elijah also worked and lives|Cherubim shall work and so live.
Patriarch Shadrach worked and lives|Patriarch Meshack worked and lives|Abednego worked and he lives|Seraphim shall work and so live.
Patriarch Abraham worked and lives|Patriarch Isaac worked and lives|Patriarch Jacob worked and lives|The Band of prayerist shall live.
Thanks we give unto the Saviour|Who to the planet earth doth come|His loftly glory set aside|Suffered to earn us salvation.
Band of Cherubim, Seraphim|Give glory to Father above|Give glory to His only Son|And Glory to Holy Spirit.
chorus: O! work in the vinyard of the Lord|O! work in the vinyard of the Lord|O! work O! work|O! work hard before harvest time.

verse: O Band of Seraphim arise
Arise to war with the devil
Christ Jesus Saviour has triumphed
Work in the vineyard of the Lord
chorus: O work in the vinyard of the Lord
O work in the vinyard of the Lord
O work O work
O work hard before harvest time

hymns.title: YIN ỌLỌRUN ABRAM, TO GUNWA LOK'ỌRUN
hymns.description:
P.B. 408  A&M 631 6s  4s 
(FE 146) 
Ohun Orin: Kii se Lai N’ireti? (269)
stanzas: YIN Ọlọrun Abram,|To gunwa lok'ọrun,|Ẹni agba ayérayé,|Ọlọrun 'fẹ;|Ẹmi Jehofa nla,|T'ayé t'ọrun ń jẹwọ,|Mo yin orukọ mimọ Rẹ,|Olubukun.
B'ipa ara bajẹ,|T'ayé t'esu ń dena,|N ó dojukọ ile Kenaan,|Nip'asẹ Rẹ;|N ó la ibu kọja,|N ó tẹjumọ Jesu,|Larin aginju to lẹru,|N ó ma rin lọ.
S'Ọlọrun Ọba l'oke,|L'olor' Angẹli ń ke,|Wi pé Mimọ, Mimọ,|Olodumare;|Ẹni ti o ti wa,|Ti yoo si wa lailai,|Ẹmi Jehofa Baba nla,|Kabiyesi.

hymns.title: ALLELUYAH! ORIN T'O DUN, OHUN AYỌ TI KI KU
hymns.description:
C.M.S. 656, H.C. 587 t.H.C. 581, 8s 7s (FE 147) 
“Mo gbohun nla kan ti ọpọlọpọ eniyan l'ọrun wi pé, Alleluyah” - Ifi. 19:1
stanzas: ALLELUYAH! orin t'o dun,|Ohun ayọ ti ki ku;|Alleluyah! orin didun,|T'awọn t'o wa l'ọrun fẹ;|N'ile ti Ọlọrun mi ń gbe,|Ni wọn n kọ tọsan-toru.
Alleluyah! Ijọ ọrun,|Ẹ le kọrin ayọ na;|Alleluyah! orin 'sẹgun,|Yẹ awọn t'a rapada;|Awa ero at'alejo,|Iyin wa ko nilari.
Alleluyah! orin ayọ,|Lo yẹ wa nigba gbogbo;|Alleluyah! ohun aro,|Da mọ orin ayọ wa;|Gbat'a wa layé osi yi,|A ni gbawẹ f'ẹsẹ wa.
Iyin dapọ m'adua wa,|Gbọ tiwa, Mẹtalọkan;|Mu wa de 'waju Rẹ l'ayọ,|K'a f'Ọdaguntan t'a pa;|K'a le ma kọ Alleluyah,|Nibẹ lai ati lailai.

english.title: ALLELUIA, SONG OF SWEETNESS, VOICE OF JOY THAT CANNOT DIE
stanzas: ALLELUIA, song of sweetness|Voice of joy that cannot die|Alleluia is the anthem|Ever dear to choirs on high|In the house of GOD abiding|Thus they sing eternally.
Alleluia, Church victorious|Thou may'st lift the joyful stream|Alleluia, songs of triumph|Well befit the ransom'd train|Faint and feeble are our praises|While in exalt we remain.
Alleluia may not always|Be our song while here below|Alleluia, our transgressions|Make us for a while forego|For the solemn time is coming|When our tears for sin must flow.
Therefore in our hymns we pray Thee|Grant us, Blessed TRINITY|At the last to keep Thine Easter|In our Home beyond the sky|There to Thee, for ever singing|Alleluia joyfully.

verse: ALLELUIA song of sweetness
Voice of joy that cannot die
Alleluia is the anthem
Ever dear to choirs on high
In the house of GOD abiding
Thus they sing eternally

hymns.title: BA WA YỌ, GBOGBO IJỌ, BA WA YỌ, GBOGBO ẸGBẸ
ẸYIN ANGẸL ỌRUN, Ẹ BU SAYỌ, KÉRÚBÙ SÉRÁFÙ AYÉ GBERIN
stanzas: ẸYIN Angẹl ọrun, ẹ bu sayọ,|Kérúbù Séráfù ayé gberin;|K'awa ko ke Hosanna,|Ka si foribalẹ fun,|Mẹtalọkan Olore.
A dupẹ t'Ọlọrun wa pẹlu wa,|A dupẹ pe Maikẹli jẹ tiwa;|Ẹ jẹ ka jo damuso,|Ka si yin Baba loke,|Ti O da wa si d'oni.
Oluso-Àgùntàn Israeli,|Iwọ ti ki sun, ti ki togbe;|Masai fi ọpa Rẹ tọ,|Awọn to sun ninu wa,|K'ifẹ Rẹ ko le ma tan.
Baba, masai se wa l'aguntan Rẹ,|Ti yoo ma gbọ ipe Oluwa Rẹ,|Ma jẹ ka sọnu kuro,|Ninu ọna toro na,|Ti o lọ si ibi iye.
Alabukun fun n'iwọ ẹni ti,|O ń pese fun awọn ẹni igbani;|Jọwọ ma sai be wa wo,|Pẹlu ẹbun rere Rẹ,|K'awa le sin Ọ dopin.
chorus: Ka jọ ho, ka jọ yọ,|Nitori Baba pe wa sinu agbo,|Ka jọ ho, ka jọ yọ,|Ka si le n'iwa mimo,|Ti y'o mu wa de Kenaan.

syllable: Ẹ YIN An gẹl ọ run, ẹ bu sa yọ,
Ké rú bù Sé rá fù a yé gbe rin;
K'a wa ko ke Ho sa nna,
Ka si fo ri ba lẹ fun,
Mẹ ta lọ kan O lo re.
Ka jọ ho, ka jọ yọ,
Ni to ri Ba ba pe wa si nu a gbo,
Ka jọ ho, ka jọ yọ,
Ka si le n'i wa mi mo,
Ti y'o mu wa de Ke naan.

hymns.title: Ẹ BA WA GBE JESU GA, K'A GBEGA HA! ARA K'A
Ẹ GBOHUN S'OKE K'A YIN! , 'LUWA ỌBA AIKU
E KE HALLELUYAH SI OBA IYE..YIN OBA OGO, KERUBU
F'IBUKUN F'OLUWA!, K'ỌKAN AT'INU MI
L'OKO JESU, GBOGBO EKUN YOO WOLẸ
IBA SE P'OLUWA KO TI WA NI TIWA
stanzas: IBA SE p'Oluwa|Ko ti wa ni tiwa,|Lo yẹ k'awa ma wi,|Nigba t'esu gbogun tiwa.
Wọn 'ba bo wa mọlẹ,|Pẹlu agbara wọn,|Ọpẹ ni f'Oluwa,|Ti ko jẹ ki t'esu bori.
Ọkan wa yọ b'ẹyẹ,|Nin' okun apẹyẹ,|Okun ja, awa yọ,|Ẹ yọ Jesu da wa silẹ.
Tirẹ ni Oluwa,|Lati gbe wa leke,|Gbogbo awọn ọta,|T'o wu ko tilẹ yi wa ka.
Ara f'ọkan balẹ,|S'ọdọ Olugbala,|B'esu ti gbọn to ni,|Ko to kini kan fun Jesu.
Iranlọwọ wa mbẹ,|L'orukọ Oluwa,|T'O da ọrun oun ayé,|Ọba awọn ẹni mimọ.
Ogo fun Baba wa,|Ogo fun Ọmọ Rẹ,|Ogo f'Ẹmi Mimọ ,|Mẹtalọkan jọ gbọ tiwa,
chorus: Ọpẹ ni f'Oluwa,|Ọba wa Olore,|A ke Kabiyesi,|A f'ọpẹ fun jehofa,|T'o gba wa lọwọ ọta,|A dupẹ Oluwa.

syllable: I BA SE p'O o lu wa
Ko ti wa ni ti wa,
Lo yẹ k'a wa a ma wi,
Ni gba t'e su gbo gun ti wa.
Ọ pẹ ni f'O lu wa,
Ọ ba wa O lo o re,
A ke Ka bi ye e si,
A f'ọ pẹ fun je ho fa,
T'o gba wa lọ wọ ọ ta,
A du pẹ O lu wa.

hymns.title: KÉRÚBÙ Ẹ HO F'AYỌ, K'A F'ỌPẸ F'ỌLỌRUN WA
ỌMỌ'JỌ SÉRÁFÙ, AT' IJỌ KÉRÚBÙ
MO F'ỌPẸ F'OLUWA, AHỌN MI YIN JESU
GBOGBO ẸGBẸ AKỌRIN, A KI YIN KU 'YEDUN
GBOGBO IJỌ ONIGBAGBỌ, T'O WA NI GBOGBO AYÉ
Ẹ FI ỌPẸ FUN ỌLỌRUN WA, ẸYIN IJỌ SÉRÁFÙ
stanzas: Ẹ FI ọpẹ fun Ọlọrun wa,|Ẹyin Ijọ Séráfù,|Fun ore Rẹ ti o yi wa ka,|O ń gbe wa leke ọta.
Larin ọta, larin ẹlẹgan,|L'awa ń rin lojojumọ;|Sugbọn Jesu, ko jẹ ka subu,|Ko si jẹ k'ọta yọ wa.
Ọpọlọpọ ti f'ilẹ bora,|Wọn ti di ẹni 'gbagbe;|Nitori naa Ijọ Séráfù,|Ẹ f'ọpẹ f'Ọlọrun wa.
Gbogbo ẹyin Ijọ Séráfù,|Lati ilu gbogbo wa;|A si ki yin ẹ ku iyedun,|Jesu yoo s'amọna wa.
Ijọ Seraf' jẹ'jọ kekere,|Gẹgẹ bi Nasareti,|Ọta si ń wi fun wọn bayi pe,|Ijọ Séráfù ha da?
Ohun rere kan ha le jade,|Lati Nasareti wa?|Sugbọn Jesu ń wi fun ọ loni,|Wi pé jade ko wa wo.
Ẹ f'ogo fun Baba wa l'oke,|Ẹ tun f'ogo fun Ọmọ,|Ẹ si f'ogo fun Ẹmi Mimọ ,|Ologo Mẹtalọkan
chorus: Isọji ayérayé mbọ wa,|Jesu se wa yẹ f'ọjọ na,|Ka le jọ kọrin Halleluyah|S'Ọlọrun Mẹtalọkan.

syllable: Ẹ FI ọ pẹ fun Ọ lọ run wa,
Ẹ yin I jọ Sé rá fù,
Fun o re Rẹ ti o yi wa ka,
Oń gbe wa le ke ọ ta.
I sọ ji a a yé ra yé mbọ wa,
Je su se e wa yẹ f'ọ jọ na,
Ka le jọ kọ rin Hal le lu yah
S'Ọ lọ run Mẹ ta lọ kan.

hymns.title: OJO NLA L'OJO ONI.. KABIYESI LE F'OBA KERUBU
ẸLẸDA GBOGBO AYÉ NI ASẸ RẸ NI
stanzas: ẸLẸDA gbogbo ayé|Ni asẹ Rẹ ni,|Awa pejọ loni,|Lati yin O’okọ Rẹ.
Tọju wa Baba ọrun,|Larin ayé wa yi,|Pa wa mọ k'o bọ wa,|Pese f'aini wa.
Kérúbù, Séráfù,|Ẹ m'ọkan yin le,|Awa ni Baba nla,|T'o mọ ẹdun wa.
Kérúbù, Séráfù,|Ẹ d'amure yin,|Ẹ ma fi aye silẹ,|Fun ẹmi esu.
Ẹyin asaju wa,|Ẹ ku'sẹ Ẹmi,|Ọlọrun alaye,|Yoo wa pẹlu yin.
Ẹyin Aladura,|K'ẹ ma gbadura,|Mẹtalọkan y'o gbọ,|Y'o sẹgun fun wa.
Gbogbo ẹyin agan,|Baba yoo pese,|Ẹyin ti ẹ bimọ,|Gbogbo wọn yoo la.
Ẹyin t'ẹ si loyun,|Jah yoo s'abo yin,|Ẹyin t'ẹ ko ri se,|Jah yio pese.
chorus: A dupẹ lọwọ Rẹ,|Baba Olore,|Ki 'bukun Rẹ ọrun,|Ba le gbogbo wa.

syllable: Ẹ LẸ DA gbo gbo a yé
Ni a sẹ Rẹ ni,
A wa pe jọ lo ni,
La ti yin O’o kọ Rẹ.
A du pẹ lọ wọ Rẹ,
Ba ba wa O lo re (O lo re o),
Ki 'bu kun Rẹ ọ run,
Ba le gbo gbo wa.

hymns.title: GBỌ ORIN ẸNI IRAPADA, ORIN IYIN TITUN
stanzas: GBỌ orin ẹni irapada,|Orin iyin titun,|Wọn yin Ọdaguntan l'ogo,|Wọn ń kọrin naa bayi.
A f'ọsọ wa n'nu ẹjẹ Rẹ,|O si funfun laulau;|'Mọlẹ t'o tan si ọkan,|Nf'ipa ootọ Rẹ han.
Nipa agbara Ẹjẹ Jesu,|L'a fọ 'tẹgun Esu;|Nipa agbara Ootọ Rẹ,|La se bori ọta.
Jẹ ka juba Ọdaguntan,|T'o fun wa ni 'mọlẹ;|Tirẹ l'ogo at'agbara,|Ọlanla at'ipa.
chorus: Ogo f'Ẹni to fẹ wa,|T'o fẹjẹ Rẹ wẹ wa,|Ti o si sọ wa di mimọ,|N'nu ibi iye ni.

syllable: GBỌ o rin ẹ ni 'ra pa a da,
O rin i yin ti tun,
Wọn yin Ọ o da gun tan l'o o go,
Wọn ńkọ rin naa ba yi.
O go f'Ẹ ni to fẹ e wa,
T'o fẹ jẹ Rẹ wẹ wa,
Ti o si sọ wa di mi mọ,
N'nu i bi i i ye ni.

hymns.title: ẸNI T'O BA GBỌ 'KEDE ỌRỌ NAA, WASU IHINRERE FUN GBOGBO AYÉ
KÉRÚBÙ ATI SÉRÁFÙ, Ẹ K'AFOJUBA OLORI
OHUN T'OLUWA YO SE, OBA MI, KO FI YENIKAN
JI! KỌ ORIN MOSE, ATI T'ỌDAGUNTAN
'WỌ, ỌWON OLURAPADA, A FẸ MA GBURO RẸ
TAL'ẸNI NAA TI N KAN 'LẸKUN ỌKAN MI
stanzas: TAL'ẸNI naa ti n kan 'lẹkun ọkan mi (2ce)|Jesu kristi Ọmọ Ọlọrun ni,|Silẹkun jẹ ko wọle lọ.
Tal'ẹni naa ti n kan 'lẹkun ọkan mi? (2ce)|Ẹmi Mimọ adaba ọrun ni,|Silẹkun jẹ ko wole lọ.
Tal'ẹni naa ti n kan 'lẹkun ọkan mi? (2ce)|Olupese Ọba awọn Ọba,|Silẹkun jẹ ko wọle lọ.
Tal'ẹni naa ti n kan 'lẹkun ọkan mi? (2ce)|Olugbala Ọba ayérayé,|Silẹkun jẹ ko wọle lọ.
Tal'ẹni naa ti n kan 'lẹkun ọkan mi? (2ce)|Olusegun alabo mi ni,|Silẹkun jẹ ko wọle lọ.
Tal'ẹni naa ti n kan 'lẹkun ọkan mi? (2ce)|Jesu Kristi Oluwoye mi ni,|Silẹkun jẹ ko wọle lọ.
Tal'ẹni naa ti n kan 'lẹkun ọkan mi? (2ce)|Jesu Kristi Ọmọ Ọlọrun ni,|Silẹkun jẹ ko wọle lọ.

syllable: TA L'Ẹ NI naa tin kan 'lẹ kun ọ kan mi
TA L'Ẹ NI naa tin kan 'lẹ kun ọ kan mi
Je su kris ti Ọ o mọ Ọ lọ run ni,
Si lẹ kun jẹ ko wọ le lọ.

hymns.title: A F'ẸMI MIMỌ LO LE SỌ NI D'ALAYE
ẸYIN OLUKORE 'NU OKO, T'O RỌ T'O SI Ń DAKU
SI Ọ OLUTUNU ỌRUN, FUN OORE AT'AGBARA RẸ
stanzas: SI Ọ Olutunu ọrun,|Fun oore at'agbara Rẹ,|A ń kọ Alleluya.
Si Ọ, ifẹ ẹni t'o wa,|Ninu Majẹmu Ọlọrun,|A ń kọ Alleluya.
Si Ọ ohun ẹni ti ń pe,|Asako kuro ninu ẹsẹ,|A ń kọ Alleluya.
Si Ọ, agbara ẹni ti,|O ń wẹ'ni mo, t'o ń wo'ni san,|A ń kọ Alleluya.
Si Ọ ododo Ẹni ti,|Gbogbo ileri Rẹ jẹ tiwa,|A ń kọ Alleluya.
Si Ọ, Olukọ at'Ọrẹ,|Amọna wa titi d'opin,|A ń kọ Alleluya.
Si Ọ, Ẹni ti Kristi ran,|Ade oun gbogbo ẹbun Rẹ,|A ń kọ Alleluya.
Si Ọ, Ẹni t'o jẹ ọkan,|Pẹlu Baba ati Ọmọ,|A ń kọ Alleluya.

syllable: SI Ọ O lu tun u nu ọ run,
Fun o re a a t'a a gba ra Rẹ,
Ań kọ, A ań kọ, A ań kọ
Al le lu ya.

hymns.title: J'ALAGBARA N'NU KRIST', ATI 'PA AGBARA RẸ
FUN MI NI ẸMI MIMỌ, ẸMI MIMỌ BABA,
ALEJO KAN Ń KAN LẸKUN, PE WỌLE
ẸMI ỌLỌRUN MI, L'ỌJỌ 'TẸWỌGBA YI
stanzas: ẸMI Ọlọrun mi,|L'ọjọ 'tẹwọgba yi,|Gẹgẹ b'ọjọ Pẹntikọsti,|Sọkalẹ l'agbara;|L'ọkan kan l'apade|Ninu ile Rẹ yii,|A duro de ileri Rẹ,|A duro de Ẹmi.
B'iro iji lile,|Wa kun 'nu ile yi;|Mi Ẹmi isọkan si wa,|Ọkan kan, imọ kan,|Fun ewe at'agba,|L'ọgbọn at'oke wa,|Fi ọkan gbigbona fun wa,|K'a yin, k'agbadura.
Ẹmi imọlẹ wa,|Le okunkun jade,|Siwaju ni k'imọlẹ tan,|Titi d'ọsangangan,|Emi otitọ wa,|S'amọna wa titi,|Ẹmi Isọdọmọ, si wa,|S'ọkan wa di mimọ.

syllable: Ẹ MI Ọ lọ run mi,
L'ọ jọ 'tẹ wọ gba yi,
Gẹ gẹ b'ọ jọ Pẹn ti kọs ti,
Sọ ka lẹ l'a gba ra;
L'ọ kan kan l'a pa de
Ni nu i le Rẹ yii,
A du ro de i le ri Rẹ,
A du ro o de Ẹ mi.

hymns.title: ẸMI ỌRUN WA NISIN YII, MI SI WA B'A TI Ń GBADURA
ẸMI MIMỌ SỌKALẸ, FI OHUN ỌRUN HAN
ADABA MIMỌ SỌKALẸ, KO WA FUN WA NI AGBARA
BABA WA ỌRUN, AWA DE, AWA ALAILAGBARA
stanzas: Baba wa ọrun, awa de,|Awa alailagbara;|Fi Ẹmi Mimọ Rẹ kun wa,|K'o sọ gbogbo wa d'ọtun;|Wa! Ẹmi Mimọ, jare wa!|F'ede titun s'ọkan wa,|Ẹbun nla Rẹ ni l'a ń tọrọ,|T'ọjọ nla Pẹntikọsti.
Ranti ileri Rẹ, Jesu,|Tu Ẹmi Rẹ s'ara wa;|Fi alafia Rẹ fun wa,|T'ayé ko le fifun ni;|Wa! Ẹmi Mimọ, jare wa!|Pa ẹsẹ run l'ọkan wa,|Ẹbun nla Rẹ ni l'a n tọrọ,|T'ọjọ nla Pẹntikọsti.
Adaba ọrun! ba le wa,|Fi agbara Rẹ fun wa;|Ki gbogbo orilẹ ede,|Tẹriba f'Olugbala,|K'a gburo Rẹ jakejado,|Ilẹ okunkun wa yi,|Ẹbun nla Rẹ ni l'a ń tọrọ,|T'ọjọ nla Pẹntikọsti.

syllable: Ba ba wa a ọ run un a wa a de,
A wa a lai la gba ra;
Fi Ẹ mi i Mi mọ o Rẹ kun un wa,
K'o sọ gbo gbo wa d'ọ tun;
Wa! a Ẹ mi i Mi mọ, ja re e wa!
Fi e de ti i tun, s'ọ kan wa,
Ẹ e bun nla Rẹ e ni i lań tọ o rọ,
T'o jọ nla Pẹn ti kọs ti.

hymns.title: OLUWA AGBARA F'ỌHUN, BI ARA LOKE SINAI
stanzas: OLUWA Agbara f'ọhun,|Bi ara loke Sinai;|Awọn Angẹl gbohun Rẹ,|Wọn si gbọn fun ibẹru.
Jesu Oluwa mbọ wa,|Ẹ jade lọ pade Rẹ;|Ọpọ yoo kun fun ayọ,|Ọpọ fun ibanujẹ.
Ọjọ 'binu, ọjọ ẹru,|T'ayé t'ọrun yoo fo lọ;|Kini ẹlẹsẹ yoo se,|Le yọju ni ọjọ naa?
Adun ayé ti buse,|Mura Ijọ Séráfù,|Olukore fẹrẹ de,|Alikama ni tire.
Mase gbẹkẹle ayé,|Ọrọ ayé a fo lọ;|Ẹni t'o gb'ayé m'aya,|Y'o gun s'ebute ofo.
Oluwa m'awọn Tirẹ,|O ti se wọn l'ayanfẹ;|Awọn ti ko sin Jesu,|Ni yoo jẹbi nikẹhin.
'Gba t'ipe 'kẹhin ba dun,|Jẹwọ wa Ọba Ogo;|Nipa ore-ọfẹ Rẹ,|Ki a le ba Ọ gunwa.
chorus: Ipe ń dun, Angẹli ho,|Halleluya! l'orin wọn;|O ń pada bọ ninu ogo,|Lati wa gba ijọba.

syllable: O LU WA 'gba ra f'ọ o hun,
Bi a ra lo ke Si nai;
A wọn An gẹl gbo hun un Rẹ,
Wọn si gbọn fun un i bẹ ru.
(A ra i pen dun)
I pe ńdun, An gẹ li ho,
Hal le lu ya! l'o rin wọn;
Oń pa da bọ ni nu o go,
La ti wa gba a i jọ ba.

hymns.title: AGBARA KAN NAA TI, WỌN NI L'ỌJỌ PẸNTIKỌST'
stanzas: AGBARA kan naa ti,|Wọn ni l'ọjọ Pẹntikọst'|Agbara yii, oun kan naa ti Jesu se ileri po mbọ.
Awọn eniyan ro pe,|Wọn f'esu l'esu jade.|Agbara yi, oun kan naa...etc.
Emi buburu kan ko|Tun le ri wa gbese mọ,|Agbara yi, oun kan na...etc.
Ajẹ ko le ri wa mọ,|Oso ko ri wa gbese,|Agbara yi, oun kan na...etc.
Ẹni f'ọkan fun Jesu,|Oun ni yoo ri igbala,|Agbara yi, oun kan na...etc.
Ẹmi Agbara otitọ,|Wọn ti ń se Mẹtalọkan,|Agbara yi, oun kan na...etc.
B'a ba f'ori ti d'opin,|Ere nla yoo jẹ tiwa,|Agbara yii, oun kan naa...etc.
Gba t'iku Ara ba de,|Ẹmi y'o jẹ t'Ọlọrun,|Agbara yi, oun kan na...etc.
Ẹkun, ose, A kọja,|Gba t'a ba r'Olugbala,|Agbara yi, oun kan na...etc.
Halle, Halle, Halleluyah,|Yoo j'orin wa lọjọ naa,|Agbara yi, oun kan na...etc.

syllable: A GBA RA kan naa ti,
Wọn ni l'ọ jọ Pẹn ti kọst'
A gba ra'yii, oun kan naa
Ti Je su u se 'le ri po mbọ.

hymns.title: EDUMARE JAH JEHOVAH, ỌBA ONIBU-ỌRẸ
stanzas: EDUMARE Jah Jehovah,|Ọba Onibu-ọrẹ;|Mo mu ọpẹ mi wa fun ọ,|Mo wa jẹwọ ore Rẹ.
Edumare Jah Jehovah,|Rẹ mi lẹkun layé mi;|Mase jẹ ki ọta yọ mi,|Gbe mi leke isoro.
Edumare Jah Jehovah,|Ko s'alabaro fun mi;|Mo ko aniyan mi tọ Ọ wa,|Majẹ k'ayé r'idi mi.
Edumare Jah Jehovah,|Fun mi n'ibalẹ ọkan;|Mase jẹ ki ile le mi,|Mase jẹ k'ọna na mi.
Edumare Jah Jehovah,|Jẹ k'awọn 'mọ wa tun la;|Awọn agan ń wo Ọ loju,|F'ọmọ rere jinki wọn.
Edumare Jah Jehovah,|Se ayé mi ni rere;|Gba mi lọwọ oso, ajẹ,|Ma fi mi t'ọrẹ f'esu.
Edumare Jah Jehovah,|Bukun wa tile-tọna;|S'opo at'asa Ijọ wa,|Bukun wa kari-kari.
chorus: Wa Olugbohun,|Tẹwọ gbohun ẹbẹ mi,|Baba mo wa d'opo Rẹ mu,|F'oyin s'ayé fun mi.

syllable: E DU MA RE Jah Je ho vah,
Ọ ba O ni bu -ọ rẹ;
Mo mu ọ pẹ mi wa fun ọ,
Mo wa jẹ wọ o re Rẹ.
Wa...O lu gbo hun
Tẹ wọ gbo hun ẹ bẹ mi
Ba ba mo wa d'o po Rẹ mu
F'o yin s'a yé fun mi

hymns.title: IKORE AYÉ FẸRẸ GBO, OLUKORE FẸRẸ DE
OLUWA AWA ỌMỌ RẸ TUN DE, LATI WA ANU RẸ
YIN ỌLỌRUN ỌBA WA, Ẹ GBE OHUN IYIN GA
OLUWA 'KORE. 'WỌ L'A Ń YIN, ILERI RẸ 'GBANI KO YẸ
YIN ỌLỌRUN, YIN LAILAI, FUN IFẸ OJOJUMỌ
WA, ẸYIN ỌLỌPẸ WA, GBE ORIN IKORE GA
stanzas: WA, ẹyin ọlọpẹ wa,|Gbe orin ikore ga;|Ire gbogbo ti wọle,|K'otutu ọyẹ to de;|Ọlọrun Ẹlẹda wa,|L'o ti pese f'aini wa,|Wa k'a re 'le Ọlọrun,|Gbe orin ikore ga.
Oko, Ọlọrun l'ayé,|Lati s'eso iyin Rẹ,|Alikama at'epo,|Ń dagba f'aro tab'ayọ;|Eehu na, ipẹ tẹlẹ,|Siri ọka nikẹhin,|Oluwa 'kore, mu wa,|Jẹ eso rere fun Ọ.
N'tori Ọlọrun wa mbọ,|Y'o si kore Rẹ s'ilẹ,|Oun gbọn gbogbo panti,|Kuro l'oko Rẹ n'jọ naa,|Y'o f'asẹ f'awọn Angẹl'|Lati gba epo s'ina,|Lati ko alikama jọ,|Si aba Rẹ titi lai.
Bẹni, ma wa, Oluwa,|Si ikore ikẹhin:|Ko awọn eniyan Rẹ jọ,|Kuro l'ẹsẹ at'aro;|Sọ wọn di mimọ lailai,|Ki wọn le ma ba Ọ gbe,|Wa t'iwọ t'Angẹli Rẹ,|Gbe orin ikore ga.

syllable: WA, ẹ yin ọ lọ pẹ wa,
Gbe o rin i ko re ga;
I re gbo gbo ti wọ le,
K'o tu tu ọ yẹ to de;
Ọ lọ run Ẹ lẹ da wa,
L'o ti pe se f'ai ni wa,
Wa k'a re 'le Ọ lọ o run,
Gbe o rin i i ko re ga.

hymns.title: OJO IBUKUN Y'O SI RỌ! ILERI IFẸ L'EYI
stanzas: OJO ibukun y'o si rọ!|Ileri ifẹ l'eyi;|A o ni itura didun,|Lat'ọdọ Olugbala.
“Ojo ibukun y'o si rọ!”|Isọji iyebiye;|Lori oke oun pẹtẹlẹ,|Iro ọpọ ojo mbọ.
“Ojo ibukun y'o si rọ”,|Ran wọn si wa Oluwa;|Fun wa ni itura didun,|Wa, f'ọla fun ọrọ Rẹ.
“Ojo ibukun y'o si rọ”.|Iba jẹ le rọ loni;|B'a ti ń jẹwọ f'Ọlọrun wa,|T'a ń pe orukọ Jesu.
chorus: Ojo ibukun,|Ojo ibukun l'a ń fẹ,|Iri anu ń sẹ yi wa ka,|Sugbọn ojo l'a ń tọrọ.

syllable: O JO i bu kun y'o si rọ!
I le ri i fẹ l'e yi;
A o ni i tu ra di dun,
La t'ọ dọ O lu gba la.
O jo i bu kun,
O jo i bu kun l'ań fẹ,
I ri a nu ńsẹ yi wa ka,
Su gbọn o jo l'ań tọ rọ.

hymns.title: JESU MO MU ỌRẸ MI BỌ, WA S'ỌDỌ RẸ NISINSIN YII
A KE HALLELUYAH SOKE, S'ỌLỌRUN SÉRÁFÙ
LATI ESI TI AWA FI Ń SISẸ, 'KORE DE, 'KORE DE
IWỌ MBỌ WA, OLUWA, IWỌ MBỌ WA, ỌBA MI
stanzas: IWỌ mbọ wa, Oluwa,|Iwọ mbọ wa, Ọba mi;|Ninu 'tansan ẹwa Rẹ,|Ni titayọ Ogo rẹ,
Wundia to s'olotọ,|Ti mura nigba gbogbo;|Igba ayọ sunmọle,|Igba awẹ y'o d'opin.
Iwọ mbọ wa nitotọ,|A o pade Rẹ lọna;|A o ri Ọ, a o mọ Ọ,|Ni 'dapọ mimọ julọ.
Wura ko ni le gba ọ,|Ohun asan l'ọrọ jẹ;|Igbagbọ ti ko mira,|Ni y'o gb'ade nikẹhin.
Wundia mẹwa l'a yan,|Marun pere lo yege;|Marun ko ni ororo,|Ina ẹmi wọn ti ku.
'Binu Rẹ tobi pupọ,|Si awọn t'o gbagbe Rẹ;|Ewurẹ apa osi,|L'a o se wọn nikẹhin.
Jọwọ se wa l'ayanfẹ,|Ki a le ba Ọ j'ọba;|Angeli l'a o ba kẹgbẹ,|Ti a o gbe aiku wọ.

syllable: I WỌ mbọ wa, O lu wa,
I wọ mbọ wa, Ọ ba mi;
Ni nu 'tan san ẹ wa Rẹ,
Ni ti ta yọ O go rẹ,
Mu ra de, mu ra de,
Ọ kọ 'ya wo f'ẹ rẹ de;
L'o ru ni i gbe yoo ta,
Mu ra l'ọ ko ọ kan mi.

hymns.title: LẸBA ODO JỌDANI NI, ONIBAPTISI Ń KE WI PÉ
ỌLỌRUN, KINI MO RI YI! OPIN DE F'OHUN GBOGBO!
'GBA JESU BA DE LATI PIN ERE NAA, B'O JỌSAN TABI L'ORU
stanzas: 'Gba Jesu ba de lati pin ere naa,|B'o jọsan tabi l'oru,|Y'o ha ri wa nibi ta gbe ń sọna,|Pẹlu atupa wa ti ń tan.
Bi l'owurọ ni afẹmọjumọ,|Ni yoo pe wa lọkọọkan;|Gba ta f'Oluwa lẹbun wa pada,|Yio dahun pe O seun.
Ka s'otitọ ninu ilana Rẹ,|Ki sa ipa wa gbogbo;|Bi ọkan wa ko ba da wa lẹbi,|A o n'isinmi ogo.
Ibukun ni fun awọn ti ń sọna,|Wọn o pin nin'ogo Rẹ;|Bi o ba de lọsan tabi l'oru,|Yo ha ba wa ni isọna.
chorus: A ha le wi pé a mura tan ara,|Lati lọ sile didan?|Yoo ha ba wa nibi ta gbe ń sọna,|Duro, titi Oluwa yoo fi de.

syllable: 'Gba Je su ba de la ti pin e re naa,
B'o jọ san ta bi l'o ru,
Y'o ha ri wa ni bi ta gbeń sọ na,
Pẹ lu'a tu pa wa tiń tan.
A'a le wi pé a mu ra tan a ra,
La ti lọ si le di dan?
Yoo ha ba wa ni bi ta gbeń sọ na,
Du ro...ti ti'O lu wa yoo fi de.

hymns.title: GBỌ OHUN ALORE, JI, ARA, JI
ỌJỌ 'DAJO OUN 'BINU, ỌJỌ TI JESU PA NI
SUNM'ỌDỌ WA, EMMANUEL, WA, RA ISRAELI PADA
ONIDAJỌ MBỌ WA, AWỌN OKU JINDE
OLUWA MBỌ; AYÉ O MI, OKE Y'O SIDI N'IPO WỌN
GBỌ 'GBE AYỌ! OLUWA DE, JESU T'A SELERI
YỌ ẸYIN ONIGBAGBỌ, JẸ KI 'MỌLẸ YIN TAN
ARA MI FUN 'RUGBIN RERE, NIGBA IFUNRUGBIN WA
ỌJỌ 'BINU ỌJỌ ERU, T'AYÉ AT'ỌRUN Y'O FO LỌ
WO! OLUWA L'AWỌSANMA, O MBỌ L'OGO L'ỌLA RẸ
JESU T'O GA JULỌ L'ỌRUN, IPA RẸ L'O D'AYÉ
ONIDAJỌ NAA DE, O DE! BẸNI 'PE KEJE TI Ń DUN Ń WI
WA, IWỌ JESU T'A N RETI, T'A BI LATI DA NI N'DE
GBOGBO AGBAYÉ Ẹ WA GB'ỌRỌ JESU, OUN NI OLUWA T'O LE GBA 'RAYÉ
ẸYIN KÉRÚBÙ ATI SÉRÁFÙ; KO GBOGBO AFẸ AYÉ YI SILẸ
ỌJỌ NLA KAN MA MBỌ, T' OLUSIRO Y'O DE
A YIN Ọ, BABA ỌRUN; T'O RAN 'MỌLẸ W'AYÉ
JI 'WỌ, KRISTIAN, K'O KI ORỌ AYỌ; TI A BI OLUGBALA ARAYÉ
ẸYIN ANGẸL' L'ỌRUN OGO, TO YI GBOGBO AYÉ KA
stanzas: Ẹyin Angẹl' l'ọrun ogo,|To yi gbogbo ayé ka;|Ẹ ti kọrin dida ayé,|Ẹ so t'ibi Messia;
Ẹyin Olusọ-aguntan,|Ti ń sọ ẹran yin loru|Emmanueli wa ti de,|Irawọ ọmọ naa ń tan.
mf Onigbagbọ ti ń tẹriba,|Ni 'bẹru at'ireti,|L'ojiji l'Oluwa o de,|Ti yoo mu yin re'le
Ẹlẹsẹ 'wọ alaironu,|Ẹlẹbi ati egbe,|Ododo Ọlọrun duro,|Anu ń pe ọ, pa 'wa da.
Gbogbo ẹda ẹ fo f'ayọ,|Jesu Olugbala de,|Anfani miran ko si mọ,|B'eyi ba fo yin kọja.
chorus: Ẹ wa jọsin, ẹ wa jọsin,|Fun Kristi Ọba titun,|Ẹ wa jọsin, ẹ wa jọsin,|Fun Kristi Ọba titun.

syllable: Ẹ yin An gẹl' l'ọ run o o go,
To yi gbo gbo a yé ka;
Ẹ ti kọ rin di da a a yé,
Ẹ so t'i bi Mes si a;
Ẹ wa jọ sin, ẹ wa jọ o sin,
Fun Kris ti Ọ ba ti tun,
Ẹ wa jọ sin, ẹ wa jọ o sin,
Fun Kris ti Ọ ba ti tun.

hymns.title: WA, ẸYIN OLOTỌ, L'AYỌ AT'ISẸGUN
stanzas: WA, ẹyin olotọ,|L'ayọ at'isẹgun,|Wa k'a lọ, wa ka lọ si Betlehem,|Wa ka lọ wo o!|Ọba awọn Angẹl!
Olodumare  ni!|Imọlẹ Ododo,|Ko si korira inu Wundia;|Ọlọrun papa ni,|T'a bi, t'a ko da.
Angẹli, ẹ kọrin,|Kọrin itoye Rẹ,|Ki gbogbo ẹda ọrun si gberin,|Ogo f'Ọlọrun,|L'oke ọrun l'ọhun:
Nitotọ, a wolẹ,|F'Ọba t'a bi loni;|Jesu Iwọ ni awa ń fi ogo fun,|'Wọ ọmọ Baba,|T'o gbe ara wa wọ!
chorus: Ẹ wa ka lọ juba Rẹ,|Ẹ wa ka lọ juba Rẹ,|Ẹ wa k'a lọ juba|Kristi Oluwa.

syllable: WA, ẹ yin'o lo tọ,
L'a yọ a t'i sẹ gun,
Wa k'a lọ, wa ka lọ si Bet le hem,
Wa ka lọ wo o!
Ọ ba a wọn A an gẹl!
Ẹ wa ka lọ ju ba Rẹ,
Ẹ wa ka lọ ju ba Rẹ,
Ẹ wa k'a lọ ju ba
Kris ti O lu wa.

hymns.title: NIGBA KAN NI BETLEHEMU, ILE KEKERE KAN WA
stanzas: NIGBA kan ni Betlehemu,|Ile kekere kan wa;|Nib'iya kan tẹ 'mọ rẹ si,|Lori ibujẹ ẹran;|Maria n'iya ọmọ naa,|Jesu Kristi l'ọmọ naa.
O t'ọrun wa sode ayé,|Oun ni Ọlọrun  Oluwa,|O f'ile ẹran se ile,|'Bujẹ ẹran fun 'busun;|L'ọdọ awọn otosi,|Ni Jesu gbe ni ayé.
Ni gbogbo igba ewe Rẹ,|O gbọran o si mb'ọla;|O fẹran o si ń tẹriba,|Fun iya ti ń tọju Rẹ;|O yẹ ki gbogb' ọmọde,|Ko se Olugbọran bẹ.
'Tori Oun jẹ awose wa,|A ma dagba bi awa;|O kere ko le da nkan se,|A ma sọkun bi awa;|O si le ba wa daro,|O le ba wa yọ pẹlu.
A o f'oju wa ri nikẹhin,|Ni agbara ifẹ Rẹ;|Nitori ọmọ rere yi,|Ni Oluwa wa l'ọrun,|O ń tọ awa ọmọ Rẹ,|S'ọna ibi ti Oun lọ.
Ki se ni ibujẹ ẹran,|Nibi ti malu ń jeun;|L'awa o ri sugbọn l'ọrun,|L'ọwọ ọtun Ọlọrun,|'Gba wọn 'mọ Rẹ b'irawọ,|Ba ń tan nin' asọ ala.

syllable: NI GBA kan ni Bet le he mu,
I le ke ke re e kan an wa;
Ni b'i ya kan tẹ 'mọ rẹ si,
Lo ri i bu jẹ e ẹ e ran;
Ma ria n'i ya ọ mọ naa,
Je su Kris ti l'ọ o mọ o naa.

hymns.title: AYỌ KUN ỌKAN WA LONI, A BI ỌMỌ ỌBA!
stanzas: AYỌ kun ọkan wa loni,|A bi ọmọ Ọba!|Ọpa awọn ogun ọrun,|N sọ ibi Rẹ loni:
A wolẹ n' ibujẹ ẹran,|N'iyanu l'a jọsin:|Ibukun kan ko ta 'yi yo,|Ko s'ayọ bi eyi.
Ayé ko n'adun fun wa mọ,|'Gbati a ba ń wo Ọ:|L'ọwọ Wundia Iya Rẹ,|'Wọ ọmọ Iyanu.
Imọlẹ lat'inu 'Mọlẹ,|Tan 'mọlẹ s'okun wa;|K'a le ma fi isin mimọ,|Se 'ranti ọjọ Rẹ.
chorus: Ẹ yọ, Ọlọrun d'eniyan,|O wa joko l'ayé,|Orukọ wo l'o dun to yi -|Emmanuel.

syllable: A YỌ kun ọ kan wa lo o ni,
A bi ọ mọ Ọ ba!
Ọ po a wọn on o gun ọ run,
Nsọ i bi Rẹ lo ni
Ẹ yọ, Ọ lọ run d'e yan,
O wa jo ko l'a yé e,
O ru kọ wo o l'o dun to yi  -
E mma nu el.

hymns.title: AYỌ B'AYÉ! OLUWA DE; K'AYÉ GBA ỌBA RE
stanzas: AYỌ b'ayé! Oluwa de;|K'ayé gba Ọba re;|Ki gbogbo ọkan mura de,|K'ayé kọrin soke.
Ayọ b'ayé! Jesu jọba,|Ẹ jẹ k'a ho f'ayọ:|Gbogbo igbe, omi, oke,|Wọn ń gberin  ayọ naa.
K'ẹsẹ oun 'yọnu pin l'ayé,|K'ẹgun ye hu n'ilẹ;|O de lati mu 'bukun san,|De'bi t'ẹgun gbe de.
O f'otọ at'ifẹ jỌba,|O jẹ k'oril' ede,|Mọ ododo ijọba Rẹ,|At'ifẹ 'yọnu Rẹ.

syllable: A YỌ b'a yé! O lu wa de;
K'a yé gba o ba re;
Ki gbo o gbo ọ kan an an
mu ra a a a de e e,
K'a yé kọ rin so ke
K'a yé kọ rin so ke.
K'a yé e, K'a yé e e,
Kọ rin so ke

hymns.title: AKOKO TO KESARI PASẸ, LATI KỌ ORUKỌ SINU IWE
GBỌ, ẸDA ỌRUN Ń KỌRIN; OGO FUN ỌBA T'A BI
stanzas: GBỌ, ẹda ọrun ń kọrin;|“Ogo fun Ọba t'a bi”|“Alafia layé yi,|Ọlọrun ba wa laja,|Gbogbo ẹda nde layọ;|Dapọ mọ hiho ọrun;|W'Alade Alafia!|Wo, Orun ododo de.
O bo'go Rẹ s'apa kan;|A bi k'eniyan ma ku;|A bi k'o gb'eniyan ro;|A bi k'o le tun wa bi.|Wa, ireti eniyan;|Se ile Rẹ ninu wa;|N' de, iru ọmọbirin,|Bori esu ninu wa:
Pa aworan Adam run;|F'aworan Rẹ s'ipo rẹ;|Jọ masai f'Ẹmi Rẹ kun,|Okan gbogbo' onigbagbọ,|“Ogo fun Ọba t'a bi”|Jẹ ki gbogbo wa gberin;|“Alafia layé yi”|Ọlọrun ba wa laja.

syllable: GBỌ, ẹ da ọ run ń kọ rin;
“O go fun Ọ ba t'a bi”
“A la fi a li a yé yi,
Ọ lọ run ba wa la ja,
Gbo gbo ẹ da nde li a yọ;
Da pọ mọ hi ho ọ run un;
W'A la de A la fi a!
Wo o O run o do do de.
W'A la de A la fi a!
Wo o O run o do do de.

hymns.title: ONIGBAGBO E BU SA YO
ỌJỌ AYỌ NLANLA NAA DE, EYI T'ARAYÉ TI Ń RETI
AJIN JIN, ORU MIMỌ, OKUN SU, 'MỌLẸ DE
stanzas: AJIN jin, oru mimọ,|Okun su, 'mọlẹ de,|Awọn Olus'aguntan ń sọna,|Ọmọ titun t'o wa l'oju orun.|Sinmi n'nu alafia,|Sinmi n'nu alafia.
Ajin jin, oru mimọ,|Mọlẹ de, okun sa,|Olusọ aguntan gb'orin Angẹli,|Kabiyesi Alleluya Ọba.|Jesu Olugbala de,|Jesu Olugbala de.
Ajin jin, oru mimọ,|'Rawọ ọrun tan 'mọlẹ,|Wo awọn Amoye ila orun,|Mu ọrẹ wọn wa fun Ọba wa.|Jesu Olugbala de,|Jesu Olugbala de.
Ajin jin, oru mimọ,|'Rawọ, ọrun tan 'mọlẹ,|Ka pẹlu awọn Angẹli kọrin,|Kabiyesi Alleluya Ọba.|Jesu Olugbala de,|Jesu Olugbala de.

syllable: A JI N jin, o ru mi mọ,
O kun su, 'mọ lẹ de,
A wọn O lu s'a gun tan sọ na,
Ọ mọ ti tun t'o wa l'o ju'o run.
Sin mi nu'a la fi a a,
Sin i mi nu'a la fi a.

hymns.title: APATA AYÉRAYÉ, ẸNI T'O MBẸ LAILAI
LẸHIN ỌDUN DIẸ, LẸHIN IGBA DIẸ
ỌJỌ ATI AKOKO Ń LỌ, WỌN Ń SUN WA S'ETI, 'BOJI
IGBA MI MBẸ NI ỌWỌ RẸ, A FẸ KO WA NIBẸ
Ẹ FUNPE NAA KIKAN, IPE IHINRERE
stanzas: Ẹ funpe naa kikan,|Ipe ihinrere,|K'o dun jake jado,|L'eti gbogbo ẹda:
Fun 'pe t'Ọdaguntan;|T'a ti pa s'etutu,|Jẹ ki agbayé mọ,|Agbara ẹjẹ Rẹ,
Ẹyin ẹru ẹsẹ,|Ẹ so'ra yin d'ọmọ,|Lọwọ Kristi Jesu,|Ẹ gb'ominira yin.
Olori Alufa,|L'Olugbala ise;|O fi 'ra Rẹ rubọ,|Arukun, aruda.
Ọkan alarẹ, wa,|Sinmi laya Jesu,|Onirobinujẹ,|Tujuka, si ma yọ.
chorus: Ọdun idasilẹ ti de;|Pada ẹlẹsẹ pada,|Ọdun idasilẹ ti de;|Pada ẹlẹsẹ pada.

syllable: Ẹ fun pe na a ki kan,
I pe i hin i re re,
K'o dun ja ke e ja do,
L'e ti gbo gbo ẹ da:
Ọ dun i da a si lẹ ti de;
Pa da ẹ lẹ sẹ pa da,
Ọ dun i da a si lẹ ti de;
Pa da ẹ lẹ sẹ pa da.

hymns.title: KI GBOGBO OJUBỌ ORO D'OKO, T'ỌYA, T'OGUN ATI T'ESU
stanzas: KI gbogbo ojubọ oro d'oko,|T'Ọya, t'Ogun ati t'Esu,|Ki wọn dojubọ Jesu Ọba,|L'adura Ijọ Séráfù.
Ki gbogbo ojubọ Irumọlẹ|Ti Sangó ati sanponna,|Ki wọn dojubọ Jesu Ọba,|L'adura Ijọ Séráfù.
Ki gbogbo ojubọ Irumọlẹ,|T'Ifa ati t'Ọbaluayé,|Ki wọn dojubọ Jesu Ọba,|L'adura Ijọ Séráfù.
Ki gbogbo ojubọ 'risa loko,|Ti babaji ati osun,|Ki wọn dojubọ Jesu Ọba,|L'adura Ijọ Séráfù.
K'awọn agbagba le yipada,|Ati Ọba Osemọwe,|Ki wọn le juba Jesu Ọba,|L'adura Ijọ Séráfù.
Ki gbogbo ojubọ Ọlọrun,|Ti 'Gunnu ati Gelede,|Ki wọn dojubọ Jesu Ọba,|L'adura Ijọ Séráfù.
K'awọn Keferi  le yipada,|At'awọn Elegun pẹlu,|Ki wọn le juba Jesu Ọba,|L'adura Ijọ Séráfù.
K'awọn ọlọya le yipada,|At'awọn alagẹmo,|Ki wọn le juba Jesu Ọba,|L'adura Ijọ Séráfù.
Ki gbogbo ọmọ 'jọ Séráfù,|At'Ijọ Kérúbù pẹlu,|Ki wọn le juba Jesu Ọba,|L'adura Ijọ Séráfù.
Ki gbogb' awọn Ẹgbẹ Akọrin,|Ati Ẹgbẹ Aladura|Ki Ẹgbẹ Igbimọ Séráfù,|Ki wọn d'amure wọn giri.
K'Ọlọrun da alagba wa si,|Ati awọn Isọngbe rẹ|K'Ọlọrun tubo ran yin lọwọ,|K'O di yin l'amure ododo.
K'a fi ogo fun Baba l'oke,|K'a f'ogo fun Ọmọ pẹlu,|K'a fi ogo fun Ẹmi Mimọ ,|Mẹtalọkan l'ọpẹ yẹ fun.
chorus: Oluwa, se wa ni Tirẹ,|Tirẹ sa ni wa titi ayé,|Nitori Kristi Ọmọ Baba,|Da wa si n'Ijọ Séráfù.

syllable: KI gbo gbo 'ju bọ o ro d'o ko,
T'Ọ ya, t'O gun a ti t'E su,
Ki wọn do ju bọ Je su Ọ ba,
L'a du ra I jọ Sé rá fù.
O lu wa, se wa ni Ti rẹ,
Ti rẹ sa ni wa ti ti a yé,
Ni to ri Kris ti Ọ mọ Ba ba,
Da wa si n'I jọ Sé rá fù.

hymns.title: MA TAN, IRAWỌ DIDAN, LAT' ILE RẸ LOKE
stanzas: MA tan, Irawọ didan,|Lat' ile Rẹ loke;|Ma fi 'fẹran Baba han,|'N'nu titan didan Rẹ.
Ma tan, Irawọ Ogo,|A  gboju wa si Ọ;|Ni oke awọsanma,|Awa n ri 'tansan Rẹ.
Ma tan, 'Wọ ti ki parọ,|Ko si s'amọna wa;|Sibi t'imọlẹ ayọ,|Ti ko lopin gbe wa.
'Gba ba si d'ọrun pẹlu,|Awọn t'arapada;|K'a wa pẹlu Rẹ n'nu Ogo,|Le ma tan titi lai.
chorus: Ma tan, ma tan,|Iwọ Irawọ didan,|Ma tan, ma tan,|Iwọ Irawọ didan.

syllable: MA tan, I ra a wọ di dan,
La ti le Rẹ lo ke;
Ma fi 'fẹ ran an Ba ba han,
'N'nu ti tan di dan Rẹ.
Ma tan, ma tan, ma tan,
I wọ I ra wọ o di dan,
Ma tan, ma tan, ma tan,
I wọ I ra wọ o di dan.

hymns.title: JESU LORUKỌ TO GA JU, LAYÉ A TI LỌRUN
stanzas: JESU lorukọ to ga ju,|Layé a ti lọrun;|Awọn Angẹli wolẹ fun,|Esu, bẹru o sa.
Kérúbù ati Séráfù,|Wọn yi 'tẹ Baba ka,|Nigba gbogbo niwaju Rẹ,|Wọn ń kọ orin iyin.
Olugbala sẹgun iku,|Ijọba Satan fọ;|Gbogbo ẹda ẹ bu sayọ,|Ka yin Baba logo.
Kérúbù ati Séráfù,|Ẹ fẹran ara yin;|Ifẹ ni awọn Angẹli,|Fi ń sin Baba loke
Jesu, Olori Ijọ wa,|Bukun wa layé wa;|Jọwọ pese fun aini wa,|K'ebi alẹ ma pa wa.
Jehovah Jire Ọba wa,|Iyin f'orukọ Rẹ;|Ma jẹ ki oso at'ajẹ|Ri wa lọjọ ayé wa.
Jesu, fọ itẹgun esu,|Iwọ l'Ọba  Ogo;|Iyin, ope ni fun Baba,|Ni fun Mẹtalọkan.
chorus: Ha! Ko s'ariyanjiyan mọ,|Ipe miiran  ko si,|O daju wi pé Jesu ku,|Ani f'emi ẹlẹsẹ.

syllable: JE SU lo ru kọ to ga ju,
La yé a ti lọ run;
A wọn An gẹ li wo lẹ fun,
E su, bẹ ru o sa.
Ha! Ko s'a ri yan ji yan mọ,
I pe mii ran ko si,
O da ju wi pé Je su ku,
A ni f'e mi'ẹ lẹ sẹ.

hymns.title: ỌDUN TITUN DE AWA Ń YỌ, TIWA TO BẸ, O JU BẸ LỌ
stanzas: ỌDUN titun de awa ń yọ,|Tiwa to bẹ, o ju bẹ lọ,|Awa 'jọ Séráfù,|Ko ni gbagbe l'ọdun to lọ,|K'Ọlọrun se 'yi l'ọdun re,|Ẹ ku ewu Ọdun.
Ẹyin ọmọ 'jọ Kérúbù,|K'ẹ sotitọ titi d'opin,|K'ẹ mura s' adura,|K'ẹ ma woju ẹnikẹni,|Ẹ gbọran si agba l'ẹnu,|Ẹ yẹ 'ra ọdun wo.
Ẹyin Ijọ Aladura,|K'ẹ ranti iran ti ẹ ń ri,|S'ipa iwa rere,|K'ẹ mura lati d'ohun pọ,|Ẹ se ara yin ni ọkan.|Ẹ yẹ'ra ọdun wo.
Awọn ti ko gba iran gbọ,|Wọn dabi  akọ keferi;|Wọn ko mọ 'kan s'ọkan,|Bere lọwọ Jenny Winful,|Ohun t'o ri k'o to bimọ,|Ẹ yẹ'ra ọdun wo.
K'a fi keta gbogbo silẹ,|K'a fẹ ọm'ẹnikeji wa,|L'ọdun t'a bọ si  yi,|K'a ma sọrọ ẹni lẹhin,|K'ija gbogbo kuro l'ona,|Ẹ yẹ'ra ọdun wo.
Ninu ọdun t'a bọ si yi,|Agan a f'ọwọ s'osun,|Ọlọmọ a tun bi,|Ẹni t'o jẹ gbese y'o san,|Ajẹ, oso ko ni ri wa,|Ẹ yẹ'ra ọdun wo.
Ẹ wo bi ilu wa ti ri,|Ajakal' arun tun gb'ode,|K'Ọlọrun mu kuro,|Nipa awẹ at'adura,|K'ọkan gbogbo wa nirẹpọ,|Ẹ yẹ'ra ọdun wo.
A ko ri ra, a ko ri ta,|Ko tun s'awọn alanu mọ,|Owo ko si l'ode,|Ibawi Ọlọrun l'eyi,|K'a ronu k' a p'iwa wa da.|Ẹ yẹ'ra ọdun wo.
